      <div class="card" id="nut-knowledge-card">
        <div class="card-title"><span>๐“</span>เธเธงเธฒเธกเธฃเธนเนเนเธฅเธฐเธเธณเนเธเธฐเธเธณเธ”เนเธฒเธเนเธ เธเธเธฒเธเธฒเธฃ</div>
        <div class="two-col">
          <div>
            <div class="vac-edu-block">
              <h4>๐ฅ— เนเธ เธเธเธฒเธเธฒเธฃเธ—เธตเนเธ”เธตเธชเธณเธซเธฃเธฑเธเธงเธฑเธขเน€เธฃเธตเธขเธ</h4>
              <p>เธฃเนเธฒเธเธเธฒเธขเธงเธฑเธขเธฃเธธเนเธเธ•เนเธญเธเธเธฒเธฃเธเธฅเธฑเธเธเธฒเธเนเธฅเธฐเธชเธฒเธฃเธญเธฒเธซเธฒเธฃเธเธฃเธ 5 เธซเธกเธนเนเธ—เธธเธเธงเธฑเธ โ€” เธเนเธฒเธง เนเธเนเธ เนเธเธฃเธ•เธตเธ เธเธฑเธ เธเธฅเนเธกเน เนเธฅเธฐเธเธก เธเธงเธฃเธฃเธฑเธเธเธฃเธฐเธ—เธฒเธเนเธซเนเธเธฃเธ 3 เธกเธทเนเธญเธซเธฅเธฑเธ เนเธกเนเธเนเธฒเธกเธกเธทเนเธญเธญเธฒเธซเธฒเธฃ เธ”เธทเนเธกเธเนเธณเธงเธฑเธเธฅเธฐ 6โ€“8 เนเธเนเธง เนเธฅเธฐเธเธญเธเธซเธฅเธฑเธเธเธฑเธเธเนเธญเธ 8โ€“9 เธเธฑเนเธงเนเธกเธ</p>
            </div>
            <div class="vac-edu-block">
              <h4>โ… เธญเธฒเธซเธฒเธฃเธ—เธตเนเธเธงเธฃเธฃเธฑเธเธเธฃเธฐเธ—เธฒเธ</h4>
              <p>เธเนเธฒเธงเธเธฅเนเธญเธ เนเธเน เธเธฅเธฒ เนเธเน เธ–เธฑเนเธง เธเธฑเธเนเธเน€เธเธตเธขเธง เธเธฅเนเธกเนเธชเธ” เธเธกเนเธเธกเธฑเธเธ•เนเธณ เธญเธฒเธซเธฒเธฃเธชเธ”เนเธซเธกเนเธเธฃเธธเธเธชเธธเธ เธฅเธ”เธญเธฒเธซเธฒเธฃเธ—เธญเธ” เธเธญเธเธซเธงเธฒเธ เนเธฅเธฐเน€เธเธฃเธทเนเธญเธเธ”เธทเนเธกเธ•เธดเธ”เธเธญเธ</p>
            </div>
            <div class="vac-edu-block">
              <h4>๐ซ เธญเธฒเธซเธฒเธฃเธ—เธตเนเธเธงเธฃเธซเธฅเธตเธเน€เธฅเธตเนเธขเธ</h4>
              <p>เธญเธฒเธซเธฒเธฃเธเธฒเธชเธ•เนเธเธนเนเธ” เธเธเธกเธเธเน€เธเธตเนเธขเธง เธเนเธณเธญเธฑเธ”เธฅเธก เธเธฒ/เธเธฒเนเธเนเธชเนเธเนเธณเธ•เธฒเธฅ เธเธฐเธซเธกเธตเนเธเธถเนเธเธชเธณเน€เธฃเนเธเธฃเธนเธเธเนเธญเธขเน เนเธฅเธฐเธญเธฒเธซเธฒเธฃเธฃเธชเธเธฑเธ”/เน€เธเนเธกเธเธฑเธ” เธเธถเนเธเน€เธชเธตเนเธขเธเธ•เนเธญเนเธฃเธเธญเนเธงเธ เน€เธเธฒเธซเธงเธฒเธ เนเธฅเธฐเธเธงเธฒเธกเธ”เธฑเธเนเธฅเธซเธดเธ•เธชเธนเธ</p>
            </div>
            <div class="vac-edu-block">
              <h4>๐ เธเธฒเธฃเธญเธญเธเธเธณเธฅเธฑเธเธเธฒเธข</h4>
              <p>เธญเธญเธเธเธณเธฅเธฑเธเธเธฒเธขเธญเธขเนเธฒเธเธเนเธญเธข 30โ€“60 เธเธฒเธ—เธตเธ•เนเธญเธงเธฑเธ เน€เธเนเธ เธงเธดเนเธ เน€เธ”เธดเธเน€เธฃเนเธง เธงเนเธฒเธขเธเนเธณ เธ•เธตเนเธเธ” เธซเธฃเธทเธญเน€เธฅเนเธเธเธตเธฌเธฒเนเธเนเธฃเธเน€เธฃเธตเธขเธ เธเนเธงเธขเน€เธเธฒเธเธฅเธฒเธเธเธฅเธฑเธเธเธฒเธ เธชเธฃเนเธฒเธเธเธฅเนเธฒเธกเน€เธเธทเนเธญ เนเธฅเธฐเธชเนเธเน€เธชเธฃเธดเธกเธชเธธเธเธ เธฒเธเธเธดเธ•</p>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div>
            <div class="vac-edu-block" style="background:var(--green-pale);border-color:var(--green-light);">
              <h4>๐“ BMI เธเธทเธญเธญเธฐเนเธฃ?</h4>
              <p>BMI (เธ”เธฑเธเธเธตเธกเธงเธฅเธเธฒเธข) = เธเนเธณเธซเธเธฑเธ (kg) รท เธชเนเธงเธเธชเธนเธ (m)ยฒ เนเธเนเธเธฃเธฐเน€เธกเธดเธเธ เธฒเธงเธฐเธเนเธณเธซเธเธฑเธเธชเธกเธชเนเธงเธเนเธเน€เธ”เนเธเธงเธฑเธขเน€เธฃเธตเธขเธ เธเธงเธฃเธเธฑเนเธเธเนเธณเธซเธเธฑเธเธงเธฑเธ”เธชเนเธงเธเธชเธนเธเธเธตเธฅเธฐ 2 เธเธฃเธฑเนเธ เนเธฅเธฐเธเธฑเธเธ—เธถเธเธเธฅเน€เธเธทเนเธญเธ•เธดเธ”เธ•เธฒเธกเนเธเธงเนเธเนเธก</p>
            </div>
            <div id="nut-advice-personal">
              <div class="alert alert-info"><span>โน๏ธ</span><div>เธเธฃเธญเธเธเนเธณเธซเธเธฑเธเนเธฅเธฐเธชเนเธงเธเธชเธนเธเนเธเธเธญเธฃเนเธกเธ”เนเธฒเธเธเธ เน€เธเธทเนเธญเธ”เธน<strong>เธเธณเนเธเธฐเธเธณเน€เธเธเธฒเธฐ</strong>เธ•เธฒเธกเธเธฅ BMI เธเธญเธเธเธธเธ“</div></div>
            </div>

<script>
  // Date display
  const now = new Date();
  const thDate = now.toLocaleDateString('th-TH', { year: 'numeric', month: 'long', day: 'numeric', weekday: 'long' });
  var dateDisplayEl = document.getElementById('dateDisplay');
  if (dateDisplayEl) dateDisplayEl.textContent = thDate;

  // ===== เธเธ—เธเธฒเธ— & session (เธ•เนเธญเธเธญเธขเธนเนเธเนเธญเธ init เนเธ”เน เธ—เธตเนเธญเนเธฒเธ STAFF_ROLES) =====
  const STAFF_LOGIN = {
    username: '0937107114',
    password: '0937107114'
  };
  let pendingStaffRole = '';
  const ROLES = {
    nurse:   { icon: 'stethoscope', name: 'เน€เธเนเธฒเธซเธเนเธฒเธ—เธตเนเธญเธเธฒเธกเธฑเธข / เธเธขเธฒเธเธฒเธฅ' },
    teacher: { icon: 'book-open', name: 'เธเธฃเธน / เธญเธฒเธเธฒเธฃเธขเนเธ—เธตเนเธเธฃเธถเธเธฉเธฒ' },
    student: { icon: 'graduation-cap', name: 'เธเธฑเธเน€เธฃเธตเธขเธ / เธเธนเนเธเธเธเธฃเธญเธ' },
    admin:   { icon: 'bar-chart-3', name: 'เธเธนเนเธเธฃเธดเธซเธฒเธฃเนเธฃเธเน€เธฃเธตเธขเธ' }
  };
  const STAFF_ROLES = ['nurse', 'admin'];
  const LIMITED_USER_ROLES = ['student', 'teacher'];
  const STAFF_ONLY_SECTIONS = ['student', 'medicine', 'report', 'referral', 'appointment'];
  const PUBLIC_SECTIONS = ['gshps', 'public'];
  let guestMode = '';
  let currentRole = '';
  let loggedInStudentId = '';

  function staffRolesReady() {
    try { return typeof STAFF_ROLES !== 'undefined' && STAFF_ROLES; } catch (e) { return false; }
  }

  // เธเธณเธเธงเธเธเธฑเธเน€เธฃเธตเธขเธเธเธฒเธเธ—เธฐเน€เธเธตเธขเธ (Excel)
  function getStudentRegistryCount() {
    if (typeof STUDENT_BASIC !== 'undefined') return Object.keys(STUDENT_BASIC).length;
    const tbody = document.querySelector('#section-student tbody');
    return tbody ? tbody.rows.length : 0;
  }
  function updateStudentCounts() {
    const n = getStudentRegistryCount();
    const fmt = n.toLocaleString('th-TH');
    const card = document.getElementById('totalStudentCount');
    if (card) card.textContent = fmt;
    const badge = document.getElementById('schoolBadge');
    if (badge) {
      let staffN = 200;
      try {
        const dash = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('sh-dashboard') || '{}');
        if (dash.staffCount != null) staffN = dash.staffCount;
      } catch (e) {}
      badge.textContent = '๐ซ เนเธฃเธเน€เธฃเธตเธขเธเธเนเธฒเธเนเธเน | เธเธฑเธเน€เธฃเธตเธขเธ ' + fmt + ' เธเธ | เธเธฃเธน ' + staffN + ' เธเธ';
    }
    const desc = document.getElementById('studentPageDesc');
    if (desc) desc.textContent = 'เธเธฑเธเธ—เธถเธเธเธฃเธฐเธงเธฑเธ•เธดเธชเธธเธเธ เธฒเธเธเธฑเธเน€เธฃเธตเธขเธ เธก.1โ€“เธก.6 เธเธณเธเธงเธ ' + fmt + ' เธเธ';
  }
  updateStudentCounts();
  initVisClassSelect();
  initVisRecClassSelect();
  initVisitProviderClassSelect('vis');
  initVisitProviderClassSelect('vis-rec');

  let visitCount = 4;

  // Section navigation
  function toggleMobileNav() {
    const sidebar = document.getElementById('sidebar');
    const overlay = document.getElementById('sidebarOverlay');
    const btn = document.getElementById('mobileMenuBtn');
    const open = sidebar && sidebar.classList.toggle('mobile-open');
    if (overlay) overlay.classList.toggle('open', !!open);
    document.body.classList.toggle('mobile-nav-open', !!open);
    if (btn) btn.setAttribute('aria-label', open ? 'เธเธดเธ”เน€เธกเธเธน' : 'เน€เธเธดเธ”เน€เธกเธเธน');
    if (btn) btn.textContent = open ? 'โ•' : 'โฐ';
  }
  function closeMobileNav() {
    const sidebar = document.getElementById('sidebar');
    const overlay = document.getElementById('sidebarOverlay');
    const btn = document.getElementById('mobileMenuBtn');
    if (sidebar) sidebar.classList.remove('mobile-open');
    if (overlay) overlay.classList.remove('open');
    document.body.classList.remove('mobile-nav-open');
    if (btn) { btn.setAttribute('aria-label', 'เน€เธเธดเธ”เน€เธกเธเธน'); btn.textContent = 'โฐ'; }
  }
  function isLimitedUserRole(role) {
    role = role || (typeof getCurrentRole === 'function' ? getCurrentRole() : '');
    return role === 'student' || role === 'teacher';
  }
  function isLimitedUser() {
    return isLimitedUserRole();
  }
  function isFullStaffRole(role) {
    role = role || (typeof getCurrentRole === 'function' ? getCurrentRole() : '');
    return role === 'nurse' || role === 'admin';
  }
  function isPublicGuest() {
    return getCurrentRole() === 'public';
  }
  function showSection(id) {
    const role = getCurrentRole();
    if (id === 'gshps' && !isPublicGuest()) return;
    if (isPublicGuest()) {
      if (guestMode === 'info' && id !== 'gshps') return;
      if (guestMode === 'public' && id !== 'public') return;
    } else if (typeof STAFF_ONLY_SECTIONS !== 'undefined' && STAFF_ONLY_SECTIONS.includes(id) && staffRolesReady() && !STAFF_ROLES.includes(role)) {
      return;
    }
    if (id === 'environment' && isLimitedUser()) return;
    if (id === 'dashboard' && isLimitedUser()) return;
    if (id === 'report' && role === 'admin') return;
    closeMobileNav();
    document.querySelectorAll('.section-panel').forEach(p => p.classList.remove('active'));
    document.querySelectorAll('.nav-item').forEach(n => n.classList.remove('active'));
    const panel = document.getElementById('section-' + id);
    if (panel) panel.classList.add('active');
    if (getCurrentRole() === 'admin') {
      var adminCharts = document.getElementById('dash-admin-charts');
      if (adminCharts) adminCharts.style.display = (id === 'dashboard') ? 'block' : 'none';
    }
    const ev = (typeof event !== 'undefined' && event) ? event : window.event;
    if (ev && ev.currentTarget) ev.currentTarget.classList.add('active');
    // Manual active for nav items
    document.querySelectorAll('.nav-item').forEach(n => {
      if (n.getAttribute('onclick') && n.getAttribute('onclick').includes("'" + id + "'")) {
        n.classList.add('active');
      }
    });
    if (id === 'vaccine') {
      renderVaccineSchedule();
      if (isLimitedUser()) fillStudentVaccineForm();
      renderVaccineHpvCoverageChart();
    }
    if (id === 'chronic') {
      if (isLimitedUser()) fillStudentChronicForm();
      else if (typeof isFullStaffRole === 'function' && isFullStaffRole()) fillChronicStaffForm();
    }
    if (id === 'disease' && isLimitedUser()) fillStudentDiseaseForm();
    if (id === 'screening') { fillStudentScreeningForms(); renderScreeningRecords(); }
    if (id === 'nutrition') fillStudentNutritionForm();
    if (id === 'mental') { fillStudentMentalForm(); initMentalForms(); renderMentalRecords(); }
    if (id === 'dashboard') renderDashboard();
    if (id === 'emergency') renderEmergencyRecords();
    if (id === 'disease') {
      renderDiseaseSituation();
      renderDiseaseReports();
    }
    if (id === 'environment') renderEnvironmentResults();
    if (id === 'visit') {
      updateLimitedUserVisitLabels(getCurrentRole());
      if (isLimitedUser()) {
        fillVisitMyForm();
        if (getCurrentRole() === 'student' && loggedInStudentId) {
          refreshStudentAppointmentFromSheet(loggedInStudentId);
        }
      } else {
        refreshAllVisitRecordsFromSheetForStaff(function() {
          renderVisitToday();
        });
      }
    }
    if (id === 'visit-record' && isLimitedUser()) {
      fillVisitRecordForm();
    }
    if (id === 'report') renderMonthlyReportSummary();
    if (id === 'medicine') renderMedicineStock();
    if (id === 'referral') renderReferralRecords();
    if (id === 'appointment') renderAppointmentList();
    if (id === 'student') renderGradeChart();
    if (id === 'gshps' && typeof renderInfoHub === 'function') renderInfoHub();
    if (id === 'public') renderPublicHub();
  }
  window.addEventListener('resize', function() {
    if (window.innerWidth > 900) closeMobileNav();
  });
  document.addEventListener('keydown', function(e) {
    if (e.key === 'Escape') closeMobileNav();
  });

  // Tab switching
  function switchTab(el, contentId) {
    const parent = el.parentElement;
    parent.querySelectorAll('.tab').forEach(t => t.classList.remove('active'));
    el.classList.add('active');
    // Hide all sibling content divs
    const ids = ['sc-vision','sc-hearing','sc-blood','sc-oral','sc-physical'];
    ids.forEach(i => { const d = document.getElementById(i); if(d) d.style.display='none'; });
    const target = document.getElementById(contentId);
    if (target) target.style.display = 'block';
  }

  // Checkbox toggle
  function toggleCheck(el) {
    el.classList.toggle('checked');
    el.textContent = el.classList.contains('checked') ? 'โ“' : '';
  }

  // BMI calculator & nutrition save
  function getNutritionCategory(bmi) {
    const v = parseFloat(bmi);
    if (isNaN(v)) return null;
    if (v < 14) return { key: 'veryThin', label: 'เธเธญเธกเธกเธฒเธ', badge: 'badge-red', status: 'โ ๏ธ เธเธญเธกเธกเธฒเธ โ€” เธชเนเธเธ•เนเธญเนเธเธ—เธขเนเธ”เนเธงเธ', cls: 'alert-danger', followup: true };
    if (v < 17) return { key: 'thin', label: 'เธเธญเธก', badge: 'badge-gold', status: 'โ ๏ธ เธเธญเธก โ€” เนเธซเนเธเธณเนเธเธฐเธเธณเนเธ เธเธเธฒเธเธฒเธฃ', cls: 'alert-warning', followup: true };
    if (v < 23) return { key: 'normal', label: 'เธเธเธ•เธด', badge: 'badge-green', status: 'โ… เธเธเธ•เธด โ€” เธชเนเธเน€เธชเธฃเธดเธกเธ•เนเธญเน€เธเธทเนเธญเธ', cls: 'alert-success', followup: false };
    if (v < 25) return { key: 'overweight', label: 'เน€เธฃเธดเนเธกเธญเนเธงเธ', badge: 'badge-gold', status: 'โ ๏ธ เน€เธฃเธดเนเธกเธญเนเธงเธ โ€” เธเธฃเธฑเธเธเธคเธ•เธดเธเธฃเธฃเธก', cls: 'alert-warning', followup: true };
    return { key: 'obese', label: 'เธญเนเธงเธ', badge: 'badge-red', status: '๐จ เธญเนเธงเธ โ€” เธชเนเธเธ•เนเธญเนเธเธ—เธขเน/เนเธ เธเธเธฒเธเธฃ', cls: 'alert-danger', followup: true };
  }
  var NUTRITION_ADVICE = {
    veryThin: {
      meaning: 'เธเนเธณเธซเธเธฑเธเธ•เนเธณเธเธงเนเธฒเน€เธเธ“เธ‘เนเธกเธฒเธ เธญเธฒเธเน€เธเธดเธ”เธเธฒเธเธฃเธฑเธเธเธฃเธฐเธ—เธฒเธเธญเธฒเธซเธฒเธฃเนเธกเนเน€เธเธตเธขเธเธเธญ เธเธฒเธ”เธชเธฒเธฃเธญเธฒเธซเธฒเธฃ เธซเธฃเธทเธญเธกเธตเธเธฑเธเธซเธฒเธชเธธเธเธ เธฒเธเน€เธฃเธทเนเธญเธฃเธฑเธ',

  function escNutHtml(s) {
    return String(s || '').replace(/&/g, '&amp;').replace(/</g, '&lt;');
  }
  function renderNutritionAdviceBlocks(cat, bmi) {
    var info = NUTRITION_ADVICE[cat.key] || NUTRITION_ADVICE.normal;
    return '<div class="vac-edu-block" style="background:var(--green-pale);border-color:var(--green-light);">' +
      '<h4>๐ฏ เธเธณเนเธเธฐเธเธณเธชเธณเธซเธฃเธฑเธเธ เธฒเธงเธฐใ€' + escNutHtml(cat.label) + 'ใ€ (BMI ' + escNutHtml(bmi) + ')</h4>' +
      '<p><strong>เธเธงเธฒเธกเธซเธกเธฒเธข:</strong> ' + escNutHtml(info.meaning) + '</p></div>' +
      '<div class="vac-edu-block"><h4>โ ๏ธ เธเธงเธฒเธกเน€เธชเธตเนเธขเธเธซเธฒเธเนเธกเนเธ”เธนเนเธฅ</h4><p>' + escNutHtml(info.risk) + '</p></div>' +
      '<div class="vac-edu-block"><h4>๐’ก เธชเธดเนเธเธ—เธตเนเธเธงเธฃเธ—เธณ</h4><p>' + escNutHtml(info.advice) + '</p></div>' +
      '<div class="vac-edu-block"><h4>โ… เธญเธฒเธซเธฒเธฃเธ—เธตเนเนเธเธฐเธเธณ</h4><p>' + escNutHtml(info.eat) + '</p></div>' +
      '<div class="vac-edu-block"><h4>๐ซ เธญเธฒเธซเธฒเธฃเธ—เธตเนเธเธงเธฃเธซเธฅเธตเธเน€เธฅเธตเนเธขเธ</h4><p>' + escNutHtml(info.avoid) + '</p></div>';
  }
  function updateNutritionPersonalAdvice(bmi) {
    var panel = document.getElementById('nut-advice-personal');
    var inline = document.getElementById('nut-advice-inline');
    var cat = getNutritionCategory(bmi);
    if (!panel) return;
    if (!cat || !bmi) {
      panel.innerHTML = '<div class="alert alert-info"><span>โน๏ธ</span><div>เธเธฃเธญเธเธเนเธณเธซเธเธฑเธเนเธฅเธฐเธชเนเธงเธเธชเธนเธเนเธเธเธญเธฃเนเธกเธ”เนเธฒเธเธเธ เน€เธเธทเนเธญเธ”เธน<strong>เธเธณเนเธเธฐเธเธณเน€เธเธเธฒเธฐ</strong>เธ•เธฒเธกเธเธฅ BMI เธเธญเธเธเธธเธ“</div></div>';
      if (inline) { inline.style.display = 'none'; inline.innerHTML = ''; }
      return;
    }
    var html = renderNutritionAdviceBlocks(cat, bmi);
    panel.innerHTML = html;
    if (inline) {
      inline.style.display = '';
      inline.innerHTML = '<div class="vac-edu-block"><h4>๐“ เธชเธฃเธธเธเธเธณเนเธเธฐเธเธณเธ”เนเธงเธ</h4><p>' +
        escNutHtml((NUTRITION_ADVICE[cat.key] || NUTRITION_ADVICE.normal).advice) +
        '</p></div>';
    }
  }
  function calcBMI() {
    const wEl = document.getElementById('nut-weight');
    const hEl = document.getElementById('nut-height');
    const r = document.getElementById('nut-result');
    if (!wEl || !hEl || !r) return;
    const w = parseFloat(wEl.value);
    const h = parseFloat(hEl.value) / 100;
    const bmiEl = document.getElementById('nut-bmi');
    if (w > 0 && h > 0) {
      const bmi = (w / (h * h)).toFixed(1);
      if (bmiEl) bmiEl.value = bmi;
      const cat = getNutritionCategory(bmi);
      r.className = 'alert ' + cat.cls;
      r.innerHTML = '<span>' + bmi + '</span><div><strong>BMI: ' + bmi + '</strong> โ€” ' + cat.status + '</div>';
      updateNutritionPersonalAdvice(bmi);
    } else {
      if (bmiEl) bmiEl.value = '';
      r.className = 'alert alert-info';
      r.textContent = 'เธเธฃเธญเธเธเนเธณเธซเธเธฑเธเนเธฅเธฐเธชเนเธงเธเธชเธนเธเน€เธเธทเนเธญเธ”เธนเธเธฅ';
      updateNutritionPersonalAdvice('');
    }
  }
  function calcAgeFromDob(dob) {
    if (!dob) return '';
    const parts = String(dob).trim().replace(/-/g, '/').split('/');
    if (parts.length !== 3) return '';
    const d = parseInt(parts[0], 10);
    const m = parseInt(parts[1], 10);
    let y = parseInt(parts[2], 10);
    if (isNaN(d) || isNaN(m) || isNaN(y)) return '';
    if (y > 2400) y -= 543;
    const birth = new Date(y, m - 1, d);
    if (isNaN(birth.getTime())) return '';
    const today = new Date();
    let age = today.getFullYear() - birth.getFullYear();
    const md = today.getMonth() - birth.getMonth();
    if (md < 0 || (md === 0 && today.getDate() < birth.getDate())) age--;
    return age >= 0 ? String(age) : '';
  }
  function buildClassRoomOptionsHtml(includeTeacher) {
    var html = '<option>-- เน€เธฅเธทเธญเธ --</option>';
    for (var g = 1; g <= 6; g++) {
      for (var r = 1; r <= 12; r++) {
        html += '<option>เธก.' + g + '/' + r + '</option>';
      }
    }
    if (includeTeacher !== false) html += '<option>เธเธฃเธน/เธเธธเธเธฅเธฒเธเธฃ</option>';
    return html;
  }
  function initVisClassSelect() {
    var el = document.getElementById('vis-class');
    if (!el) return;
    el.innerHTML = buildClassRoomOptionsHtml(true);
  }
  function initVisRecClassSelect() {
    var el = document.getElementById('vis-rec-class');
    if (!el) return;
    el.innerHTML = buildClassRoomOptionsHtml(true);
  }
  function buildProviderClassOptionsHtml() {
    var html = '<option value="">-- เน€เธฅเธทเธญเธเธเธฑเนเธ --</option>';
    for (var g = 1; g <= 6; g++) {
      for (var r = 1; r <= 12; r++) {
        html += '<option>เธก.' + g + '/' + r + '</option>';
      }
    }
    return html;
  }
  function initVisitProviderClassSelect(prefix) {
    var el = document.getElementById(prefix + '-provider-class');
    if (!el) return;
    el.innerHTML = buildProviderClassOptionsHtml();
  }
  function toggleVisitProviderExtras(prefix) {
    var nameEl = document.getElementById(prefix + '-provider');
    var extraEl = document.getElementById(prefix + '-provider-extra');
    if (!nameEl || !extraEl) return;
    var hasName = (nameEl.value || '').trim().length > 0;
    extraEl.style.display = hasName ? '' : 'none';
    if (!hasName) {
      var roleEl = document.getElementById(prefix + '-provider-role');
      var classEl = document.getElementById(prefix + '-provider-class');
      if (roleEl) roleEl.value = '';
      if (classEl) {
        classEl.value = '';
        classEl.style.display = 'none';
      }
    }
  }
  function onVisitProviderRoleChange(prefix) {
    var roleEl = document.getElementById(prefix + '-provider-role');
    var classEl = document.getElementById(prefix + '-provider-class');
    if (!roleEl || !classEl) return;
    var isStudent = roleEl.value === 'เธเธฑเธเน€เธฃเธตเธขเธ';
    classEl.style.display = isStudent ? '' : 'none';
    if (!isStudent) classEl.value = '';
  }
  function getVisitProviderValue(prefix) {
    var name = ((document.getElementById(prefix + '-provider') || {}).value || '').trim();
    if (!name) return '';
    var role = ((document.getElementById(prefix + '-provider-role') || {}).value || '').trim();
    var cls = ((document.getElementById(prefix + '-provider-class') || {}).value || '').trim();
    if (!role) return name;
    if (role === 'เธเธฑเธเน€เธฃเธตเธขเธ' && cls) return name + ' (' + role + ' ' + cls + ')';
    return name + ' (' + role + ')';
  }
  function validateVisitProvider(prefix) {
    var name = ((document.getElementById(prefix + '-provider') || {}).value || '').trim();
    if (!name) return true;
    var role = ((document.getElementById(prefix + '-provider-role') || {}).value || '').trim();
    if (!role) {
      alert('เธเธฃเธธเธ“เธฒเน€เธฅเธทเธญเธเธ•เธณเนเธซเธเนเธเธเธนเนเนเธซเนเธเธฃเธดเธเธฒเธฃ');
      return false;
    }
    if (role === 'เธเธฑเธเน€เธฃเธตเธขเธ') {
      var cls = ((document.getElementById(prefix + '-provider-class') || {}).value || '').trim();
      if (!cls) {
        alert('เธเธฃเธธเธ“เธฒเน€เธฅเธทเธญเธเธเธฑเนเธเน€เธฃเธตเธขเธเธเธญเธเธเธนเนเนเธซเนเธเธฃเธดเธเธฒเธฃ (เธเธฑเธเน€เธฃเธตเธขเธ)');
        return false;
      }
    }
    return true;
  }
  window.toggleVisitProviderExtras = toggleVisitProviderExtras;
  window.onVisitProviderRoleChange = onVisitProviderRoleChange;
  function initApptPageClassSelect() {
    var el = document.getElementById('appt-page-class');
    if (!el) return;
    el.innerHTML = buildClassRoomOptionsHtml(false);
  }
  function getStudentFullClassFromRegistry(id) {
    const tr = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('#section-student tbody tr')).find(function(r) {
      return r.cells[0] && visitIdMatch(r.cells[0].textContent.trim(), id);
    });
    if (!tr || !tr.cells[2]) return '';
    const cls = tr.cells[2].textContent.trim();
    return (cls && cls !== 'โ€”') ? cls : '';
  }
  function getStudentClassFromRegistry(id) {
    const tr = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('#section-student tbody tr')).find(function(r) {
      return r.cells[0] && visitIdMatch(r.cells[0].textContent.trim(), id);
    });
    if (!tr || !tr.cells[2]) return '';
    const cls = tr.cells[2].textContent.trim();
    if (!cls || cls === 'โ€”') return '';
    const m = cls.match(/^(เธก\.\d+)/);
    return m ? m[1] : cls;
  }
  function setSelectByValueOrText(selectId, value) {
    var el = document.getElementById(selectId);
    if (!el || !value) return;
    for (var i = 0; i < el.options.length; i++) {
      if (el.options[i].value === value || el.options[i].text === value) {
        el.value = el.options[i].value;
        return;
      }
    }
  }
  function setNutritionClassSelect(classText) {
    setSelectByValueOrText('nut-class', classText);
  }
  function applyStudentToNutritionForm(id, student) {
    if (!student) return;
    const nameEl = document.getElementById('nut-name');
    const ageEl = document.getElementById('nut-age');
    const sexEl = document.getElementById('nut-sex');
    const weightEl = document.getElementById('nut-weight');
    const heightEl = document.getElementById('nut-height');
    if (nameEl) nameEl.value = student.fullName || '';
    if (sexEl) sexEl.value = student.gender === 'เธ' ? 'เธซเธเธดเธ' : 'เธเธฒเธข';
    const age = calcAgeFromDob(student.dob) || student.age || '';
    if (ageEl) ageEl.value = age;
    setNutritionClassSelect(getStudentClassFromRegistry(id));
    if (weightEl && student.weight) weightEl.value = student.weight;
    if (heightEl && student.height) heightEl.value = student.height;
    calcBMI();
  }
  function fillNutritionFromId() {
    const idEl = document.getElementById('nut-id');
    if (!idEl) return;
    if (getCurrentRole() === 'student' && loggedInStudentId) return;
    const id = (idEl.value || '').trim();
    if (!id) {
      ['nut-name', 'nut-age', 'nut-weight', 'nut-height', 'nut-bmi'].forEach(function(fid) {
        const el = document.getElementById(fid);
        if (el) el.value = '';
      });
      const r = document.getElementById('nut-result');
      if (r) { r.className = 'alert alert-info'; r.textContent = 'เธเธฃเธญเธเธเนเธณเธซเธเธฑเธเนเธฅเธฐเธชเนเธงเธเธชเธนเธเน€เธเธทเนเธญเธ”เธนเธเธฅ'; }
      return;
    }
    const student = (typeof lookupStudent === 'function') ? lookupStudent(id) : null;
    if (student) applyStudentToNutritionForm(id, student);
  }
  function fillStudentNutritionForm() {
    const idEl = document.getElementById('nut-id');
    const nameEl = document.getElementById('nut-name');
    if (!idEl || !nameEl) return;
    const isStudentLogin = getCurrentRole() === 'student' && loggedInStudentId;
    if (isStudentLogin) {
      idEl.value = loggedInStudentId;
      idEl.readOnly = true;
      idEl.classList.add('input-readonly');
      nameEl.readOnly = true;
      nameEl.classList.add('input-readonly');
      const d = (typeof lookupStudent === 'function') ? lookupStudent(loggedInStudentId) : null;
      if (d) applyStudentToNutritionForm(loggedInStudentId, d);
    } else {
      idEl.readOnly = false;
      idEl.classList.remove('input-readonly');
      nameEl.readOnly = false;
      nameEl.classList.remove('input-readonly');
      if (getCurrentRole() === 'teacher') {
        idEl.value = '';
        nameEl.value = '';
      }
    }
  }
  function applyStudentToMentalForm(id, student) {
    if (!student) return;
    var nameEl = document.getElementById('mental-name');
    var ageEl = document.getElementById('mental-age');
    var sexEl = document.getElementById('mental-sex');
    if (nameEl) nameEl.value = student.fullName || '';
    if (sexEl) sexEl.value = student.gender === 'เธ' ? 'เธซเธเธดเธ' : 'เธเธฒเธข';
    var age = calcAgeFromDob(student.dob) || student.age || '';
    if (ageEl) ageEl.value = age;
    setSelectByValueOrText('mental-class', getStudentClassFromRegistry(id));
  }
  function fillMentalFromId() {
    var idEl = document.getElementById('mental-id');
    if (!idEl) return;
    if (getCurrentRole() === 'student' && loggedInStudentId) return;
    var id = (idEl.value || '').trim();
    if (!id) {
      ['mental-name', 'mental-age'].forEach(function(fid) {
        var el = document.getElementById(fid);
        if (el) el.value = '';
      });
      return;
    }
    var student = (typeof lookupStudent === 'function') ? lookupStudent(id) : null;
    if (student) applyStudentToMentalForm(id, student);
  }
  function fillStudentMentalForm() {
    var idEl = document.getElementById('mental-id');
    var nameEl = document.getElementById('mental-name');
    if (!idEl || !nameEl) return;
    var isStudentLogin = getCurrentRole() === 'student' && loggedInStudentId;
    if (isStudentLogin) {
      idEl.value = loggedInStudentId;
      idEl.readOnly = true;
      idEl.classList.add('input-readonly');
      nameEl.readOnly = true;
      nameEl.classList.add('input-readonly');
      var d = (typeof lookupStudent === 'function') ? lookupStudent(loggedInStudentId) : null;
      if (d) applyStudentToMentalForm(loggedInStudentId, d);
    } else {
      idEl.readOnly = false;
      idEl.classList.remove('input-readonly');
      nameEl.readOnly = false;
      nameEl.classList.remove('input-readonly');
      if (getCurrentRole() === 'teacher') {
        idEl.value = '';
        nameEl.value = '';
        var ageEl = document.getElementById('mental-age');
        if (ageEl) ageEl.value = '';
      }
    }
  }
  function renderNutritionFollowup(records) {
    const tbody = document.getElementById('nut-followup-body');
    if (!tbody) return;
    const needFollow = records.filter(r => {
      const c = getNutritionCategory(r.bmi);
      return c && c.followup;
    });
    if (!needFollow.length) {
      tbody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="6" style="text-align:center;color:var(--gray-mid);padding:20px;">เธขเธฑเธเนเธกเนเธกเธตเธฃเธฒเธขเธเธฒเธฃเธ—เธตเนเธ•เนเธญเธเธ•เธดเธ”เธ•เธฒเธก</td></tr>';
      return;
    }
    needFollow.sort((a, b) => (b.savedAt || 0) - (a.savedAt || 0));
    tbody.innerHTML = needFollow.map(r => {
      const c = getNutritionCategory(r.bmi);
      const btnCls = c.badge === 'badge-red' ? 'btn-danger' : 'btn-gold';
      return '<tr><td>' + r.name + '</td><td>' + r.class + '</td><td>' + r.bmi +
        '</td><td><span class="badge ' + c.badge + '">' + c.label + '</span></td><td>' + r.date +
        '</td><td><button type="button" class="btn btn-sm ' + btnCls + '">เธ•เธดเธ”เธ•เธฒเธก</button></td></tr>';
    }).join('');
  }
  function saveNutrition() {
    const id = document.getElementById('nut-id').value.trim();
    const name = document.getElementById('nut-name').value.trim();
    const bmi = document.getElementById('nut-bmi').value.trim();
    if (!id || !name) {
      alert('โ ๏ธ เธเธฃเธธเธ“เธฒเธเธฃเธญเธเน€เธฅเธเธเธฃเธฐเธเธณเธ•เธฑเธงเนเธฅเธฐเธเธทเนเธญ-เธเธฒเธกเธชเธเธธเธฅ');
      document.getElementById('nut-id').focus();
      return;
    }
    if (!bmi) {
      alert('โ ๏ธ เธเธฃเธธเธ“เธฒเธเธฃเธญเธเธเนเธณเธซเธเธฑเธเนเธฅเธฐเธชเนเธงเธเธชเธนเธเน€เธเธทเนเธญเธเธณเธเธงเธ“ BMI');
      document.getElementById('nut-weight').focus();
      return;
    }
    const cat = getNutritionCategory(bmi);
    const record = {
      id: id,
      name: name,
      class: document.getElementById('nut-class').value,
      sex: document.getElementById('nut-sex').value,
      age: document.getElementById('nut-age').value,
      weight: document.getElementById('nut-weight').value,
      height: document.getElementById('nut-height').value,
      bmi: bmi,
      category: cat.label,
      date: new Date().toLocaleDateString('th-TH'),
      savedAt: Date.now()
    };
    let records = [];
    try { records = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('sh-nutrition') || '[]'); } catch (e) {}
    const idx = records.findIndex(r => r.id === id);
    if (idx >= 0) records[idx] = record;
    else records.push(record);
    try { localStorage.setItem('sh-nutrition', JSON.stringify(records)); } catch (e) {}
    renderNutritionFollowup(records);
    syncToSheetQuiet(SHEET_NAMES.nutrition, buildNutritionSheetRow(record));
    alert('โ… เธเธฑเธเธ—เธถเธเธเนเธญเธกเธนเธฅเนเธ เธเธเธฒเธเธฒเธฃเธชเธณเน€เธฃเนเธ!');
    notifyReportDataChanged();
    refreshAllScreeningResultViews(record.id);
  }
  (function loadNutritionRecordsOnInit() {
    let records = [];
    try { records = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('sh-nutrition') || '[]'); } catch (e) {}
    renderNutritionFollowup(records);
  })();

  function loadMentalRecords() {
    try { return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('sh-mental') || '[]'); } catch (e) { return []; }
  }

    'เน€เธเนเธฒเธเธฑเธเธเธนเนเนเธซเธเนเนเธ”เนเธ”เธตเธเธงเนเธฒเน€เธ”เนเธเธงเธฑเธขเน€เธ”เธตเธขเธงเธเธฑเธ',
    'เธเธฅเธฑเธง เธซเธงเธฒเธ”เธเธฅเธฑเธงเธเนเธฒเธข เธเธตเนเธเธฅเธฑเธง',
    'เธกเธตเธชเธกเธฒเธเธดเธ”เธต เธชเธฒเธกเธฒเธฃเธ–เธเธ”เธเนเธญเธเธฑเธเธเธฒเธเนเธ”เนเธเธฒเธ'
  ];
  var MENTAL_SDQ_REVERSE = { 7: 1, 11: 1, 14: 1, 21: 1, 25: 1 };
  var MENTAL_SDQ_SUBSCALES = {
    emotional: [3, 8, 13, 16, 24],
    conduct: [5, 7, 12, 18, 22],
    hyper: [2, 10, 15, 21, 25],
    peer: [6, 11, 14, 19, 23]
  };
  var MENTAL_9Q_ITEMS = [
    'เธฃเธนเนเธชเธถเธเน€เธเธทเนเธญ เนเธกเนเธชเธเนเธเธญเธขเธฒเธเธ—เธณเธญเธฐเนเธฃ',
    'เนเธกเนเธเนเธญเธขเธกเธตเธเธณเธฅเธฑเธเนเธ เธฃเธนเนเธชเธถเธเนเธกเนเธชเธธเธเนเธ',
    'เธเธญเธเธซเธฅเธฑเธเธขเธฒเธ เธซเธฃเธทเธญเธเธญเธเธกเธฒเธเน€เธเธดเธเนเธ',
    'เธฃเธนเนเธชเธถเธเน€เธซเธเธทเนเธญเธขเธเนเธฒเธข เนเธกเนเธเนเธญเธขเธกเธตเนเธฃเธ',
    'เน€เธเธทเนเธญเธญเธฒเธซเธฒเธฃ เธซเธฃเธทเธญเธเธดเธเธกเธฒเธเน€เธเธดเธเนเธ',
    'เธฃเธนเนเธชเธถเธเนเธกเนเธ”เธตเธเธฑเธเธ•เธฑเธงเน€เธญเธ เธเธดเธ”เธงเนเธฒเธ•เธฑเธงเน€เธญเธเธฅเนเธกเน€เธซเธฅเธง',
    'เธชเธกเธฒเธเธดเนเธกเนเธ”เธต เน€เธเนเธ เธ”เธนเนเธ—เธฃเธ—เธฑเธจเธเน เธเธฑเธเธเธเธญเธทเนเธเนเธกเนเธเนเธญเธขเนเธ”เน',
    'เธเธนเธ”เธซเธฃเธทเธญเธ—เธณเธญเธฐเนเธฃเธเนเธฒเธฅเธเธเธเน€เธซเนเธเนเธ”เนเธเธฑเธ”',
    'เธเธดเธ”เธงเนเธฒเธ•เธฒเธขเน€เธชเธตเธขเธ”เธตเธเธงเนเธฒ เธซเธฃเธทเธญเธเธดเธ”เธ—เธณเธฃเนเธฒเธขเธ•เธฑเธงเน€เธญเธ'
  ];
  var MENTAL_ASSIST_ITEMS = [
    { id: 'tobacco', name: 'เธขเธฒเธชเธนเธ (เธเธธเธซเธฃเธตเน เธเธดเธเธฒเธฃเน เนเธเธเน)' },
    { id: 'alcohol', name: 'เน€เธเธฃเธทเนเธญเธเธ”เธทเนเธกเนเธญเธฅเธเธญเธฎเธญเธฅเน' },
    { id: 'cannabis', name: 'เธเธฑเธเธเธฒ' },
    { id: 'drug', name: 'เธขเธฒเธเนเธฒ / เธขเธฒเน€เธชเธเธ•เธดเธ”เธญเธทเนเธเน' }
  ];
  function switchMentalTab(el, contentId) {
    var parent = document.getElementById('mental-tabs');
    if (parent) parent.querySelectorAll('.tab').forEach(function(t) { t.classList.remove('active'); });
    if (el) el.classList.add('active');
    ['mh-sdq', 'mh-9q', 'mh-assist'].forEach(function(i) {
      var d = document.getElementById(i);
      if (d) d.style.display = 'none';
    });
    var target = document.getElementById(contentId);
    if (target) target.style.display = '';
  }
  function buildMentalRadioGroup(name, idx, opts, onchangeFn) {
    return opts.map(function(o) {
      return '<label><input type="radio" name="' + name + '-' + idx + '" value="' + o.v + '" onchange="' + onchangeFn + '()"> ' + o.t + '</label>';
    }).join('');
  }
  function initMentalForms() {
    if (window._mentalFormsReady) return;
    window._mentalFormsReady = true;
    var sdqEl = document.getElementById('sdq-form');
    if (sdqEl) {
      sdqEl.innerHTML = MENTAL_SDQ_ITEMS.map(function(q, i) {
        return '<div class="mh-q-item"><div class="mh-q-text">' + (i + 1) + '. ' + q + '</div><div class="mh-q-opts">' +
          buildMentalRadioGroup('sdq', i + 1, MENTAL_SDQ_OPTS, 'updateSDQResult') + '</div></div>';
      }).join('');
    }
    var nineqEl = document.getElementById('nineq-form');
    if (nineqEl) {
      nineqEl.innerHTML = MENTAL_9Q_ITEMS.map(function(q, i) {
        return '<div class="mh-q-item"><div class="mh-q-text">' + (i + 1) + '. ' + q + '</div><div class="mh-q-opts">' +
          buildMentalRadioGroup('nineq', i + 1, MENTAL_9Q_OPTS, 'update9QResult') + '</div></div>';
      }).join('');
    }
    var assistEl = document.getElementById('assist-form');
    if (assistEl) {
      assistEl.innerHTML = MENTAL_ASSIST_ITEMS.map(function(item, i) {
        return '<div class="mh-assist-block"><div class="mh-assist-title">' + (i + 1) + '. เนเธเธเนเธงเธ 3 เน€เธ”เธทเธญเธเธ—เธตเนเธเนเธฒเธเธกเธฒ เธเธธเธ“เนเธเน ' + item.name + ' เธเนเธญเธขเนเธเนเนเธซเธ?</div><div class="mh-q-opts">' +
          buildMentalRadioGroup('assist-' + item.id, 1, MENTAL_ASSIST_OPTS, 'updateASSISTResult') + '</div></div>';
      }).join('');
    }
  }
  function getMentalRadioScore(prefix, count) {
    var total = 0;
    var answered = 0;
    for (var i = 1; i <= count; i++) {
      var picked = document.querySelector('input[name="' + prefix + '-' + i + '"]:checked');
      if (picked) { total += parseInt(picked.value, 10) || 0; answered++; }
    }
    return { total: total, answered: answered };
  }
  function getSDQItemScore(itemNo) {
    var picked = document.querySelector('input[name="sdq-' + itemNo + '"]:checked');
    if (!picked) return null;
    var v = parseInt(picked.value, 10) || 0;
    return MENTAL_SDQ_REVERSE[itemNo] ? (2 - v) : v;
  }
  function calcSDQScore() {
    var answered = 0;
    for (var i = 1; i <= 25; i++) {
      if (document.querySelector('input[name="sdq-' + i + '"]:checked')) answered++;
    }
    if (answered < 25) return null;
    var sub = { emotional: 0, conduct: 0, hyper: 0, peer: 0 };
    Object.keys(MENTAL_SDQ_SUBSCALES).forEach(function(key) {
      MENTAL_SDQ_SUBSCALES[key].forEach(function(n) {
        sub[key] += getSDQItemScore(n) || 0;
      });
    });
    var total = sub.emotional + sub.conduct + sub.hyper + sub.peer;
    var risk, cls;
    if (total <= 13) { risk = 'เธ•เนเธณ โ€” เธเธเธ•เธด'; cls = 'alert-success'; }
    else if (total <= 16) { risk = 'เธเธฒเธเธเธฅเธฒเธ โ€” เธชเธเธชเธฑเธขเธกเธตเธเธฑเธเธซเธฒ'; cls = 'alert-warning'; }
    else { risk = 'เธชเธนเธ โ€” เธกเธตเธเธฑเธเธซเธฒเธเธฑเธ”เน€เธเธ เธชเนเธเธ•เนเธญ'; cls = 'alert-danger'; }
    return { total: total, sub: sub, risk: risk, cls: cls };
  }
  function updateSDQResult() {
    var box = document.getElementById('sdq-result');
    var text = document.getElementById('sdq-result-text');
    if (!box || !text) return;
    var result = calcSDQScore();
    if (!result) {
      box.className = 'alert alert-info';
      text.textContent = 'เธเธฃเธธเธ“เธฒเธ•เธญเธเธเธณเธ–เธฒเธกเนเธซเนเธเธฃเธเธ—เธธเธเธเนเธญ (' + getMentalRadioScore('sdq', 25).answered + '/25)';
      return;
    }
    box.className = 'alert ' + result.cls;
    text.innerHTML = '<strong>เธเธฐเนเธเธเธเธฑเธเธซเธฒเธฃเธงเธก: ' + result.total + '/40</strong> โ€” ' + result.risk +
      '<div class="mh-score-box">เธญเธฒเธฃเธกเธ“เน: ' + result.sub.emotional + ' ยท เธเธคเธ•เธดเธเธฃเธฃเธกเธเธนเธเนเธ: ' + result.sub.conduct +
      ' ยท เธชเธกเธฒเธเธด: ' + result.sub.hyper + ' ยท เน€เธเธทเนเธญเธ/เธชเธฑเธเธเธก: ' + result.sub.peer + '</div>';
  }
  function calc9QScore() {
    var s = getMentalRadioScore('nineq', 9);
    if (s.answered < 9) return null;
    var q9 = document.querySelector('input[name="nineq-9"]:checked');
    var q9v = q9 ? parseInt(q9.value, 10) : 0;
    var risk, cls;
    if (s.total <= 6) { risk = 'เธ•เนเธณ โ€” เนเธกเนเธกเธตเธ เธฒเธงเธฐเธเธถเธกเน€เธจเธฃเนเธฒ'; cls = 'alert-success'; }
    else if (s.total <= 12) { risk = 'เธเธฒเธเธเธฅเธฒเธ โ€” เธเธถเธกเน€เธจเธฃเนเธฒเน€เธฅเนเธเธเนเธญเธข'; cls = 'alert-warning'; }
    else if (s.total <= 18) { risk = 'เธเธฒเธเธเธฅเธฒเธโ€“เธชเธนเธ โ€” เธเธถเธกเน€เธจเธฃเนเธฒเธเธฒเธเธเธฅเธฒเธ'; cls = 'alert-warning'; }
    else { risk = 'เธชเธนเธ โ€” เธเธถเธกเน€เธจเธฃเนเธฒเธฃเธธเธเนเธฃเธ เธชเนเธเธ•เนเธญเนเธเธ—เธขเน'; cls = 'alert-danger'; }
    if (q9v >= 2) { risk = 'เธชเธนเธ โ€” เน€เธชเธตเนเธขเธเธ—เธณเธฃเนเธฒเธขเธ•เธฑเธงเน€เธญเธ เธชเนเธเธ•เนเธญเธ—เธฑเธเธ—เธต'; cls = 'alert-danger'; }
    return { total: s.total, q9: q9v, risk: risk, cls: cls };
  }
  function update9QResult() {
    var box = document.getElementById('nineq-result');
    var text = document.getElementById('nineq-result-text');
    if (!box || !text) return;
    var result = calc9QScore();
    if (!result) {
      box.className = 'alert alert-info';
      text.textContent = 'เธเธฃเธธเธ“เธฒเธ•เธญเธเธเธณเธ–เธฒเธกเนเธซเนเธเธฃเธเธ—เธธเธเธเนเธญ (' + getMentalRadioScore('nineq', 9).answered + '/9)';
      return;
    }
    box.className = 'alert ' + result.cls;
    text.innerHTML = '<strong>เธเธฐเนเธเธเธฃเธงเธก: ' + result.total + '/27</strong> โ€” ' + result.risk +
      (result.q9 >= 2 ? '<div class="mh-score-box">โ ๏ธ เธเนเธญ 9 เธเธฐเนเธเธ ' + result.q9 + ' โ€” เธ•เนเธญเธเธเธฃเธฐเธชเธฒเธเธชเนเธเธ•เนเธญเธ—เธฑเธเธ—เธต</div>' : '');
  }
  function calcASSISTScore() {
    var total = 0;
    var answered = 0;
    var details = [];
    MENTAL_ASSIST_ITEMS.forEach(function(item) {
      var picked = document.querySelector('input[name="assist-' + item.id + '-1"]:checked');
      if (picked) {
        var v = parseInt(picked.value, 10) || 0;
        total += v;
        answered++;
        if (v > 0) details.push(item.name + ' (' + v + ')');
      }
    });
    if (answered < MENTAL_ASSIST_ITEMS.length) return null;
    var risk, cls;
    if (total === 0) { risk = 'เธ•เนเธณ โ€” เนเธกเนเน€เธเธขเนเธเนเธชเธฒเธฃเน€เธชเธเธ•เธดเธ”'; cls = 'alert-success'; }
    else if (total <= 10) { risk = 'เธเธฒเธเธเธฅเธฒเธ โ€” เนเธซเนเธเธณเธเธฃเธถเธเธฉเธฒเนเธฅเธฐเธ•เธดเธ”เธ•เธฒเธก'; cls = 'alert-warning'; }
    else { risk = 'เธชเธนเธ โ€” เธชเนเธเธ•เนเธญเธเธณเธเธฑเธ”/เนเธเธ—เธขเน'; cls = 'alert-danger'; }
    return { total: total, details: details, risk: risk, cls: cls };
  }
  function updateASSISTResult() {
    var box = document.getElementById('assist-result');
    var text = document.getElementById('assist-result-text');
    if (!box || !text) return;
    var result = calcASSISTScore();
    if (!result) {
      box.className = 'alert alert-info';
      var done = 0;
      MENTAL_ASSIST_ITEMS.forEach(function(item) {
        if (document.querySelector('input[name="assist-' + item.id + '-1"]:checked')) done++;
      });
      text.textContent = 'เธเธฃเธธเธ“เธฒเธ•เธญเธเธเธณเธ–เธฒเธกเนเธซเนเธเธฃเธเธ—เธธเธเธเนเธญ (' + done + '/' + MENTAL_ASSIST_ITEMS.length + ')';
      return;
    }
    box.className = 'alert ' + result.cls;
    text.innerHTML = '<strong>เธเธฐเนเธเธเธฃเธงเธก: ' + result.total + '</strong> โ€” ' + result.risk +
      (result.details.length ? '<div class="mh-score-box">เธเธเธเธฒเธฃเนเธเน: ' + result.details.join(', ') + '</div>' : '<div class="mh-score-box">เนเธกเนเธเธเธเธฒเธฃเนเธเนเธชเธฒเธฃเน€เธชเธเธ•เธดเธ”</div>');
  }
  function getMentalStudentInfo() {
    var id = (document.getElementById('mental-id').value || '').trim();
    var name = (document.getElementById('mental-name').value || '').trim();
    if (!id || !name) {
      alert('โ ๏ธ เธเธฃเธธเธ“เธฒเธเธฃเธญเธเน€เธฅเธเธเธฃเธฐเธเธณเธ•เธฑเธงเนเธฅเธฐเธเธทเนเธญ-เธเธฒเธกเธชเธเธธเธฅ');
      document.getElementById('mental-id').focus();
      return null;
    }
    return {
      id: id,
      name: name,
      class: (document.getElementById('mental-class') || {}).value || '',
      sex: (document.getElementById('mental-sex') || {}).value || '',
      age: (document.getElementById('mental-age') || {}).value || ''
    };
  }
  function renderMentalRecords() {
    var tbody = document.getElementById('mental-records-body');
    if (!tbody) return;
    var records = loadMentalRecords();
    var scopeId = (typeof getLimitedUserScopeId === 'function') ? getLimitedUserScopeId() : '';
    if (scopeId) records = records.filter(function(r) { return visitIdMatch(r.id, scopeId); });
    if (!records.length) {
      tbody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="6" style="text-align:center;color:var(--gray-mid);padding:18px;">เธขเธฑเธเนเธกเนเธกเธตเธเธฅเธเธฑเธ”เธเธฃเธญเธเธชเธธเธเธ เธฒเธเธเธดเธ•</td></tr>';
      return;
    }
    tbody.innerHTML = records.slice().sort(function(a, b) { return (b.savedAt || 0) - (a.savedAt || 0); }).slice(0, 50).map(function(r) {
      var badge = (r.risk || '').indexOf('เธชเธนเธ') !== -1 ? 'badge-red' : ((r.risk || '').indexOf('เธเธฒเธเธเธฅเธฒเธ') !== -1 ? 'badge-gold' : 'badge-green');
      return '<tr><td>' + escVisitHtml(r.recordedAt || 'โ€”') + '</td><td>' + escVisitHtml(r.id) + '</td><td>' + escVisitHtml(r.name) +
        '</td><td>' + escVisitHtml(r.tool || 'โ€”') + '</td><td>' + escVisitHtml(r.score != null ? r.score : 'โ€”') +
        '</td><td><span class="badge ' + badge + '">' + escVisitHtml(r.risk || 'โ€”') + '</span></td></tr>';
    }).join('');
  }
  function saveMentalAssessment(type) {
    var info = getMentalStudentInfo();
    if (!info) return;
    var tool = '', score = '', risk = '', detail = {}, result;
    if (type === 'sdq') {
      result = calcSDQScore();
      if (!result) { alert('โ ๏ธ เธเธฃเธธเธ“เธฒเธ•เธญเธเธเธณเธ–เธฒเธก SDQ เนเธซเนเธเธฃเธ 25 เธเนเธญ'); return; }
      tool = 'SDQ (เธเธคเธ•เธดเธเธฃเธฃเธก)';
      score = result.total;
      risk = result.risk;
      detail = { subscales: result.sub };
    } else if (type === '9q') {
      result = calc9QScore();
      if (!result) { alert('โ ๏ธ เธเธฃเธธเธ“เธฒเธ•เธญเธเธเธณเธ–เธฒเธก 9Q เนเธซเนเธเธฃเธ 9 เธเนเธญ'); return; }
      tool = 'เธเธฑเธ”เธเธฃเธญเธเธเธถเธกเน€เธจเธฃเนเธฒ (9Q)';
      score = result.total;
      risk = result.risk;
      detail = { q9: result.q9 };
      if (result.q9 >= 2) alert('๐จ เธเธเธเธงเธฒเธกเน€เธชเธตเนเธขเธเธ—เธณเธฃเนเธฒเธขเธ•เธฑเธงเน€เธญเธ โ€” เธเธฃเธธเธ“เธฒเธเธฃเธฐเธชเธฒเธเธชเนเธเธ•เนเธญเธ—เธฑเธเธ—เธต');
    } else if (type === 'assist') {
      result = calcASSISTScore();
      if (!result) { alert('โ ๏ธ เธเธฃเธธเธ“เธฒเธ•เธญเธเธเธณเธ–เธฒเธก ASSIST เนเธซเนเธเธฃเธเธ—เธธเธเธชเธฒเธฃ'); return; }
      tool = 'ASSIST (เธชเธฒเธฃเน€เธชเธเธ•เธดเธ”)';
      score = result.total;
      risk = result.risk;
      detail = { substances: result.details };
    } else return;
    var now = new Date();
    var record = {
      id: info.id,
      name: info.name,
      class: info.class,
      sex: info.sex,
      age: info.age,
      type: type,
      tool: tool,
      score: score,
      risk: risk,
      detail: detail,
      recordedAt: now.toLocaleString('th-TH'),
      savedAt: now.getTime()
    };
    var records = loadMentalRecords();
    records.unshift(record);
    try { localStorage.setItem('sh-mental', JSON.stringify(records)); } catch (e) {}
    renderMentalRecords();
    refreshAllScreeningResultViews(record.id);
    if (typeof syncMentalToSheetQuiet === 'function') {
      syncMentalToSheetQuiet(record, type);
    }
    alert('โ… เธเธฑเธเธ—เธถเธเธเธฅ' + tool + ' เธชเธณเน€เธฃเนเธ!');
  }

  // ===== เธเธฑเธเธ—เธถเธเธงเธฑเธเธเธตเธ โ’ เนเธชเธ”เธเน€เธเธเธฒเธฐเธเธฃเธน / เธเธขเธฒเธเธฒเธฅ / เธเธนเนเธเธฃเธดเธซเธฒเธฃ =====
  function formatVacDate(iso) {
    if (!iso) return 'โ€”';
    const p = iso.split('-');
    if (p.length !== 3) return iso;
    return parseInt(p[2], 10) + '/' + parseInt(p[1], 10) + '/' + (parseInt(p[0], 10) + 543);
  }
  function renderVaccineRecords(records) {
    const tbody = document.getElementById('vaccine-records-body');
    if (!tbody) return;
    if (!records.length) {
      tbody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="5" style="text-align:center;color:var(--gray-mid);padding:18px;">เธขเธฑเธเนเธกเนเธกเธตเธฃเธฒเธขเธเธฒเธฃเธเธฑเธเธ—เธถเธ</td></tr>';
      return;
    }
    const sorted = records.slice().sort(function(a, b) { return (b.savedAt || 0) - (a.savedAt || 0); });
    tbody.innerHTML = sorted.map(function(r) {
      return '<tr><td>' + formatVacDate(r.date) + '</td><td>' + r.id + '</td><td>' + r.name +
        '</td><td>' + r.vaccine + '</td><td>' + r.recordedAt + '</td></tr>';
    }).join('');
  }
  function renderStudentVaccineHistory() {
    const tbody = document.getElementById('vaccine-student-history-body');
    const scopeId = getLimitedUserScopeId();
    if (!tbody || !scopeId) return;
    let records = [];
    try { records = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('sh-vaccine') || '[]'); } catch (e) {}
    const mine = records.filter(function(r) { return visitIdMatch(r.id, scopeId); })
      .sort(function(a, b) { return (b.savedAt || 0) - (a.savedAt || 0); });
    if (!mine.length) {
      tbody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="3" style="text-align:center;color:var(--gray-mid);padding:16px;">เธขเธฑเธเนเธกเนเธกเธตเธเธฃเธฐเธงเธฑเธ•เธดเธเธฒเธฃเธฃเธฑเธเธงเธฑเธเธเธตเธ</td></tr>';
      return;
    }
    tbody.innerHTML = mine.map(function(r) {
      return '<tr><td>' + formatVacDate(r.date) + '</td><td>' + r.vaccine + '</td><td>' + r.recordedAt + '</td></tr>';
    }).join('');
  }
  function showScreeningPreview(previewId, textId, cls, text) {
    var box = document.getElementById(previewId);
    var txt = document.getElementById(textId);
    if (!box || !txt) return;
    if (!text) { box.style.display = 'none'; return; }
    box.className = 'alert ' + cls;
    box.style.display = '';
    txt.textContent = text;
  }
  function setAutoScreeningSelect(selectId, value) {
    var el = document.getElementById(selectId);
    if (!el) return '';
    for (var i = 0; i < el.options.length; i++) {
      if (el.options[i].value === value || el.options[i].text === value) {
        el.selectedIndex = i;
        return el.options[i].text;
      }
    }
    return value || '';
  }
  var SNELLEN_ROWS = [200, 100, 70, 50, 40, 30, 25, 20, 15];
  function parseSnellenDenominator(va) {
    var m = String(va || '').trim().match(/(\d+)\s*\/\s*(\d+)/);
    return m ? parseInt(m[2], 10) : null;
  }
  function snellenRowIndex(den) {
    var i = SNELLEN_ROWS.indexOf(den);
    if (i >= 0) return i;
    for (i = 0; i < SNELLEN_ROWS.length; i++) {
      if (SNELLEN_ROWS[i] <= den) return i;
    }
    return SNELLEN_ROWS.length - 1;
  }
  function evaluateVisionResult(vaR, vaL) {
    var r = parseSnellenDenominator(vaR);
    var l = parseSnellenDenominator(vaL);
    if (!r || !l) return null;
    var abnormal = r > 30 || l > 30 || Math.abs(snellenRowIndex(r) - snellenRowIndex(l)) >= 2;
    return abnormal ? 'เธเธดเธ”เธเธเธ•เธด (<20/30) โ€” เธชเนเธเธ•เนเธญเธเธฑเธเธฉเธธเนเธเธ—เธขเน' : 'เธเธเธ•เธด (โฅ20/30)';
  }
  function updateVisionResult() {
    var vaR = (document.getElementById('scr-vis-va-r') || {}).value || '';
    var vaL = (document.getElementById('scr-vis-va-l') || {}).value || '';
    var result = evaluateVisionResult(vaR, vaL);
    if (!result) {
      setAutoScreeningSelect('scr-vis-result', 'pending');
      showScreeningPreview('scr-vis-result-preview', 'scr-vis-result-preview-text', 'alert-info',
        'เธเธฃเธญเธเธเนเธฒเธ•เธฃเธงเธเธชเธฒเธขเธ•เธฒ (VA) เธ—เธฑเนเธเธชเธญเธเธเนเธฒเธ เน€เธเนเธ 20/20 เน€เธเธทเนเธญเธเธณเธเธงเธ“เธเธฅเธญเธฑเธ•เนเธเธกเธฑเธ•เธด');
      return;
    }
    setAutoScreeningSelect('scr-vis-result', result);
    var isNormal = result.indexOf('เธเธเธ•เธด') === 0;
    showScreeningPreview('scr-vis-result-preview', 'scr-vis-result-preview-text',
      isNormal ? 'alert-success' : 'alert-danger',
      (isNormal ? 'โ… ' : 'โ ') + result + ' โ€” เธ•เธฒเธเธงเธฒ ' + vaR.trim() + ' ยท เธ•เธฒเธเนเธฒเธข ' + vaL.trim());
  }
  function updateHearingResult() {
    var right = (document.getElementById('hear-right') || {}).value || '';
    var left = (document.getElementById('hear-left') || {}).value || '';
    var abnormal = right.indexOf('เนเธกเนเนเธ”เนเธขเธดเธ') !== -1 || left.indexOf('เนเธกเนเนเธ”เนเธขเธดเธ') !== -1;
    var result = abnormal ? 'เธชเธเธชเธฑเธขเธเธดเธ”เธเธเธ•เธด โ’ เธชเนเธเนเธเธ—เธขเน' : 'เธเธเธ•เธด';
    setAutoScreeningSelect('hear-result', result);
    showScreeningPreview('hear-result-preview', 'hear-result-preview-text',
      abnormal ? 'alert-danger' : 'alert-success',
      (abnormal ? 'โ ' : 'โ… ') + result + ' โ€” เธซเธนเธเธงเธฒ: ' + right + ' ยท เธซเธนเธเนเธฒเธข: ' + left);
  }
  function parseBloodNumericValue(raw) {
    var m = String(raw || '').replace(/,/g, '.').match(/(\d+(?:\.\d+)?)/);
    return m ? parseFloat(m[1]) : null;
  }
  function evaluateBloodResult(valueRaw, method, sex) {
    var v = parseBloodNumericValue(valueRaw);
    if (v === null || isNaN(v)) return null;
    var methodText = method || '';
    if (methodText.indexOf('Hct') !== -1 || (v > 50 && methodText.indexOf('Hb') === -1 && methodText.indexOf('CBC') === -1)) {
      if (v >= 36) return 'เธเธเธ•เธด';
      if (v >= 30) return 'เนเธฅเธซเธดเธ•เธเธฒเธ โ€” เนเธซเนเธขเธฒเน€เธชเธฃเธดเธกเธเธฒเธ•เธธเน€เธซเธฅเนเธ';
      return 'เนเธฅเธซเธดเธ•เธเธฒเธเธฃเธธเธเนเธฃเธ โ€” เธชเนเธเธ•เนเธญ';
    }
    var threshold = (sex === 'เธซเธเธดเธ') ? 12 : 12;
    if (v >= threshold) return 'เธเธเธ•เธด';
    if (v >= 10) return 'เนเธฅเธซเธดเธ•เธเธฒเธ โ€” เนเธซเนเธขเธฒเน€เธชเธฃเธดเธกเธเธฒเธ•เธธเน€เธซเธฅเนเธ';
    return 'เนเธฅเธซเธดเธ•เธเธฒเธเธฃเธธเธเนเธฃเธ โ€” เธชเนเธเธ•เนเธญ';
  }
  function updateBloodResult() {
    var valueRaw = (document.getElementById('blood-value') || {}).value || '';
    var method = (document.getElementById('blood-method') || {}).value || '';
    var sex = (document.getElementById('blood-sex') || {}).value || '';
    var result = evaluateBloodResult(valueRaw, method, sex);
    if (!result) {
      setAutoScreeningSelect('blood-result', 'pending');
      showScreeningPreview('blood-result-preview', 'blood-result-preview-text', 'alert-info',
        'เธเธฃเธญเธเธเนเธฒเธ—เธตเนเธ•เธฃเธงเธเนเธ”เน (เน€เธเนเธ Hb 12.5 g/dL) เน€เธเธทเนเธญเธ•เธตเธเธงเธฒเธกเธเธฅเธญเธฑเธ•เนเธเธกเธฑเธ•เธด');
      return;
    }
    setAutoScreeningSelect('blood-result', result);
    var isNormal = result === 'เธเธเธ•เธด';
    showScreeningPreview('blood-result-preview', 'blood-result-preview-text',
      isNormal ? 'alert-success' : (result.indexOf('เธฃเธธเธเนเธฃเธ') !== -1 ? 'alert-danger' : 'alert-warning'),
      (isNormal ? 'โ… ' : 'โ ๏ธ ') + result + ' (เธเนเธฒเธ—เธตเนเนเธ”เน: ' + valueRaw.trim() + ')');
  }
  function updateOralResult() {
    var findings = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.oral-finding:checked')).map(function(cb) { return cb.value; });
    if (!findings.length) {
      showScreeningPreview('oral-result-preview', 'oral-result-preview-text', 'alert-info', 'เน€เธฅเธทเธญเธเธฃเธฒเธขเธเธฒเธฃเธ—เธตเนเธเธเธเธฒเธเธเธฒเธฃเธ•เธฃเธงเธเธเนเธญเธเธเธฒเธ');
      return;
    }
    var normalOnly = findings.length === 1 && findings[0] === 'เธเธเธ•เธด เนเธกเนเธเธเธเธงเธฒเธกเธเธดเธ”เธเธเธ•เธด';
    var summary = normalOnly ? 'เธเธเธ•เธด โ€” เนเธกเนเธเธเธเธงเธฒเธกเธเธดเธ”เธเธเธ•เธด' : 'เธเธ: ' + findings.join(', ');
    showScreeningPreview('oral-result-preview', 'oral-result-preview-text',
      normalOnly ? 'alert-success' : 'alert-warning', (normalOnly ? 'โ… ' : 'โ ๏ธ ') + summary);
  }
  function screeningPrefixFromInputId(inputId) {
    if (inputId === 'scr-vis-id') return 'scr-vis';
    if (inputId && inputId.endsWith('-id')) return inputId.replace(/-id$/, '');
    return null;
  }
  function applyStudentToScreeningFields(prefix, id, student) {
    if (!student || !prefix) return;
    var nameEl = document.getElementById(prefix + '-name');
    var sexEl = document.getElementById(prefix + '-sex');
    var ageEl = document.getElementById(prefix + '-age');
    if (nameEl) nameEl.value = student.fullName || '';
    if (sexEl) sexEl.value = student.gender === 'เธ' ? 'เธซเธเธดเธ' : 'เธเธฒเธข';
    var age = calcAgeFromDob(student.dob) || student.age || '';
    if (ageEl) ageEl.value = age;
    setSelectByValueOrText(prefix + '-class', getStudentClassFromRegistry(id));
  }
  function fillScreeningFromId(input) {
    if (!input || !input.id) return;
    if (getCurrentRole() === 'student' && loggedInStudentId) return;
    var prefix = screeningPrefixFromInputId(input.id);
    var id = (input.value || '').trim();
    if (!prefix) return;
    if (!id) {
      ['-name', '-age'].forEach(function(s) {
        var el = document.getElementById(prefix + s);
        if (el) el.value = '';
      });
      return;
    }
    if (typeof lookupStudent !== 'function') return;
    var student = lookupStudent(id);
    if (student) {
      applyStudentToScreeningFields(prefix, id, student);
      if (prefix === 'scr-vis') updateVisionResult();
      if (prefix === 'blood') updateBloodResult();
    }
  }
  var SCREENING_FORM_IDS = [
    { id: 'scr-vis-id', name: 'scr-vis-name', prefix: 'scr-vis' },
    { id: 'hear-id', name: 'hear-name', prefix: 'hear' },
    { id: 'blood-id', name: 'blood-name', prefix: 'blood' },
    { id: 'oral-id', name: 'oral-name', prefix: 'oral' },
    { id: 'phys-id', name: 'phys-name', prefix: 'phys' }
  ];
  function fillStudentScreeningForms() {
    var isStudentLogin = getCurrentRole() === 'student' && loggedInStudentId;
    var d = (isStudentLogin && typeof lookupStudent === 'function') ? lookupStudent(loggedInStudentId) : null;
    SCREENING_FORM_IDS.forEach(function(row) {
      var idEl = document.getElementById(row.id);
      var nameEl = document.getElementById(row.name);
      if (isStudentLogin) {
        if (idEl) { idEl.value = loggedInStudentId; idEl.readOnly = true; idEl.classList.add('input-readonly'); }
        if (nameEl) { nameEl.readOnly = true; nameEl.classList.add('input-readonly'); }
        if (d) applyStudentToScreeningFields(row.prefix, loggedInStudentId, d);
      } else {
        if (idEl) { idEl.readOnly = false; idEl.classList.remove('input-readonly'); }
        if (nameEl) { nameEl.readOnly = false; nameEl.classList.remove('input-readonly'); }
        if (getCurrentRole() === 'teacher') {
          if (idEl) idEl.value = '';
          if (nameEl) nameEl.value = '';
        }
      }
    });
    updateVisionResult();
    updateHearingResult();
  }
  function getScreeningSelectText(selectId) {
    var el = document.getElementById(selectId);
    if (!el || el.selectedIndex < 0) return '';
    var opt = el.options[el.selectedIndex];
    if (!opt || opt.value === 'pending') return '';
    return opt.text || opt.value;
  }
  function loadScreeningRecords() {
    try { return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('sh-screening') || '[]'); } catch (e) { return []; }
  }
  function addScreeningRecord(record) {
    var records = loadScreeningRecords();
    records.unshift(record);
    try { localStorage.setItem('sh-screening', JSON.stringify(records)); } catch (e) {}
    renderScreeningRecords();
    refreshAllScreeningResultViews(record.id);
    notifyReportDataChanged();
  }
  function renderScreeningRecords() {
    var tbody = document.getElementById('screening-records-body');
    if (!tbody) return;
    var records = loadScreeningRecords();
    var scopeId = (typeof getLimitedUserScopeId === 'function') ? getLimitedUserScopeId() : '';
    if (scopeId) records = records.filter(function(r) { return visitIdMatch(r.id, scopeId); });
    if (!records.length) {
      tbody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="6" style="text-align:center;color:var(--gray-mid);padding:18px;">เธขเธฑเธเนเธกเนเธกเธตเธเธฅเธ•เธฃเธงเธเธชเธธเธเธ เธฒเธ</td></tr>';
      return;
    }
    var labels = { vision: 'เธชเธฒเธขเธ•เธฒ', hearing: 'เธเธฒเธฃเนเธ”เนเธขเธดเธ', blood: 'เนเธฅเธซเธดเธ•เธเธฒเธ', oral: 'เธเนเธญเธเธเธฒเธ', physical: 'เธฃเนเธฒเธเธเธฒเธข' };
    tbody.innerHTML = records.slice().sort(function(a, b) { return (b.savedAt || 0) - (a.savedAt || 0); }).slice(0, 50).map(function(r) {
      var badge = (r.summary || '').indexOf('เธเธดเธ”เธเธเธ•เธด') !== -1 || (r.summary || '').indexOf('เธชเธเธชเธฑเธข') !== -1 ? 'badge-red' : 'badge-green';
      return '<tr><td>' + (r.recordedAt || 'โ€”') + '</td><td>' + (labels[r.type] || r.type) + '</td><td>' + r.id +
        '</td><td>' + r.name + '</td><td>' + (r.class || 'โ€”') + '</td><td><span class="badge ' + badge + '">' + (r.summary || 'โ€”') + '</span></td></tr>';
    }).join('');
  }
  function saveScreeningVision() {
    var id = (document.getElementById('scr-vis-id').value || '').trim();
    var name = (document.getElementById('scr-vis-name').value || '').trim();
    if (!id || !name) { alert('โ ๏ธ เธเธฃเธธเธ“เธฒเธเธฃเธญเธเน€เธฅเธเธเธฃเธฐเธเธณเธ•เธฑเธงเนเธฅเธฐเธเธทเนเธญ-เธเธฒเธกเธชเธเธธเธฅ'); return; }
    updateVisionResult();
    var result = getScreeningSelectText('scr-vis-result');
    if (!result) { alert('โ ๏ธ เธเธฃเธธเธ“เธฒเธเธฃเธญเธเธเนเธฒเธ•เธฃเธงเธเธชเธฒเธขเธ•เธฒเธ—เธฑเนเธเธชเธญเธเธเนเธฒเธ'); return; }
    var now = new Date();
    addScreeningRecord({
      type: 'vision', id: id, name: name,
      class: (document.getElementById('scr-vis-class') || {}).value || '',
      summary: result, recordedAt: now.toLocaleString('th-TH'), savedAt: now.getTime(),
      detail: { vaRight: (document.getElementById('scr-vis-va-r').value || '').trim(), vaLeft: (document.getElementById('scr-vis-va-l').value || '').trim() }
    });
    document.getElementById('scr-vis-va-r').value = '';
    document.getElementById('scr-vis-va-l').value = '';
    updateVisionResult();
    alert('โ… เธเธฑเธเธ—เธถเธเธเธฅเธ•เธฃเธงเธเธชเธฒเธขเธ•เธฒเธชเธณเน€เธฃเนเธ!');
  }
  function saveScreeningHearing() {
    var id = (document.getElementById('hear-id').value || '').trim();
    var name = (document.getElementById('hear-name').value || '').trim();
    if (!id || !name) { alert('โ ๏ธ เธเธฃเธธเธ“เธฒเธเธฃเธญเธเน€เธฅเธเธเธฃเธฐเธเธณเธ•เธฑเธงเนเธฅเธฐเธเธทเนเธญ-เธเธฒเธกเธชเธเธธเธฅ'); return; }
    updateHearingResult();
    var result = getScreeningSelectText('hear-result');
    var now = new Date();
    addScreeningRecord({
      type: 'hearing', id: id, name: name,
      class: (document.getElementById('hear-class') || {}).value || '',
      summary: result, recordedAt: now.toLocaleString('th-TH'), savedAt: now.getTime(),
      detail: {
        right: (document.getElementById('hear-right') || {}).value || '',
        left: (document.getElementById('hear-left') || {}).value || '',
        method: (document.getElementById('hear-method') || {}).value || ''
      }
    });
    alert('โ… เธเธฑเธเธ—เธถเธเธเธฅเธ•เธฃเธงเธเธเธฒเธฃเนเธ”เนเธขเธดเธเธชเธณเน€เธฃเนเธ!');
  }
  function saveScreeningBlood() {
    var id = (document.getElementById('blood-id').value || '').trim();
    var name = (document.getElementById('blood-name').value || '').trim();
    if (!id || !name) { alert('โ ๏ธ เธเธฃเธธเธ“เธฒเธเธฃเธญเธเน€เธฅเธเธเธฃเธฐเธเธณเธ•เธฑเธงเนเธฅเธฐเธเธทเนเธญ-เธเธฒเธกเธชเธเธธเธฅ'); return; }
    updateBloodResult();
    var result = getScreeningSelectText('blood-result');
    if (!result) { alert('โ ๏ธ เธเธฃเธธเธ“เธฒเธเธฃเธญเธเธเนเธฒเธ—เธตเนเธ•เธฃเธงเธเนเธ”เน'); return; }
    var now = new Date();
    addScreeningRecord({
      type: 'blood', id: id, name: name,
      class: (document.getElementById('blood-class') || {}).value || '',
      summary: result, recordedAt: now.toLocaleString('th-TH'), savedAt: now.getTime(),
      detail: {
        value: (document.getElementById('blood-value') || {}).value || '',
        method: (document.getElementById('blood-method') || {}).value || ''
      }
    });
    document.getElementById('blood-value').value = '';
    updateBloodResult();
    alert('โ… เธเธฑเธเธ—เธถเธเธเธฅเธเธฑเธ”เธเธฃเธญเธเนเธฅเธซเธดเธ•เธเธฒเธเธชเธณเน€เธฃเนเธ!');
  }
  function saveScreeningOral() {
    var id = (document.getElementById('oral-id').value || '').trim();
    var name = (document.getElementById('oral-name').value || '').trim();
    if (!id || !name) { alert('โ ๏ธ เธเธฃเธธเธ“เธฒเธเธฃเธญเธเน€เธฅเธเธเธฃเธฐเธเธณเธ•เธฑเธงเนเธฅเธฐเธเธทเนเธญ-เธเธฒเธกเธชเธเธธเธฅ'); return; }
    var findings = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.oral-finding:checked')).map(function(cb) { return cb.value; });
    if (!findings.length) { alert('โ ๏ธ เธเธฃเธธเธ“เธฒเน€เธฅเธทเธญเธเธเธฅเธเธฒเธฃเธ•เธฃเธงเธเธเนเธญเธเธเธฒเธ'); return; }
    updateOralResult();
    var summary = findings.length === 1 && findings[0] === 'เธเธเธ•เธด เนเธกเนเธเธเธเธงเธฒเธกเธเธดเธ”เธเธเธ•เธด' ? 'เธเธเธ•เธด' : findings.join(', ');
    var now = new Date();
    addScreeningRecord({
      type: 'oral', id: id, name: name,
      class: (document.getElementById('oral-class') || {}).value || '',
      summary: summary, recordedAt: now.toLocaleString('th-TH'), savedAt: now.getTime(),
      detail: { findings: findings, note: (document.getElementById('oral-note') || {}).value || '' }
    });
    document.querySelectorAll('.oral-finding').forEach(function(cb) { cb.checked = false; });
    updateOralResult();
    alert('โ… เธเธฑเธเธ—เธถเธเธเธฅเธ•เธฃเธงเธเธเนเธญเธเธเธฒเธเธชเธณเน€เธฃเนเธ!');
  }
  function saveScreeningPhysical() {
    var id = (document.getElementById('phys-id').value || '').trim();
    var name = (document.getElementById('phys-name').value || '').trim();
    if (!id || !name) { alert('โ ๏ธ เธเธฃเธธเธ“เธฒเธเธฃเธญเธเน€เธฅเธเธเธฃเธฐเธเธณเธ•เธฑเธงเนเธฅเธฐเธเธทเนเธญ-เธเธฒเธกเธชเธเธธเธฅ'); return; }
    var note = (document.getElementById('phys-note') || {}).value || '';
    var checked = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('#phys-checklist .check-box.checked')).length;
    if (!note.trim() && !checked) { alert('โ ๏ธ เธเธฃเธธเธ“เธฒเน€เธฅเธทเธญเธเธ—เนเธฒเธ—เธตเนเธ•เธฃเธงเธเธซเธฃเธทเธญเธเธฑเธเธ—เธถเธเธชเธฃเธธเธเธเธฅ'); return; }
    var now = new Date();
    addScreeningRecord({
      type: 'physical', id: id, name: name,
      class: (document.getElementById('phys-class') || {}).value || '',
      summary: note.trim() || ('เธ•เธฃเธงเธเธเธฃเธ ' + checked + ' เธ—เนเธฒ'),
      recordedAt: now.toLocaleString('th-TH'), savedAt: now.getTime(),
      detail: { checked: checked, note: note.trim() }
    });
    alert('โ… เธเธฑเธเธ—เธถเธเธเธฅเธ•เธฃเธงเธเธฃเนเธฒเธเธเธฒเธขเธชเธณเน€เธฃเนเธ!');
  }
  function fillStudentVaccineForm() {
    if (!isLimitedUser()) return;
    const isStudentLogin = getCurrentRole() === 'student' && loggedInStudentId;
    setLimitedUserFieldMode(!!isStudentLogin);
    const idEl = document.getElementById('vac-stu-id');
    const nameEl = document.getElementById('vac-stu-name');
    if (isStudentLogin) {
      const d = (typeof lookupStudent === 'function') ? lookupStudent(loggedInStudentId) : null;
      if (idEl) idEl.value = loggedInStudentId;
      if (nameEl) nameEl.value = (d && d.fullName) ? d.fullName : '';
    } else if (getCurrentRole() === 'teacher') {
      if (idEl) idEl.value = '';
      if (nameEl) nameEl.value = '';
    }
    renderStudentVaccineHistory();
    renderVaccineSchedule();
  }
  function addVaccineRecord(id, name, vaccine, date) {
    const record = {
      id: id,
      name: name,
      vaccine: vaccine,
      date: date,
      recordedAt: new Date().toLocaleString('th-TH'),
      savedAt: Date.now()
    };
    let records = [];
    try { records = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('sh-vaccine') || '[]'); } catch (e) {}
    records.unshift(record);
    try { localStorage.setItem('sh-vaccine', JSON.stringify(records)); } catch (e) {}
    renderVaccineRecords(records);
    renderStudentVaccineHistory();
    syncToSheetQuiet(SHEET_NAMES.vaccine, buildVaccineSheetRow(record));
    notifyReportDataChanged();
    return records;
  }
  function fillVaccineFromId() {
    const id = (document.getElementById('vac-id').value || '').trim();
    if (!id || typeof STUDENT_BASIC === 'undefined') return;
    const d = lookupStudent(id);
    if (d && d.fullName) document.getElementById('vac-name').value = d.fullName;
  }
  function saveVaccine() {
    const id = (document.getElementById('vac-id').value || '').trim();
    const name = (document.getElementById('vac-name').value || '').trim();
    const vaccine = document.getElementById('vac-type').value;
    const date = document.getElementById('vac-date').value;
    if (!id || !name || !date) {
      alert('เธเธฃเธธเธ“เธฒเธเธฃเธญเธเน€เธฅเธเธเธฃเธฐเธเธณเธ•เธฑเธง เธเธทเนเธญ-เธเธฒเธกเธชเธเธธเธฅ เนเธฅเธฐเธงเธฑเธเธ—เธตเนเธเธตเธ”');
      return;
    }
    addVaccineRecord(id, name, vaccine, date);
    document.getElementById('vac-id').value = '';
    document.getElementById('vac-name').value = '';
    document.getElementById('vac-date').value = '';
    alert('โ… เธเธฑเธเธ—เธถเธเธเธฒเธฃเธเธตเธ”เธงเธฑเธเธเธตเธเธชเธณเน€เธฃเนเธ โ€” เธชเนเธเธเนเธญเธกเธนเธฅเนเธเธขเธฑเธเธเธฃเธน / เน€เธเนเธฒเธซเธเนเธฒเธ—เธตเนเธญเธเธฒเธกเธฑเธข / เธเธนเนเธเธฃเธดเธซเธฒเธฃเนเธฅเนเธง');
  }
  function saveStudentVaccine() {
    const id = (document.getElementById('vac-stu-id').value || '').trim();
    const name = (document.getElementById('vac-stu-name').value || '').trim();
    const vaccine = document.getElementById('vac-stu-type').value;
    const date = document.getElementById('vac-stu-date').value;
    if (!id || !date) {
      alert('เธเธฃเธธเธ“เธฒเน€เธฅเธทเธญเธเธงเธฑเธเธ—เธตเนเธฃเธฑเธเธงเธฑเธเธเธตเธ');
      return;
    }
    addVaccineRecord(id, name, vaccine, date);
    document.getElementById('vac-stu-date').value = '';
    alert('โ… เธเธฑเธเธ—เธถเธเธเธฒเธฃเธฃเธฑเธเธงเธฑเธเธเธตเธเธชเธณเน€เธฃเนเธ โ€” เธชเนเธเธเนเธญเธกเธนเธฅเนเธเธขเธฑเธเธเธฃเธน / เน€เธเนเธฒเธซเธเนเธฒเธ—เธตเนเธญเธเธฒเธกเธฑเธข / เธเธนเนเธเธฃเธดเธซเธฒเธฃเนเธฅเนเธง');
  }
  (function loadVaccineRecords() {
    let records = [];
    try { records = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('sh-vaccine') || '[]'); } catch (e) {}
    renderVaccineRecords(records);
  })();
