      ifYes: 'เธเนเธญเธเธเธฑเธเธเธฒเธฃเธ•เธดเธ”เน€เธเธทเนเธญ HPV เธชเธฒเธขเธเธฑเธเธเธธเนเธซเธฅเธฑเธเนเธ”เนเธชเธนเธ เธฅเธ”เธเธงเธฒเธกเน€เธชเธตเนเธขเธเธกเธฐเน€เธฃเนเธเธเธฒเธเธกเธ”เธฅเธนเธ',
      aftercare: 'เธญเธฒเธเน€เธเนเธเนเธเธเธเธฃเธดเน€เธงเธ“เธเธตเธ” 1โ€“3 เธงเธฑเธ เธซเธฅเธตเธเน€เธฅเธตเนเธขเธเธเธฒเธฃเธขเธเธเธญเธเธซเธเธฑเธ เธ”เธทเนเธกเธเนเธณเธเธฑเธเธเนเธญเธ เธเธตเธ”เธเธฃเธ 2 เน€เธเนเธกเธ•เธฒเธกเธเธณเธซเธเธ”'
    },
    {
      should: 'เนเธเธฐเธเธณเธชเธณเธซเธฃเธฑเธเธเธฑเธเน€เธฃเธตเธขเธเธ—เธตเนเธกเธตเนเธฃเธเธเธฃเธฐเธเธณเธ•เธฑเธง เธญเนเธงเธ เธซเธฃเธทเธญเธญเธขเธนเนเนเธเธเธฅเธธเนเธกเน€เธชเธตเนเธขเธ เธ•เธฒเธกเธเธณเนเธเธฐเธเธณเธเธฃเธกเธเธงเธเธเธธเธกเนเธฃเธเนเธเนเธ•เนเธฅเธฐเธคเธ”เธนเธเธฒเธฅ',
      ifNot: 'เน€เธชเธตเนเธขเธเธ•เธดเธ”เนเธเนเธซเธงเธฑเธ”เนเธซเธเนเนเธฅเธฐเธกเธตเธญเธฒเธเธฒเธฃเธฃเธธเธเนเธฃเธเธเธงเนเธฒเธเธเธ—เธฑเนเธงเนเธ เธญเธฒเธเธ•เนเธญเธเธเธฑเธเน€เธฃเธตเธขเธเธเธฒเธ',
      ifYes: 'เธฅเธ”เธเธงเธฒเธกเธฃเธธเธเนเธฃเธเธเธญเธเธญเธฒเธเธฒเธฃเนเธฅเธฐเนเธญเธเธฒเธชเนเธญเธ”เธกเธดเธ•เนเธฃเธเธเธขเธฒเธเธฒเธฅ เนเธกเนเธขเธฑเธเธญเธฒเธเธ•เธดเธ”เน€เธเธทเนเธญเนเธ”เนเธเนเธฒเธ',
      aftercare: 'เธชเธฑเธเน€เธเธ•เธญเธฒเธเธฒเธฃเนเธเนเธ เธฒเธขเนเธ 30 เธเธฒเธ—เธตเธซเธฅเธฑเธเธเธตเธ” เธซเธฅเธตเธเน€เธฅเธตเนเธขเธเธเธฒเธฃเธญเธญเธเนเธฃเธเนเธเธงเธฑเธเนเธฃเธ เธซเธฒเธเธกเธตเธซเธฒเธขเนเธเธฅเธณเธเธฒเธเธซเธฃเธทเธญเธเธทเนเธเธฃเธธเธเนเธฃเธเนเธซเนเธฃเธตเธเธเธเนเธเธ—เธขเน'
    }
  ];
  var VACCINE_SCHEDULE_DEFAULT = [
    { vaccine: 'BCG (เธงเธฑเธ“เนเธฃเธ)', target: 'เธเธฑเธเน€เธฃเธตเธขเธ เธ.1 เธซเธฃเธทเธญเธญเธฒเธขเธธ <7 เธเธต (เธ—เธตเนเธขเธฑเธเนเธกเนเน€เธเธขเธฃเธฑเธ)', freq: '1 เธเธฃเธฑเนเธ', status: 'เธ”เธณเน€เธเธดเธเธเธฒเธฃเนเธฅเนเธง' },
    { vaccine: 'dT (เธเธญเธ•เธตเธ เธเธฒเธ”เธ—เธฐเธขเธฑเธ)', target: 'เธเธฑเธเน€เธฃเธตเธขเธเธญเธฒเธขเธธ 12 เธเธต (เธก.1)', freq: '1 เธเธฃเธฑเนเธ', status: 'เธฃเธญเธ”เธณเน€เธเธดเธเธเธฒเธฃ' },
    { vaccine: 'OPV (เนเธเธฅเธดเนเธญ)', target: 'เธ.1 เธ—เธตเนเธขเธฑเธเนเธกเนเธเธฃเธ 5 เธเธฃเธฑเนเธ', freq: 'เธ•เธฒเธกเธเธฃเธ“เธต', status: 'เธ”เธณเน€เธเธดเธเธเธฒเธฃเนเธฅเนเธง' },
    { vaccine: 'MMR (เธซเธฑเธ”-เธเธฒเธเธ—เธนเธก-เธซเธฑเธ”เน€เธขเธญเธฃเธกเธฑเธ)', target: 'เธ.1 เธ—เธตเนเธขเธฑเธเนเธกเนเธเธฃเธ 2 เธเธฃเธฑเนเธ', freq: 'เธ•เธฒเธกเธเธฃเธ“เธต', status: 'เธ”เธณเน€เธเธดเธเธเธฒเธฃเนเธฅเนเธง' },
    { vaccine: 'HPV (เธกเธฐเน€เธฃเนเธเธเธฒเธเธกเธ”เธฅเธนเธ)', target: 'เธเธฑเธเน€เธฃเธตเธขเธเธซเธเธดเธ เธก.2 (เธญเธฒเธขเธธ 11-12 เธเธต)', freq: '2 เธเธฃเธฑเนเธ (เธซเนเธฒเธ 6 เน€เธ”เธทเธญเธ)', status: 'เน€เธเนเธก 1 เนเธฅเนเธง' },
    { vaccine: 'เนเธเนเธซเธงเธฑเธ”เนเธซเธเน (เธ•เธฒเธกเธคเธ”เธนเธเธฒเธฅ)', target: 'เธเธฑเธเน€เธฃเธตเธขเธเธ—เธตเนเธกเธตเนเธฃเธเน€เธฃเธทเนเธญเธฃเธฑเธ + เธญเนเธงเธ (BMIโฅ35)', freq: '1-2 เธเธฃเธฑเนเธ/เธเธต', status: 'เธงเธฒเธเนเธเธ' }
  ];
  function getVaccineScheduleBadgeClass(status) {
    if (status === 'เธ”เธณเน€เธเธดเธเธเธฒเธฃเนเธฅเนเธง') return 'badge-green';
    if (status === 'เธงเธฒเธเนเธเธ') return 'badge-blue';
    return 'badge-gold';
  }
  function loadVaccineSchedule() {
    let items = [];
    try { items = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('sh-vaccine-schedule') || '[]'); } catch (e) {}
    if (!items.length) return VACCINE_SCHEDULE_DEFAULT.slice();
    return items.map(function(item, i) {
      const def = VACCINE_SCHEDULE_DEFAULT[i] || {};
      return {
        vaccine: item.vaccine || def.vaccine || '',
        target: item.target || def.target || '',
        freq: item.freq || def.freq || '',
        status: item.status || def.status || 'เธฃเธญเธ”เธณเน€เธเธดเธเธเธฒเธฃ'
      };
    });
  }
  function saveVaccineSchedule(items) {
    try { localStorage.setItem('sh-vaccine-schedule', JSON.stringify(items)); } catch (e) {}
  }
  function loadStudentVaccineChoices() {
    try { return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('sh-vac-stu-choice') || '{}'); } catch (e) { return {}; }
  }
  function saveStudentVaccineChoices(choices) {
    try { localStorage.setItem('sh-vac-stu-choice', JSON.stringify(choices)); } catch (e) {}
  }
  function getStudentVaccineChoice(studentId, index) {
    var data = getStudentVaccineChoiceData(studentId, index);
    return data.status || '';
  }
  function getStudentVaccineChoiceData(studentId, index) {
    if (!studentId) return { status: '' };
    var choices = loadStudentVaccineChoices();
    var row = choices[String(studentId)] || {};
    var raw = row[index] !== undefined ? row[index] : row[String(index)];
    if (typeof raw === 'string') return { status: raw };
    if (raw && typeof raw === 'object') return { status: raw.status || '', updatedAt: raw.updatedAt || 0 };
    return { status: '' };
  }
  function getVaccineEduInfo(index) {
    var def = VACCINE_EDU_INFO[index] || {};
    return {
      should: def.should || 'เธเธฃเธถเธเธฉเธฒเน€เธเนเธฒเธซเธเนเธฒเธ—เธตเนเธญเธเธฒเธกเธฑเธขเนเธฃเธเน€เธฃเธตเธขเธเธซเธฃเธทเธญเนเธเธ—เธขเนเน€เธเธทเนเธญเธเธฃเธฐเน€เธกเธดเธเธเธงเธฒเธกเธเธณเน€เธเนเธเนเธเธเธฒเธฃเธเธตเธ”เธงเธฑเธเธเธตเธ',
      ifNot: def.ifNot || 'เธญเธฒเธเธกเธตเธเธงเธฒเธกเน€เธชเธตเนเธขเธเธ•เนเธญเธเธฒเธฃเธ•เธดเธ”เน€เธเธทเนเธญเนเธฃเธเธ—เธตเนเธงเธฑเธเธเธตเธเธเนเธญเธเธเธฑเธเนเธ”เน',
      ifYes: def.ifYes || 'เธฃเนเธฒเธเธเธฒเธขเนเธ”เนเธฃเธฑเธเธ เธนเธกเธดเธเธธเนเธกเธเธฑเธเน€เธเธดเนเธกเธเธถเนเธ เธเนเธงเธขเธฅเธ”เธเธงเธฒเธกเธฃเธธเธเนเธฃเธเธเธญเธเนเธฃเธ',
      aftercare: def.aftercare || 'เธเธฑเธเธเนเธญเธ เธ”เธทเนเธกเธเนเธณเธกเธฒเธ เธชเธฑเธเน€เธเธ•เธญเธฒเธเธฒเธฃเธซเธฅเธฑเธเธเธตเธ” เธซเธฒเธเธเธดเธ”เธเธเธ•เธดเนเธซเนเนเธเนเธเธเธฃเธนเธซเธฃเธทเธญเธเธขเธฒเธเธฒเธฅเนเธฃเธเน€เธฃเธตเธขเธ'
    };
  }
  function openStudentVaccineChoiceModal(studentId, index) {
    if (getCurrentRole() !== 'student' || !loggedInStudentId) return;
    if (!visitIdMatch(studentId, loggedInStudentId)) return;
    var items = loadVaccineSchedule();
    if (index < 0 || index >= items.length) return;
    _vacChoiceModalCtx = { studentId: String(studentId), index: index };
    var item = items[index];
    var edu = getVaccineEduInfo(index);
    var cur = getStudentVaccineChoiceData(studentId, index).status;
    var titleEl = document.getElementById('vac-choice-modal-title');
    if (titleEl) titleEl.textContent = item.vaccine || 'เธงเธฑเธเธเธตเธ';
    var eduWrap = document.getElementById('vac-choice-edu-wrap');
    if (eduWrap) {
      eduWrap.innerHTML =
        '<div class="vac-edu-block"><h4>โ… เธเธงเธฃเธเธตเธ”เธซเธฃเธทเธญเนเธกเน</h4><p>' + escVacScheduleHtml(edu.should) + '</p></div>' +
        '<div class="vac-edu-block"><h4>โ เธ–เนเธฒเนเธกเนเธเธตเธ”เธเธฐเน€เธเนเธเธญเธขเนเธฒเธเนเธฃ</h4><p>' + escVacScheduleHtml(edu.ifNot) + '</p></div>' +
        '<div class="vac-edu-block"><h4>๐’ เธ–เนเธฒเธเธตเธ”เธเธฐเน€เธเนเธเธญเธขเนเธฒเธเนเธฃ</h4><p>' + escVacScheduleHtml(edu.ifYes) + '</p></div>' +
        '<div class="vac-edu-block"><h4>๐“ เธเธฒเธฃเธเธเธดเธเธฑเธ•เธดเธ•เธฑเธงเธซเธฅเธฑเธเธเธตเธ”</h4><p>' + escVacScheduleHtml(edu.aftercare) + '</p></div>';
    }
    var group = document.getElementById('vac-choice-status-group');
    if (group) {
      group.innerHTML = STUDENT_VAC_STATUSES.map(function(s) {
        var statusCls = getStudentVaccineStatusClass(s);
        var active = s === cur ? ' active' : '';
        var checked = s === cur ? ' checked' : '';
        return '<label class="vac-choice-status-opt ' + statusCls + active + '" data-status="' + escVacScheduleAttr(s) + '">' +
          '<input type="radio" name="vac-choice-status" value="' + escVacScheduleAttr(s) + '"' + checked + '>' +
          '<span class="vac-stu-status-dot" aria-hidden="true"></span>' +
          '<span>' + escVacScheduleHtml(s) + '</span></label>';
      }).join('');
      group.querySelectorAll('.vac-choice-status-opt').forEach(function(el) {
        el.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
          if (e.target.tagName === 'INPUT') return;
          var radio = el.querySelector('input[type="radio"]');
          if (radio) radio.checked = true;
          group.querySelectorAll('.vac-choice-status-opt').forEach(function(o) { o.classList.remove('active'); });
          el.classList.add('active');
        });
        var radio = el.querySelector('input[type="radio"]');
        if (radio) radio.addEventListener('change', function() {
          group.querySelectorAll('.vac-choice-status-opt').forEach(function(o) { o.classList.remove('active'); });
          if (radio.checked) el.classList.add('active');
        });
      });
    }
    var modal = document.getElementById('vaccineChoiceModal');
    if (modal) modal.classList.add('open');
  }
  function closeStudentVaccineChoiceModal() {
    var modal = document.getElementById('vaccineChoiceModal');
    if (modal) modal.classList.remove('open');
    _vacChoiceModalCtx = { studentId: '', index: -1 };
  }
  function saveStudentVaccineChoiceFromModal() {
    var ctx = _vacChoiceModalCtx;
    if (!ctx.studentId || ctx.index < 0) return;
    if (getCurrentRole() !== 'student' || !loggedInStudentId) return;
    if (!visitIdMatch(ctx.studentId, loggedInStudentId)) return;
    var picked = document.querySelector('input[name="vac-choice-status"]:checked');
    if (!picked) {
      alert('โ ๏ธ เธเธฃเธธเธ“เธฒเน€เธฅเธทเธญเธเธชเธ–เธฒเธเธฐ');
      return;
    }
    var choices = loadStudentVaccineChoices();
    var sid = String(ctx.studentId);
    if (!choices[sid]) choices[sid] = {};
    choices[sid][ctx.index] = { status: picked.value, updatedAt: Date.now() };
    choices[sid]._updated = Date.now();
    saveStudentVaccineChoices(choices);
    closeStudentVaccineChoiceModal();
    renderVaccineSchedule();
    alert('โ… เธเธฑเธเธ—เธถเธเธชเธ–เธฒเธเธฐเธงเธฑเธเธเธตเธเธชเธณเน€เธฃเนเธ');
  }
  function getStudentVaccineStatusClass(status) {
    if (status === 'เธ•เนเธญเธเธเธฒเธฃเธฃเธฑเธ') return 'vac-stu-status-want';
    if (status === 'เธฃเธฑเธเนเธฅเนเธง') return 'vac-stu-status-done';
    if (status === 'เนเธกเนเธ•เนเธญเธเธเธฒเธฃเธฃเธฑเธ') return 'vac-stu-status-decline';
    return 'vac-stu-status-none';
  }
  function renderStudentVaccineStatusPicker(studentId, index) {
    var status = getStudentVaccineChoice(studentId, index);
    var cls = getStudentVaccineStatusClass(status);
    var label = status || 'เธเธ”เน€เธฅเธทเธญเธเธชเธ–เธฒเธเธฐ';
    return '<button type="button" class="vac-stu-status-btn ' + cls + '" onclick="openStudentVaccineChoiceModal(\'' +
      escVacScheduleAttr(String(studentId)) + '\',' + index + ')" title="เธเธ”เน€เธเธทเนเธญเน€เธฅเธทเธญเธเธชเธ–เธฒเธเธฐเนเธฅเธฐเธญเนเธฒเธเธเนเธญเธกเธนเธฅเธงเธฑเธเธเธตเธ" aria-label="' +
      escVacScheduleAttr(label) + '">' +
      '<span class="vac-stu-status-dot" aria-hidden="true"></span>' +
      '<span class="vac-stu-status-label">' + escVacScheduleHtml(label) + '</span></button>';
  }
  function escVacScheduleAttr(s) {
    return String(s || '').replace(/&/g, '&amp;').replace(/"/g, '&quot;').replace(/</g, '&lt;');
  }
  function escVacScheduleHtml(s) {
    return String(s || '').replace(/&/g, '&amp;').replace(/</g, '&lt;');
  }
  function renderVaccineScheduleTextCell(value, index, field, editable, label) {
    if (!editable) return escVacScheduleHtml(value);
    return '<input type="text" class="vac-schedule-input" value="' + escVacScheduleAttr(value) +
      '" onblur="updateVaccineScheduleField(' + index + ', \'' + field + '\', this.value)" aria-label="' + label + '">';
  }
  function renderVaccineScheduleStatusCell(status, index, editable, studentId) {
    if (studentId && getCurrentRole() === 'student') {
      return renderStudentVaccineStatusPicker(studentId, index);
    }
    if (editable) {
      const opts = VACCINE_SCHEDULE_STATUSES.map(function(s) {
        return '<option value="' + escVacScheduleAttr(s) + '"' + (s === status ? ' selected' : '') + '>' + escVacScheduleHtml(s) + '</option>';
      }).join('');
      return '<select class="vac-schedule-status-select" onchange="updateVaccineScheduleField(' + index + ', \'status\', this.value, true)" aria-label="เนเธเนเนเธเธชเธ–เธฒเธเธฐ">' + opts + '</select>';
    }
    return '<span class="badge ' + getVaccineScheduleBadgeClass(status) + '">' + escVacScheduleHtml(status) + '</span>';
  }
  function renderVaccineSchedule() {
    const tbody = document.getElementById('vaccine-schedule-body');
    if (!tbody) return;
    const editable = STAFF_ROLES.includes(getCurrentRole()) && getCurrentRole() !== 'admin';
    const isStudentView = getCurrentRole() === 'student' && loggedInStudentId;
    const studentId = isStudentView ? loggedInStudentId : '';
    const items = loadVaccineSchedule();
    tbody.innerHTML = items.map(function(item, i) {
      return '<tr><td>' + (i + 1) + '</td>' +
        '<td>' + renderVaccineScheduleTextCell(item.vaccine, i, 'vaccine', editable, 'เนเธเนเนเธเธงเธฑเธเธเธตเธ') + '</td>' +
        '<td>' + renderVaccineScheduleTextCell(item.target, i, 'target', editable, 'เนเธเนเนเธเธเธฅเธธเนเธกเน€เธเนเธฒเธซเธกเธฒเธข') + '</td>' +
        '<td>' + renderVaccineScheduleTextCell(item.freq, i, 'freq', editable, 'เนเธเนเนเธเธเธงเธฒเธกเธ–เธตเน') + '</td>' +
        '<td>' + renderVaccineScheduleStatusCell(item.status, i, editable, studentId) + '</td></tr>';
    }).join('');
  }
  function updateVaccineScheduleField(index, field, value, rerender) {
    if (!STAFF_ROLES.includes(getCurrentRole())) return;
    const allowed = ['vaccine', 'target', 'freq', 'status'];
    if (allowed.indexOf(field) === -1) return;
    const items = loadVaccineSchedule();
    if (index < 0 || index >= items.length) return;
    items[index][field] = (value || '').trim();
    saveVaccineSchedule(items);
    if (rerender) renderVaccineSchedule();
  }
  function updateVaccineScheduleStatus(index, status) {
    updateVaccineScheduleField(index, 'status', status, true);
  }

  var chronicRecordsCache = [];
  function getChronicBadgeClass(disease) {
    const map = {
      'เนเธฃเธเธซเธญเธเธซเธทเธ”': 'badge-blue',
      'เนเธฃเธเธฅเธกเธเธฑเธ': 'badge-red',
      'เน€เธเธฒเธซเธงเธฒเธ': 'badge-gold',
      'เนเธฃเธเธซเธฑเธงเนเธ': 'badge-red',
      'เนเธฃเธเนเธ•': 'badge-blue',
      'เธ เธนเธกเธดเนเธเน': 'badge-gold',
      'เธญเธทเนเธเน': 'badge-blue'
    };
    return map[disease] || 'badge-blue';
  }
  function loadChronicFromStorage() {
    let records = [];
    try { records = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('sh-chronic') || '[]'); } catch (e) {}
    return records;
  }
  function saveChronicToStorage(records) {
    try { localStorage.setItem('sh-chronic', JSON.stringify(records)); } catch (e) {}
    chronicRecordsCache = records;
  }
  function ensureChronicSeed() {
    let records = loadChronicFromStorage();
    if (records.length) return records;
    const now = Date.now();
    records = [
      { id: '68001', name: 'เธเธดเธกเธเนเนเธ เธชเธธเธเธชเธงเธฑเธชเธ”เธดเน', class: 'เธก.2/1', disease: 'เนเธฃเธเธซเธญเธเธซเธทเธ”', medicine: 'Ventolin inhaler โ…', phone: '091-xxx-xxxx', note: '', recordedAt: 'เธ•เธฑเธงเธญเธขเนเธฒเธเธเนเธญเธกเธนเธฅ', savedAt: now - 86400000 },
      { id: '68045', name: 'เธเธเธเธฃ เธกเธฑเนเธเธเธ', class: 'เธก.5/3', disease: 'เนเธฃเธเธฅเธกเธเธฑเธ', medicine: 'Diazepam โ…', phone: '089-xxx-xxxx', note: '', recordedAt: 'เธ•เธฑเธงเธญเธขเนเธฒเธเธเนเธญเธกเธนเธฅ', savedAt: now - 43200000 },
      { id: '68102', name: 'เธชเธฒเธงเธดเธ•เธฃเธต เนเธเธ”เธต', class: 'เธก.4/2', disease: 'เน€เธเธฒเธซเธงเธฒเธ', medicine: 'เธเนเธณเธ•เธฒเธฅเธเธฅเธนเนเธเธช โ…', phone: '082-xxx-xxxx', note: '', recordedAt: 'เธ•เธฑเธงเธญเธขเนเธฒเธเธเนเธญเธกเธนเธฅ', savedAt: now - 21600000 }
    ];
    saveChronicToStorage(records);
    return records;
  }
  function renderChronicRecords(records) {
    const tbody = document.getElementById('chronic-records-body');
    if (!tbody) return;
    if (!records.length) {
      tbody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="7" style="text-align:center;color:var(--gray-mid);padding:18px;">เธขเธฑเธเนเธกเนเธกเธตเธฃเธฒเธขเธเธฒเธฃเธเธฑเธเธ—เธถเธ</td></tr>';
      return;
    }
    const sorted = records.slice().sort(function(a, b) { return (b.savedAt || 0) - (a.savedAt || 0); });
    tbody.innerHTML = sorted.map(function(r) {
      const badge = getChronicBadgeClass(r.disease);
      const med = r.medicine ? r.medicine + (r.medicine.indexOf('โ…') === -1 ? ' โ…' : '') : 'โ€”';
      const cls = r.class || 'โ€”';
      return '<tr><td>' + r.id + '</td><td>' + r.name + '</td><td>' + cls +
        '</td><td><span class="badge ' + badge + '">' + r.disease + '</span></td><td>' + med +
        '</td><td>' + (r.phone || 'โ€”') + '</td><td><button type="button" class="btn btn-sm btn-secondary">เธ”เธนเนเธเธ</button></td></tr>';
    }).join('');
  }
  function filterChronicRecords() {
    const q = ((document.getElementById('chronic-search') || {}).value || '').trim().toLowerCase();
    const disease = (document.getElementById('chronic-filter') || {}).value || '';
    let records = chronicRecordsCache.length ? chronicRecordsCache : ensureChronicSeed();
    records = records.filter(function(r) {
      const matchQ = !q || String(r.id).toLowerCase().indexOf(q) !== -1 ||
        (r.name || '').toLowerCase().indexOf(q) !== -1;
      const matchD = !disease || r.disease === disease;
      return matchQ && matchD;
    });
    renderChronicRecords(records);
  }
  function populateChronicFormFields(prefix, record) {
    var diseaseEl = document.getElementById(prefix + '-disease');
    var medEl = document.getElementById(prefix + '-medicine');
    var phoneEl = document.getElementById(prefix + '-phone');
    var noteEl = document.getElementById(prefix + '-note');
    if (record) {
      if (diseaseEl) diseaseEl.value = record.disease || '';
      if (medEl) medEl.value = (record.medicine || '').replace(/\s*โ…\s*$/, '');
      if (phoneEl) phoneEl.value = record.phone || '';
      if (noteEl) noteEl.value = record.note || '';
    } else {
      if (diseaseEl) diseaseEl.value = '';
      if (medEl) medEl.value = '';
      if (phoneEl) phoneEl.value = '';
      if (noteEl) noteEl.value = '';
    }
  }
  function loadChronicRecordIntoForm(prefix, id) {
    if (!id) {
      populateChronicFormFields(prefix, null);
      return;
    }
    var records = loadChronicFromStorage();
    var mine = records.find(function(r) { return visitIdMatch(r.id, id); });
    populateChronicFormFields(prefix, mine || null);
  }
  function getChronicRecordKey(r) {
    if (!r) return '';
    if (r.recordId) return String(r.recordId);
    return 'chr-' + String(r.id || '') + '-' + String(r.savedAt || 0);
  }
  function renderStudentChronicHistory() {
    const tbody = document.getElementById('chronic-student-history-body');
    const scopeId = getLimitedUserScopeId();
    if (!tbody || !scopeId) return;
    const records = loadChronicFromStorage();
    const mine = records.filter(function(r) { return visitIdMatch(r.id, scopeId); })
      .sort(function(a, b) { return (b.savedAt || 0) - (a.savedAt || 0); });
    if (!mine.length) {
      tbody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="6" style="text-align:center;color:var(--gray-mid);padding:16px;">เธขเธฑเธเนเธกเนเธกเธตเธเนเธญเธกเธนเธฅเนเธฃเธเธเธฃเธฐเธเธณเธ•เธฑเธง/เธเธฒเธฃเนเธเนเธญเธฒเธซเธฒเธฃ/เธเธฒเธฃเนเธเนเธขเธฒ โ€” เธเธฃเธญเธเนเธเธเธเธญเธฃเนเธกเธ”เนเธฒเธเธเธเนเธฅเนเธงเธเธ”เธเธฑเธเธ—เธถเธ</td></tr>';
      return;
    }
    tbody.innerHTML = mine.map(function(r) {
      const badge = getChronicBadgeClass(r.disease);
      const key = getChronicRecordKey(r).replace(/\\/g, '\\\\').replace(/'/g, "\\'");
      return '<tr><td><span class="badge ' + badge + '">' + escVisitHtml(r.disease) +
        '</span></td><td>' + escVisitHtml(r.medicine || 'โ€”') + '</td><td>' + escVisitHtml(r.phone || 'โ€”') +
        '</td><td>' + escVisitHtml(r.note || 'โ€”') + '</td><td>' + escVisitHtml(r.recordedAt || 'โ€”') +
        '</td><td><button type="button" class="btn btn-sm btn-danger" onclick="deleteStudentChronic(\'' + key + '\')">เธฅเธ</button></td></tr>';
    }).join('');
  }
  function deleteStudentChronic(recordKey) {
    const scopeId = getLimitedUserScopeId();
    if (!scopeId || !recordKey) return;
    if (!confirm('เธ•เนเธญเธเธเธฒเธฃเธฅเธเธฃเธฒเธขเธเธฒเธฃเธเธตเนเธซเธฃเธทเธญเนเธกเน?')) return;
    let records = loadChronicFromStorage();
    const before = records.length;
    records = records.filter(function(r) {
      if (!visitIdMatch(r.id, scopeId)) return true;
      return getChronicRecordKey(r) !== recordKey;
    });
    if (records.length === before) {
      alert('เนเธกเนเธเธเธฃเธฒเธขเธเธฒเธฃเธ—เธตเนเธ•เนเธญเธเธเธฒเธฃเธฅเธ');
      return;
    }
    saveChronicToStorage(records);
    chronicRecordsCache = records;
    if (typeof filterChronicRecords === 'function') filterChronicRecords();
    if (typeof refreshStudentRegistryRow === 'function') refreshStudentRegistryRow(scopeId);
    const remaining = records.find(function(r) { return visitIdMatch(r.id, scopeId); });
    populateChronicFormFields('chr-stu', remaining || null);
    renderStudentChronicHistory();
    if (typeof refreshAllScreeningResultViews === 'function') refreshAllScreeningResultViews(scopeId);
    if (typeof notifyReportDataChanged === 'function') notifyReportDataChanged();
  }
  window.deleteStudentChronic = deleteStudentChronic;
  function fillStudentChronicForm() {
    if (!isLimitedUser()) return;
    const isStudentLogin = getCurrentRole() === 'student' && loggedInStudentId;
    setLimitedUserFieldMode(!!isStudentLogin);
    const idEl = document.getElementById('chr-stu-id');
    const nameEl = document.getElementById('chr-stu-name');
    if (isStudentLogin) {
      const d = (typeof lookupStudent === 'function') ? lookupStudent(loggedInStudentId) : null;
      if (idEl) idEl.value = loggedInStudentId;
      if (nameEl) nameEl.value = (d && d.fullName) ? d.fullName : '';
      const records = loadChronicFromStorage();
      const mine = records.find(function(r) { return visitIdMatch(r.id, loggedInStudentId); });
      populateChronicFormFields('chr-stu', mine || null);
    } else if (getCurrentRole() === 'teacher') {
      if (idEl) idEl.value = '';
      if (nameEl) nameEl.value = '';
    }
    renderStudentChronicHistory();
  }
  function fillChronicStaffForm() {
    if (typeof isFullStaffRole === 'function' && !isFullStaffRole()) return;
    var idEl = document.getElementById('chr-staff-id');
    if (idEl && idEl.value.trim()) fillChronicStaffFromId();
  }
  function fillChronicStaffNameFromId() {
    var idEl = document.getElementById('chr-staff-id');
    var nameEl = document.getElementById('chr-staff-name');
    if (!idEl || !nameEl) return;
    fillStudentNameById(idEl.value, nameEl);
  }
  function fillChronicStaffIdFromName() {
    var idEl = document.getElementById('chr-staff-id');
    var nameEl = document.getElementById('chr-staff-name');
    if (!idEl || !nameEl) return;
    var name = (nameEl.value || '').trim();
    if (!name) return;
    var id = (idEl.value || '').trim();
    if (id && studentNameMatchesId(name, id)) return;
    var resolved = resolveStudentIdFromName(name, true);
    if (!resolved) return;
    idEl.value = resolved.id;
    nameEl.value = resolved.name;
    loadChronicRecordIntoForm('chr-staff', resolved.id);
  }
  function fillChronicStaffFromName() {
    var idEl = document.getElementById('chr-staff-id');
    var nameEl = document.getElementById('chr-staff-name');
    if (!idEl || !nameEl) return;
    var name = (nameEl.value || '').trim();
    var id = (idEl.value || '').trim();
    if (!name) return;
    if (id && studentNameMatchesId(name, id)) {
      loadChronicRecordIntoForm('chr-staff', id);
      return;
    }
    var resolved = resolveStudentIdFromName(name, false);
    if (!resolved) return;
    idEl.value = resolved.id;
    nameEl.value = resolved.name;
    loadChronicRecordIntoForm('chr-staff', resolved.id);
  }
  function fillChronicStaffFromId() {
    var idEl = document.getElementById('chr-staff-id');
    var nameEl = document.getElementById('chr-staff-name');
    if (!idEl) return;
    var id = (idEl.value || '').trim();
    fillChronicStaffNameFromId();
    if (!id) {
      populateChronicFormFields('chr-staff', null);
      return;
    }
    if (!nameEl || !nameEl.value.trim()) {
      var fromReg = getStudentDisplayName(id);
      if (fromReg && nameEl) nameEl.value = fromReg;
    }
    loadChronicRecordIntoForm('chr-staff', id);
  }
  function clearChronicStaffForm() {
    var idEl = document.getElementById('chr-staff-id');
    var nameEl = document.getElementById('chr-staff-name');
    if (idEl) idEl.value = '';
    if (nameEl) nameEl.value = '';
    populateChronicFormFields('chr-staff', null);
  }
  function saveStaffChronic() {
    const id = (document.getElementById('chr-staff-id').value || '').trim();
    const name = (document.getElementById('chr-staff-name').value || '').trim();
    const disease = document.getElementById('chr-staff-disease').value;
    const medicine = (document.getElementById('chr-staff-medicine').value || '').trim();
    const phone = (document.getElementById('chr-staff-phone').value || '').trim();
    const note = (document.getElementById('chr-staff-note').value || '').trim();
    if (!id || !name) {
      alert('เธเธฃเธธเธ“เธฒเธเธฃเธญเธเน€เธฅเธเธเธฃเธฐเธเธณเธ•เธฑเธงเนเธฅเธฐเธเธทเนเธญ-เธเธฒเธกเธชเธเธธเธฅ');
      return;
    }
    if (!disease) {
      alert('เธเธฃเธธเธ“เธฒเน€เธฅเธทเธญเธเนเธฃเธเธเธฃเธฐเธเธณเธ•เธฑเธง/เธเธฒเธฃเนเธเนเธญเธฒเธซเธฒเธฃ/เธเธฒเธฃเนเธเนเธขเธฒ');
      return;
    }
    const cls = (typeof getStudentFullClassFromRegistry === 'function') ? getStudentFullClassFromRegistry(id) : '';
    upsertChronicRecord({
      id: id,
      name: name,
      class: cls || 'โ€”',
      disease: disease,
      medicine: medicine,
      phone: phone,
      note: note,
      recordedAt: new Date().toLocaleString('th-TH'),
      savedAt: Date.now()
    });
    if (typeof refreshStudentRegistryRow === 'function') refreshStudentRegistryRow(id);
    alert('โ… เธเธฑเธเธ—เธถเธเธเนเธญเธกเธนเธฅเนเธฃเธเธเธฃเธฐเธเธณเธ•เธฑเธง/เธเธฒเธฃเนเธเนเธญเธฒเธซเธฒเธฃ/เธเธฒเธฃเนเธเนเธขเธฒเธชเธณเน€เธฃเนเธ');
    populateChronicFormFields('chr-staff', null);
  }
  window.fillChronicStaffFromId = fillChronicStaffFromId;
  window.fillChronicStaffNameFromId = fillChronicStaffNameFromId;
  window.fillChronicStaffIdFromName = fillChronicStaffIdFromName;
  window.fillChronicStaffFromName = fillChronicStaffFromName;
  window.clearChronicStaffForm = clearChronicStaffForm;
  window.saveStaffChronic = saveStaffChronic;
  function upsertChronicRecord(record) {
    let records = loadChronicFromStorage();
    if (!record.recordId) {
      record.recordId = 'chr-' + Date.now() + '-' + Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 8);
    }
    const idx = records.findIndex(function(r) { return String(r.id) === String(record.id); });
    if (idx >= 0) records[idx] = record;
    else records.unshift(record);
    saveChronicToStorage(records);
    filterChronicRecords();
    syncToSheetQuiet(SHEET_NAMES.chronic, buildChronicSheetRow(record));
    renderStudentChronicHistory();
    if (typeof refreshAllScreeningResultViews === 'function') refreshAllScreeningResultViews(record.id);
    notifyReportDataChanged();
    return records;
  }
  function saveStudentChronic() {
    const id = (document.getElementById('chr-stu-id').value || '').trim();
    const name = (document.getElementById('chr-stu-name').value || '').trim();
    const disease = document.getElementById('chr-stu-disease').value;
    const medicine = (document.getElementById('chr-stu-medicine').value || '').trim();
    const phone = (document.getElementById('chr-stu-phone').value || '').trim();
    const note = (document.getElementById('chr-stu-note').value || '').trim();
    if (!id || !disease) {
      alert('เธเธฃเธธเธ“เธฒเน€เธฅเธทเธญเธเนเธฃเธเธเธฃเธฐเธเธณเธ•เธฑเธง/เธเธฒเธฃเนเธเนเธญเธฒเธซเธฒเธฃ/เธเธฒเธฃเนเธเนเธขเธฒ');
      return;
    }
    upsertChronicRecord({
      id: id,
      name: name,
      class: 'โ€”',
      disease: disease,
      medicine: medicine,
      phone: phone,
      note: note,
      recordedAt: new Date().toLocaleString('th-TH'),
      savedAt: Date.now()
    });
    if (typeof refreshStudentRegistryRow === 'function') refreshStudentRegistryRow(id);
    alert('โ… เธเธฑเธเธ—เธถเธเธเนเธญเธกเธนเธฅเนเธฃเธเธเธฃเธฐเธเธณเธ•เธฑเธง/เธเธฒเธฃเนเธเนเธญเธฒเธซเธฒเธฃ/เธเธฒเธฃเนเธเนเธขเธฒเธชเธณเน€เธฃเนเธ โ€” เธชเนเธเธเนเธญเธกเธนเธฅเนเธเธขเธฑเธเธเธฃเธน / เน€เธเนเธฒเธซเธเนเธฒเธ—เธตเนเธญเธเธฒเธกเธฑเธข / เธเธนเนเธเธฃเธดเธซเธฒเธฃเนเธฅเนเธง');
  }
  (function initChronicRecords() {
    chronicRecordsCache = ensureChronicSeed();
    renderChronicRecords(chronicRecordsCache);
  })();

  var medicineStockCache = [];
  function loadMedicineStock() {
    try { return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('sh-medicine-stock') || '[]'); } catch (e) { return []; }
  }
  function saveMedicineStock(records) {
    try { localStorage.setItem('sh-medicine-stock', JSON.stringify(records)); } catch (e) {}
    medicineStockCache = records;
  }
  function ensureMedicineStockSeed() {
    var records = loadMedicineStock();
    if (records.length) return records;
    records = [
      { id: 'med-paracetamol', name: 'Paracetamol 500mg', category: 'เธฅเธ”เนเธเน/เนเธเนเธเธงเธ”', qty: 850, unit: 'เน€เธกเนเธ”', expiry: 'เธกเธด.เธข. 70', minStock: 100, urgentStock: 20 },

    ];

  }
  function getMedicineStockStatus(item) {
    var qty = parseInt(item.qty, 10) || 0;
    var urgent = parseInt(item.urgentStock, 10);
    var min = parseInt(item.minStock, 10);
    if (isNaN(urgent)) urgent = 10;
    if (isNaN(min)) min = 50;
    if (qty <= urgent) return { label: 'เธชเธฑเนเธเธ”เนเธงเธ', badge: 'badge-red' };
    if (qty <= min) return { label: 'เนเธเธฅเนเธซเธกเธ”', badge: 'badge-gold' };
    return { label: 'เธเธญเน€เธเธตเธขเธ', badge: 'badge-green' };
  }
  function escMedicineHtml(text) {
    return String(text == null ? '' : text)
      .replace(/&/g, '&amp;')
      .replace(/</g, '&lt;')
      .replace(/>/g, '&gt;')
      .replace(/"/g, '&quot;');
  }
  function renderMedicineStockAlert(records) {
    var alertEl = document.getElementById('medicine-stock-alert');
    if (!alertEl) return;
    var low = records.filter(function(r) {
      var st = getMedicineStockStatus(r);
      return st.label !== 'เธเธญเน€เธเธตเธขเธ';
    });
    if (!low.length) {
      alertEl.style.display = 'none';
      return;
    }
    alertEl.style.display = '';
    var names = low.slice(0, 4).map(function(r) { return r.name; }).join(', ');
    var more = low.length > 4 ? ' เนเธฅเธฐเธญเธตเธ ' + (low.length - 4) + ' เธฃเธฒเธขเธเธฒเธฃ' : '';
    alertEl.querySelector('div').textContent = 'เธขเธฒเธเธฒเธเธฃเธฒเธขเธเธฒเธฃเนเธเธฅเนเธซเธกเธ”เธซเธฃเธทเธญเธเธงเธฃเธชเธฑเนเธเน€เธเธดเนเธก: ' + names + more;
  }
  function renderMedicinePurchaseSelect(records) {
    var sel = document.getElementById('med-purchase-select');
    if (!sel) return;
    var current = sel.value;
    var html = '<option value="">-- เน€เธเธดเนเธกเธขเธฒเนเธซเธกเน --</option>';
    records.slice().sort(function(a, b) {
      return String(a.name || '').localeCompare(String(b.name || ''), 'th');
    }).forEach(function(r) {
      html += '<option value="' + escMedicineHtml(r.id) + '">' + escMedicineHtml(r.name) + ' (เธเธเน€เธซเธฅเธทเธญ ' + (parseInt(r.qty, 10) || 0) + ' ' + escMedicineHtml(r.unit || '') + ')</option>';
    });
    sel.innerHTML = html;
    if (current && records.some(function(r) { return r.id === current; })) sel.value = current;
  }
  function renderMedicineStock() {
    var records = medicineStockCache.length ? medicineStockCache : ensureMedicineStockSeed();
    medicineStockCache = records;
    var tbody = document.getElementById('medicine-stock-body');
    if (!tbody) return;
    if (!records.length) {
      tbody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="6" style="text-align:center;color:var(--gray-mid);padding:18px;">เธขเธฑเธเนเธกเนเธกเธตเธขเธฒเนเธเธเธฅเธฑเธ โ€” เธเธฑเธเธ—เธถเธเธฃเธฑเธเธขเธฒเน€เธเนเธฒเธเธฅเธฑเธเธ”เนเธฒเธเธเธ</td></tr>';
    } else {
      tbody.innerHTML = records.slice().sort(function(a, b) {
        return String(a.name || '').localeCompare(String(b.name || ''), 'th');
      }).map(function(r) {
        var st = getMedicineStockStatus(r);
        return '<tr><td>' + escMedicineHtml(r.name) + '</td><td>' + escMedicineHtml(r.category || 'โ€”') +
          '</td><td>' + (parseInt(r.qty, 10) || 0).toLocaleString('th-TH') + '</td><td>' + escMedicineHtml(r.unit || 'โ€”') +
          '</td><td>' + escMedicineHtml(r.expiry || 'โ€”') + '</td><td><span class="badge ' + st.badge + '">' + st.label + '</span></td></tr>';
      }).join('');
    }
    renderMedicineStockAlert(records);
    renderMedicinePurchaseSelect(records);
  }
  function fillMedicinePurchaseFromSelect() {
    var sel = document.getElementById('med-purchase-select');
    var id = sel ? sel.value : '';
    if (!id) {
      clearMedicinePurchaseForm(true);
      return;
    }
    var records = medicineStockCache.length ? medicineStockCache : ensureMedicineStockSeed();
    var item = records.find(function(r) { return r.id === id; });
    if (!item) return;
    var nameEl = document.getElementById('med-purchase-name');
    var catEl = document.getElementById('med-purchase-category');
    var unitEl = document.getElementById('med-purchase-unit');
    var expiryEl = document.getElementById('med-purchase-expiry');
    var qtyEl = document.getElementById('med-purchase-qty');
    if (nameEl) { nameEl.value = item.name || ''; nameEl.readOnly = true; nameEl.classList.add('input-readonly'); }
    if (catEl) { catEl.value = item.category || ''; catEl.readOnly = true; catEl.classList.add('input-readonly'); }
    if (unitEl) unitEl.value = item.unit || 'เน€เธกเนเธ”';
    if (expiryEl) expiryEl.value = item.expiry || '';
    if (qtyEl) { qtyEl.value = ''; qtyEl.focus(); }
  }
  function clearMedicinePurchaseForm(keepSelect) {
    if (!keepSelect) {
      var sel = document.getElementById('med-purchase-select');
      if (sel) sel.value = '';
    }
    ['med-purchase-name', 'med-purchase-category', 'med-purchase-expiry', 'med-purchase-note'].forEach(function(fid) {
      var el = document.getElementById(fid);
      if (!el) return;
      el.value = '';
      el.readOnly = false;
      el.classList.remove('input-readonly');
    });
    var qtyEl = document.getElementById('med-purchase-qty');
    if (qtyEl) qtyEl.value = '';
    var unitEl = document.getElementById('med-purchase-unit');
    if (unitEl) unitEl.value = 'เน€เธกเนเธ”';
  }
  function focusMedicinePurchaseForm() {
    var card = document.getElementById('medicine-purchase-card');
    if (card) card.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'start' });
    var qtyEl = document.getElementById('med-purchase-qty');
    if (qtyEl) qtyEl.focus();
  }
  function saveMedicinePurchase() {
    var selectEl = document.getElementById('med-purchase-select');
    var name = (document.getElementById('med-purchase-name').value || '').trim();
    var category = (document.getElementById('med-purchase-category').value || '').trim();
    var addQty = parseInt(document.getElementById('med-purchase-qty').value, 10);
    var unit = document.getElementById('med-purchase-unit').value || 'เน€เธกเนเธ”';
    var expiry = (document.getElementById('med-purchase-expiry').value || '').trim();
    var note = (document.getElementById('med-purchase-note').value || '').trim();
    var existingId = selectEl ? selectEl.value : '';
    if (!name) {
      alert('เธเธฃเธธเธ“เธฒเธเธฃเธญเธเธเธทเนเธญเธขเธฒ');
      return;
    }
    if (!category) {
      alert('เธเธฃเธธเธ“เธฒเธเธฃเธญเธเธเธฃเธฐเน€เธ เธ—เธขเธฒ');
      return;
    }
    if (!addQty || addQty < 1) {
      alert('เธเธฃเธธเธ“เธฒเธเธฃเธญเธเธเธณเธเธงเธเธ—เธตเนเธเธทเนเธญเน€เธเธดเนเธก');
      return;
    }
    if (!expiry) {
      alert('เธเธฃเธธเธ“เธฒเธเธฃเธญเธเธงเธฑเธเธซเธกเธ”เธญเธฒเธขเธธ');
      return;
    }
    var records = loadMedicineStock();
    var now = Date.now();
    var item;
    if (existingId) {
      item = records.find(function(r) { return r.id === existingId; });
      if (!item) {
        alert('เนเธกเนเธเธเธฃเธฒเธขเธเธฒเธฃเธขเธฒเนเธเธเธฅเธฑเธ');
        return;
      }
      item.qty = (parseInt(item.qty, 10) || 0) + addQty;
      item.expiry = expiry;
      if (note) item.lastNote = note;
      item.updatedAt = now;
    } else {
      var duplicate = records.find(function(r) {
        return String(r.name || '').trim().toLowerCase() === name.toLowerCase();
      });
      if (duplicate) {
        duplicate.qty = (parseInt(duplicate.qty, 10) || 0) + addQty;
        duplicate.expiry = expiry;
        duplicate.category = category || duplicate.category;
        duplicate.unit = unit || duplicate.unit;
        if (note) duplicate.lastNote = note;
        duplicate.updatedAt = now;
        item = duplicate;
      } else {
        item = {
          id: 'med-' + now,
          name: name,
          category: category,
          qty: addQty,
          unit: unit,
          expiry: expiry,
          minStock: 50,
          urgentStock: 10,
          lastNote: note,
          updatedAt: now
        };
        records.unshift(item);
      }
    }
    saveMedicineStock(records);
    renderMedicineStock();
    clearMedicinePurchaseForm();
    alert('โ… เธเธฑเธเธ—เธถเธเธฃเธฑเธเธขเธฒเน€เธเนเธฒเธเธฅเธฑเธเธชเธณเน€เธฃเนเธ โ€” ' + item.name + ' เธเธเน€เธซเธฅเธทเธญ ' + (parseInt(item.qty, 10) || 0).toLocaleString('th-TH') + ' ' + (item.unit || ''));
  }
  window.renderMedicineStock = renderMedicineStock;
  window.fillMedicinePurchaseFromSelect = fillMedicinePurchaseFromSelect;
  window.clearMedicinePurchaseForm = clearMedicinePurchaseForm;
  window.saveMedicinePurchase = saveMedicinePurchase;
  window.focusMedicinePurchaseForm = focusMedicinePurchaseForm;
  (function initMedicineStock() {
    medicineStockCache = ensureMedicineStockSeed();
    if (document.getElementById('medicine-stock-body')) renderMedicineStock();
  })();

  var DASH_CAL_MONTHS = {
    'เธก.เธ.': 1, 'เธ.เธ.': 2, 'เธกเธต.เธ.': 3, 'เน€เธก.เธข.': 4, 'เธ.เธ.': 5, 'เธกเธด.เธข.': 6,
    'เธ.เธ.': 7, 'เธช.เธ.': 8, 'เธ.เธข.': 9, 'เธ•.เธ.': 10, 'เธ.เธข.': 11, 'เธ.เธ.': 12
  };
  var DASH_CAL_MONTH_NAMES = ['', 'เธก.เธ.', 'เธ.เธ.', 'เธกเธต.เธ.', 'เน€เธก.เธข.', 'เธ.เธ.', 'เธกเธด.เธข.', 'เธ.เธ.', 'เธช.เธ.', 'เธ.เธข.', 'เธ•.เธ.', 'เธ.เธข.', 'เธ.เธ.'];
  function padDashDate(n) { return n < 10 ? '0' + n : String(n); }
  function dashBeYear(y) {
    y = parseInt(y, 10);
    if (isNaN(y)) return 2569;
    if (y >= 2400) return y;
    if (y >= 100) return y + 2500 - 100; // unlikely
    return 2500 + y; // 69 -> 2569
  }
  function dashIsoFromParts(day, month, beYear) {
    if (!month || month < 1 || month > 12) return '';
    const ce = parseInt(beYear, 10) - 543;
    return ce + '-' + padDashDate(month) + '-' + padDashDate(day);
  }
  function dashLastDayOfMonthIso(iso) {
    if (!iso || !/^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/.test(iso)) return iso;
    const p = iso.split('-');
    const y = parseInt(p[0], 10);
    const m = parseInt(p[1], 10);
    const last = new Date(y, m, 0).getDate();
    return y + '-' + padDashDate(m) + '-' + padDashDate(last);
  }
  function parseDashCalendarDate(s) {
    if (!s) return '';
    const t = String(s).trim();
    if (/^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/.test(t)) return t;
    const slash = t.match(/^(\d{1,2})\/(\d{1,2})\/(\d{2,4})$/);
    if (slash) {
      let be = parseInt(slash[3], 10);
      if (be < 100) be = 2500 + be;
      else if (be < 2400) be += 543;
      return dashIsoFromParts(parseInt(slash[1], 10), parseInt(slash[2], 10), be);
    }
    const parts = t.split(/\s+/).filter(Boolean);
    if (parts.length >= 2 && DASH_CAL_MONTHS[parts[0]] && /^\d+$/.test(parts[1])) {
      return dashIsoFromParts(1, DASH_CAL_MONTHS[parts[0]], dashBeYear(parts[1]));
    }
    if (parts.length >= 3 && /^\d+$/.test(parts[0]) && DASH_CAL_MONTHS[parts[1]] && /^\d+$/.test(parts[2])) {
      return dashIsoFromParts(parseInt(parts[0], 10), DASH_CAL_MONTHS[parts[1]], dashBeYear(parts[2]));
    }
    return '';
  }
  function formatDashCalendarDate(iso) {
    if (!iso) return 'โ€”';
    if (!/^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/.test(iso)) return escDashHtml(iso);
    const p = iso.split('-');
    const be = parseInt(p[0], 10) + 543;
    const m = parseInt(p[1], 10);
    const d = parseInt(p[2], 10);
    return d + ' ' + (DASH_CAL_MONTH_NAMES[m] || p[1]) + ' ' + be;
  }
  function normalizeDashCalendarItem(item, index) {
    const def = DASHBOARD_DEFAULT.calendar[index] || {};
    const rawStart = item.dateStart || item.month || def.dateStart || '';
    const rawEnd = item.dateEnd || item.month || def.dateEnd || def.dateStart || '';
    const monthOnly = /^(เธก\.เธ\.|เธ\.เธ\.|เธกเธต\.เธ\.|เน€เธก\.เธข\.|เธ\.เธ\.|เธกเธด\.เธข\.|เธ\.เธ\.|เธช\.เธ\.|เธ\.เธข\.|เธ•\.เธ\.|เธ\.เธข\.|เธ\.เธ\.)\s+\d+$/.test(String(rawStart).trim());
    let dateStart = parseDashCalendarDate(rawStart) || parseDashCalendarDate(def.dateStart);
    let dateEnd = parseDashCalendarDate(rawEnd) || parseDashCalendarDate(def.dateEnd);
    if (dateStart && (!dateEnd || (monthOnly && rawStart === rawEnd))) {
      dateEnd = dashLastDayOfMonthIso(dateStart);
    }
    return {
      dateStart: dateStart,
      dateEnd: dateEnd || dateStart,
      text: item.text || def.text || '',
      done: !!item.done
    };
  }

  function getAdminSampleCoverage(total) {
    total = total || getStudentRegistryCount() || 2725;
    var hpvTarget = 244;
    var rows = [
      { label: 'เธ•เธฃเธงเธเธชเธธเธเธ เธฒเธเธเธฃเธฐเธเธณเธเธต', pct: 78 },
      { label: 'เธเธฑเนเธเธเนเธณเธซเธเธฑเธ/เธงเธฑเธ”เธชเนเธงเธเธชเธนเธ เธเธฃเธฑเนเธเธ—เธตเน 1', pct: 100 },
      { label: 'เธเธฑเนเธเธเนเธณเธซเธเธฑเธ/เธงเธฑเธ”เธชเนเธงเธเธชเธนเธ เธเธฃเธฑเนเธเธ—เธตเน 2', pct: 42 },
      { label: 'เธ•เธฃเธงเธเธชเธฒเธขเธ•เธฒ', pct: 62 },
      { label: 'เธ•เธฃเธงเธเธเธฒเธฃเนเธ”เนเธขเธดเธ', pct: 52 },
      { label: 'เธงเธฑเธเธเธตเธ HPV', pct: 91, total: hpvTarget },
      { label: 'เธงเธฑเธเธเธตเธเนเธเนเธซเธงเธฑเธ”เนเธซเธเน', pct: 68 },
      { label: 'เธเธฑเธ”เธเธฃเธญเธเนเธฅเธซเธดเธ•เธเธฒเธ', pct: 45 },
      { label: 'เธ•เธฃเธงเธเธชเธธเธเธ เธฒเธเธเนเธญเธเธเธฒเธ', pct: 55 },
      { label: 'เธเธฑเธ”เธเธฃเธญเธเธชเธธเธเธ เธฒเธเธเธดเธ• (SDQ)', pct: 72 }
    ];
    return rows.map(function(row) {
      var base = row.total != null ? row.total : total;
      var count = Math.round(base * row.pct / 100);
      return { label: row.label, pct: row.pct, count: count, total: base };
    });
  }
  function getAdminDashboardDisplayData() {
    var total = getStudentRegistryCount() || 2725;
    return {
      staffCount: DASHBOARD_ADMIN_SAMPLE.staffCount,
      todayVisit: DASHBOARD_ADMIN_SAMPLE.todayVisit,
      referralCount: DASHBOARD_ADMIN_SAMPLE.referralCount,
      screenedCount: DASHBOARD_ADMIN_SAMPLE.screenedCount,
      alertCount: DASHBOARD_ADMIN_SAMPLE.alertCount,
      warningText: DASHBOARD_ADMIN_SAMPLE.warningText,
      coverage: getAdminSampleCoverage(total)
    };
  }
  function loadDashboard() {
    let data = {};
    try { data = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('sh-dashboard') || '{}'); } catch (e) {}
    const out = {
      staffCount: data.staffCount != null ? data.staffCount : DASHBOARD_DEFAULT.staffCount,
      todayVisit: data.todayVisit != null ? data.todayVisit : DASHBOARD_DEFAULT.todayVisit,
      referralCount: data.referralCount != null ? data.referralCount : DASHBOARD_DEFAULT.referralCount,
      screenedCount: data.screenedCount != null ? data.screenedCount : DASHBOARD_DEFAULT.screenedCount,
      alertCount: data.alertCount != null ? data.alertCount : DASHBOARD_DEFAULT.alertCount,
      warningText: data.warningText || DASHBOARD_DEFAULT.warningText,
      calendar: (data.calendar && data.calendar.length)
        ? data.calendar.map(function(item, i) { return normalizeDashCalendarItem(item, i); })
        : DASHBOARD_DEFAULT.calendar.map(function(c) { return Object.assign({}, c); }),
      coverage: (data.coverage && data.coverage.length) ? data.coverage : DASHBOARD_DEFAULT.coverage.map(function(c) { return Object.assign({}, c); })
    };
    return out;
  }
  function saveDashboard(data) {
    try { localStorage.setItem('sh-dashboard', JSON.stringify(data)); } catch (e) {}
    visitCount = parseInt(data.todayVisit, 10) || 0;
  }
  function escDashAttr(s) {
    return String(s || '').replace(/&/g, '&amp;').replace(/"/g, '&quot;').replace(/</g, '&lt;');
  }
  function escDashHtml(s) {
    return String(s || '').replace(/&/g, '&amp;').replace(/</g, '&lt;');
  }
  function renderDashStatNum(elId, value, field, editable) {
    const el = document.getElementById(elId);
    if (!el) return;
    const n = parseInt(value, 10) || 0;
    if (editable) {
      el.innerHTML = '<input type="number" class="stat-num stat-num-edit" value="' + n + '" min="0" onblur="updateDashboardField(\'' + field + '\', this.value)">';
    } else {
      el.textContent = n.toLocaleString('th-TH');
    }
  }
  function ensureDashCoverageContainer() {
    var list = document.getElementById('dash-coverage-list');
    if (list) return list;
    var card = document.getElementById('dash-coverage-card');
    if (!card) return null;
    list = document.createElement('div');
    list.id = 'dash-coverage-list';
    card.appendChild(list);
    return list;
  }
  function shortenCoverageLabel(label) {
    var map = {
      'เธ•เธฃเธงเธเธชเธธเธเธ เธฒเธเธเธฃเธฐเธเธณเธเธต': 'เธชเธธเธเธ เธฒเธเธเธต',
      'เธเธฑเนเธเธเนเธณเธซเธเธฑเธ/เธงเธฑเธ”เธชเนเธงเธเธชเธนเธ เธเธฃเธฑเนเธเธ—เธตเน 1': 'เธเธฑเนเธเธ.1',
      'เธเธฑเนเธเธเนเธณเธซเธเธฑเธ/เธงเธฑเธ”เธชเนเธงเธเธชเธนเธ เธเธฃเธฑเนเธเธ—เธตเน 2': 'เธเธฑเนเธเธ.2',
      'เธ•เธฃเธงเธเธชเธฒเธขเธ•เธฒ': 'เธชเธฒเธขเธ•เธฒ',
      'เธ•เธฃเธงเธเธเธฒเธฃเนเธ”เนเธขเธดเธ': 'เนเธ”เนเธขเธดเธ',
      'เธงเธฑเธเธเธตเธ HPV': 'HPV',
      'เธงเธฑเธเธเธตเธเนเธเนเธซเธงเธฑเธ”เนเธซเธเน': 'เนเธเนเธซเธงเธฑเธ”',
      'เธเธฑเธ”เธเธฃเธญเธเนเธฅเธซเธดเธ•เธเธฒเธ': 'เนเธฅเธซเธดเธ•',
      'เธ•เธฃเธงเธเธชเธธเธเธ เธฒเธเธเนเธญเธเธเธฒเธ': 'เธเนเธญเธเธเธฒเธ',
      'เธเธฑเธ”เธเธฃเธญเธเธชเธธเธเธ เธฒเธเธเธดเธ• (SDQ)': 'SDQ'
    };
    return map[label] || label;
  }
  function coverageBarTone(pct) {
    if (pct >= 80) return '';
    if (pct >= 50) return ' mid';
    return ' low';
  }
  function renderAdminCoverageColumns(list, items) {
    list.className = 'dash-cov-grid';
    list.innerHTML = items.map(function(item) {
      var pct = Math.min(100, Math.max(0, parseInt(item.pct, 10) || 0));
      var countHint = item.count != null && item.total
        ? '<div class="dash-cov-count">' + item.count + '/' + item.total + '</div>' : '';
      return '<div class="dash-cov-cell" title="' + escDashAttr(item.label) + ' โ€” ' + pct + '%">' +
        '<div class="dash-cov-pct">' + pct + '%</div>' +
        '<div class="dash-cov-bar-track"><div class="dash-cov-bar-fill' + coverageBarTone(pct) +
        '" style="height:' + pct + '%;"></div></div>' +
        '<div class="dash-cov-label">' + escDashHtml(shortenCoverageLabel(item.label)) + '</div>' +
        countHint + '</div>';
    }).join('');
  }
  function updateDashboardLayoutForRole() {
    var isAdmin = getCurrentRole() === 'admin';
    var calCard = document.getElementById('dash-calendar-card');
    var quickMenu = document.getElementById('dash-quick-menu-card');
    var adminCharts = document.getElementById('dash-admin-charts');
    var row = document.getElementById('dash-calendar-row');
    if (calCard) calCard.style.display = isAdmin ? 'none' : '';
    if (quickMenu) quickMenu.style.display = 'none';
    var adminExtra = document.getElementById('dash-admin-extra-stats');
    var adminAlerts = document.getElementById('dash-admin-alerts');
    var adminKpi = document.getElementById('dash-admin-kpi-card');
    var adminRecent = document.getElementById('dash-admin-recent-card');
    var warnAlert = document.getElementById('dash-warning-alert');
    if (adminExtra) adminExtra.style.display = isAdmin ? 'grid' : 'none';
    if (adminAlerts) adminAlerts.style.display = isAdmin ? 'grid' : 'none';
    if (adminKpi) adminKpi.style.display = isAdmin ? 'flex' : 'none';
    if (adminRecent) adminRecent.style.display = isAdmin ? 'block' : 'none';
    if (warnAlert) warnAlert.style.display = isAdmin ? 'none' : '';
    if (row) row.style.gridTemplateColumns = isAdmin ? '1fr' : '';
    var dashSec = document.getElementById('section-dashboard');
    var dashActive = dashSec && dashSec.classList.contains('active');
    if (dashSec) dashSec.classList.toggle('dash-admin-view', isAdmin);
    document.body.classList.toggle('dash-admin-view', isAdmin);
    var showAdminDash = isAdmin && dashActive;
    if (adminCharts) adminCharts.style.display = showAdminDash ? 'block' : 'none';
    var infoBanner = document.getElementById('dash-info-banner');
    if (infoBanner) infoBanner.style.display = isAdmin ? 'none' : '';
    var gradeRegistry = document.getElementById('dash-grade-registry-card');
    if (gradeRegistry) gradeRegistry.style.display = isAdmin ? 'none' : '';
    var visitLabel = document.getElementById('todayVisitLabel');
    if (visitLabel) {
      visitLabel.textContent = isAdmin
        ? (visitLabel.getAttribute('data-admin-text') || 'เนเธซเนเธเธฃเธดเธเธฒเธฃเธซเนเธญเธเธเธขเธฒเธเธฒเธฅ')
        : (visitLabel.getAttribute('data-staff-text') || 'เธกเธฒเธฃเธฑเธเธเธฃเธดเธเธฒเธฃเธงเธฑเธเธเธตเน');
    }
    var dashTitle = document.querySelector('#section-dashboard .page-header-title');
    if (dashTitle) {
      dashTitle.textContent = isAdmin
        ? 'เนเธ”เธเธเธญเธฃเนเธ”เธ เธฒเธเธฃเธงเธกเธเธฒเธเธญเธเธฒเธกเธฑเธขเนเธฃเธเน€เธฃเธตเธขเธ'
        : 'เนเธ”เธเธเธญเธฃเนเธ”เธเธฒเธเธญเธเธฒเธกเธฑเธขเนเธฃเธเน€เธฃเธตเธขเธ';
    }
  }
  function renderDashboardCalendar(data, editable) {
    const ul = document.getElementById('calendar-tasks');
    if (!ul) return;
    if (getCurrentRole() === 'admin') return;
    ul.innerHTML = data.calendar.map(function(item, i) {
      const checkCls = item.done ? 'check-box checked' : 'check-box';
      const checkContent = item.done ? 'โ“' : '';
      const toggleFn = editable
        ? 'onclick="toggleDashCalendar(' + i + ', this)"'
        : (item.done ? '' : 'style="opacity:0.5;pointer-events:none;"');
      let body;
      if (editable) {
        body = '<div class="dash-cal-dates">' +
          '<span class="dash-cal-date-label">เธงเธฑเธเน€เธฃเธดเนเธก</span>' +
          '<input type="date" class="dash-cal-input dash-cal-input-date" value="' + escDashAttr(item.dateStart) + '" onchange="updateDashCalendarField(' + i + ', \'dateStart\', this.value)">' +
          '<span class="dash-cal-date-label">เธงเธฑเธเธชเธดเนเธเธชเธธเธ”</span>' +
          '<input type="date" class="dash-cal-input dash-cal-input-date" value="' + escDashAttr(item.dateEnd) + '" onchange="updateDashCalendarField(' + i + ', \'dateEnd\', this.value)">' +
          '</div>' +
          '<input type="text" class="dash-cal-input" style="width:100%;max-width:420px;" value="' + escDashAttr(item.text) + '" placeholder="เธฃเธฒเธขเธฅเธฐเน€เธญเธตเธขเธ”เธเธฒเธ" onblur="updateDashCalendarField(' + i + ', \'text\', this.value)">';
      } else {
        body = '<strong>' + formatDashCalendarDate(item.dateStart) + '</strong> โ€“ <strong>' + formatDashCalendarDate(item.dateEnd) + '</strong> โ€” ' + escDashHtml(item.text);
      }
      return '<li><div class="' + checkCls + '" ' + toggleFn + '>' + checkContent + '</div><div>' + body + '</div></li>';
    }).join('');
  }
  function renderDashboardCoverage(data, editable) {
    const list = ensureDashCoverageContainer();
    if (!list) return;
    var isAdmin = getCurrentRole() === 'admin';
    if (isAdmin) return;
    const items = typeof computeLiveCoverageItems === 'function' ? computeLiveCoverageItems() : (data.coverage || []);
    const updatedEl = document.getElementById('dash-coverage-updated');
    if (updatedEl) updatedEl.textContent = 'เธญเธฑเธเน€เธ”เธ• ' + new Date().toLocaleTimeString('th-TH');
    list.className = '';
    list.innerHTML = items.map(function(item, i) {
      const pct = Math.min(100, Math.max(0, parseInt(item.pct, 10) || 0));
      const isLast = i === items.length - 1;
      const mb = isLast ? '' : 'margin-bottom:10px;';
      const countHint = item.count != null && item.total ? ' (' + item.count + '/' + item.total + ')' : '';
      return '<div style="' + mb + '">' +
        '<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;font-size:12px;margin-bottom:2px;gap:8px;"><span style="flex:1;">' + escDashHtml(item.label) + '</span><span style="white-space:nowrap;">' + pct + '%' + countHint + '</span></div>' +
        '<div class="progress-bar-wrap"><div class="progress-bar" style="width:' + pct + '%"></div></div></div>';
    }).join('');
  }
  function renderDashboardWarning(data, editable) {
    const wrap = document.getElementById('dash-warning-content');
    if (!wrap) return;
    if (editable) {
      wrap.innerHTML = '<strong>เนเธเนเธเน€เธ•เธทเธญเธ:</strong><textarea class="dash-edit-textarea" onblur="updateDashboardField(\'warningText\', this.value)">' + escDashHtml(data.warningText) + '</textarea>';
    } else {
      wrap.innerHTML = '<strong>เนเธเนเธเน€เธ•เธทเธญเธ:</strong> ' + escDashHtml(data.warningText);
    }
  }
  function renderDashboard() {
    if (!staffRolesReady()) return;
    var role = getCurrentRole();
    if (!role || STAFF_ROLES.indexOf(role) === -1) return;
    const editable = STAFF_ROLES.includes(getCurrentRole()) && getCurrentRole() !== 'admin';
    const isAdmin = getCurrentRole() === 'admin';
    const data = isAdmin ? getAdminDashboardDisplayData() : loadDashboard();
    visitCount = parseInt(data.todayVisit, 10) || 0;
    renderDashStatNum('dashStaffCount', data.staffCount, 'staffCount', editable);
    renderDashStatNum('todayVisit', data.todayVisit, 'todayVisit', editable);
    renderDashStatNum('referralCount', data.referralCount, 'referralCount', editable);
    renderDashStatNum('screenedCount', data.screenedCount, 'screenedCount', editable);
    renderDashStatNum('alertCount', data.alertCount, 'alertCount', editable);
    renderDashboardWarning(data, editable);
    renderDashboardCalendar(data, editable && getCurrentRole() !== 'admin');
    renderDashboardCoverage(data, editable);
    updateDashboardLayoutForRole();
    renderAdminDashboardCharts();
    renderAdminDashboardExtras();
    updateStudentCounts();
  }
  function renderAdminStatNum(elId, value) {
    var el = document.getElementById(elId);
    if (!el) return;
    el.textContent = (parseInt(value, 10) || 0).toLocaleString('th-TH');
  }
  function renderAdminDashboardExtras() {
    if (getCurrentRole() !== 'admin') return;
    var sample = DASHBOARD_ADMIN_SAMPLE;
    var xs = sample.extraStats || {};
    renderAdminStatNum('admin-stat-chronic', xs.chronicCount);
    renderAdminStatNum('admin-stat-emergency', xs.emergencyYear);
    renderAdminStatNum('admin-stat-appointment', xs.appointmentsUpcoming);
    renderAdminStatNum('admin-stat-medicine', xs.medicineLow);
    renderAdminStatNum('admin-stat-nutrition', xs.nutritionRisk);
    renderAdminStatNum('admin-stat-mental', xs.mentalRisk);
    var alertsEl = document.getElementById('dash-admin-alerts');
    if (alertsEl && sample.alerts) {
      alertsEl.innerHTML = sample.alerts.map(function(a) {
        return '<div class="dash-admin-alert-item ' + escDashHtml(a.type) + '"><span>' + a.icon +
          '</span><div>' + escDashHtml(a.text) + '</div></div>';
      }).join('');
    }
    var kpiRow = document.getElementById('dash-admin-kpi-row');
    if (kpiRow && sample.kpi) {
      kpiRow.innerHTML = sample.kpi.map(function(k) {
        return '<div class="dash-admin-kpi"><div class="dash-admin-kpi-val">' + escDashHtml(k.value) +
          '</div><div class="dash-admin-kpi-label">' + escDashHtml(k.label) +
          (k.sub ? '<br><span style="font-size:10px;opacity:0.85;">' + escDashHtml(k.sub) + '</span>' : '') +
          '</div></div>';
      }).join('');
    }
    var recentBody = document.getElementById('admin-recent-activity');
    if (recentBody && sample.recentActivity) {
      recentBody.innerHTML = sample.recentActivity.map(function(r) {
        return '<tr><td>' + escDashHtml(r.time) + '</td><td>' + escDashHtml(r.id) +
          '</td><td>' + escDashHtml(r.name) + '</td><td>' + escDashHtml(r.cls) +
          '</td><td>' + escDashHtml(r.symptom) + '</td><td>' + escDashHtml(r.status) + '</td></tr>';
      }).join('');
    }
  }
  function updateDashboardField(field, value) {
    if (!STAFF_ROLES.includes(getCurrentRole())) return;
    const nums = ['staffCount', 'todayVisit', 'referralCount', 'screenedCount', 'alertCount'];
    const d = loadDashboard();
    if (nums.indexOf(field) !== -1) {
      d[field] = Math.max(0, parseInt(value, 10) || 0);
    } else if (field === 'warningText') {
      d.warningText = (value || '').trim();
    } else return;
    saveDashboard(d);
    if (field === 'staffCount') updateStudentCounts();
    else if (field === 'todayVisit') renderDashStatNum('todayVisit', d.todayVisit, 'todayVisit', true);
  }
  function updateDashCalendarField(index, key, value) {
    if (!STAFF_ROLES.includes(getCurrentRole()) || getCurrentRole() === 'admin') return;
    const d = loadDashboard();
    if (!d.calendar[index]) return;
    d.calendar[index][key] = (value || '').trim();
    saveDashboard(d);
  }
  function toggleDashCalendar(index, el) {
    if (!STAFF_ROLES.includes(getCurrentRole()) || getCurrentRole() === 'admin') return;
    const d = loadDashboard();
    if (!d.calendar[index]) return;
    d.calendar[index].done = !d.calendar[index].done;
    saveDashboard(d);
    renderDashboardCalendar(d, true);
  }

  function loadEmergencyRecords() {
    let records = [];
    try { records = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('sh-emergency') || '[]'); } catch (e) {}
    return records;
  }
  function renderEmergencyRecords() {
    const tbody = document.getElementById('emergency-records-body');
    if (!tbody) return;
    const records = loadEmergencyRecords().slice().sort(function(a, b) { return (b.savedAt || 0) - (a.savedAt || 0); });
    if (!records.length) {
      tbody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="6" style="text-align:center;color:var(--gray-mid);padding:18px;">เธขเธฑเธเนเธกเนเธกเธตเธฃเธฒเธขเธเธฒเธฃเธเธฑเธเธ—เธถเธ</td></tr>';
      return;
    }
    tbody.innerHTML = records.map(function(r) {
      return '<tr><td>' + escDashHtml(r.eventAt || r.recordedAt) + '</td><td>' + escDashHtml(r.name) +
        '</td><td>' + escDashHtml(r.type) + '</td><td>' + escDashHtml(r.location || 'โ€”') +
        '</td><td>' + escDashHtml(r.firstaid || 'โ€”') + '</td><td>' + escDashHtml(r.result) + '</td></tr>';
    }).join('');
  }
  function saveEmergency() {
    const name = (document.getElementById('emg-name').value || '').trim();
    const type = document.getElementById('emg-type').value;
    const location = (document.getElementById('emg-location').value || '').trim();
    const firstaid = (document.getElementById('emg-firstaid').value || '').trim();
    const result = document.getElementById('emg-result').value;
    if (!name) {
      alert('เธเธฃเธธเธ“เธฒเธเธฃเธญเธเธเธทเนเธญเธเธนเนเธเธฒเธ”เน€เธเนเธ/เน€เธเนเธเธเนเธงเธข');
      return;
    }
    const now = new Date();
    const record = {
      name: name,
      type: type,
      location: location,
      firstaid: firstaid,
      result: result,
      eventAt: now.toLocaleString('th-TH'),
      recordedAt: now.toLocaleString('th-TH'),
      savedAt: now.getTime()
    };
    const records = loadEmergencyRecords();
    records.unshift(record);
    try { localStorage.setItem('sh-emergency', JSON.stringify(records)); } catch (e) {}
    document.getElementById('emg-name').value = '';
    document.getElementById('emg-location').value = '';
    document.getElementById('emg-firstaid').value = '';
    renderEmergencyRecords();
    maybeCreateReferralFromCare(record, 'emergency');
    syncToSheetQuiet(SHEET_NAMES.emergency, buildEmergencySheetRow(record));
    alert('โ… เธเธฑเธเธ—เธถเธเน€เธซเธ•เธธเธเธธเธเน€เธเธดเธเธชเธณเน€เธฃเนเธ');
    notifyReportDataChanged();
  }
  (function initEmergencyRecords() {
    renderEmergencyRecords();
  })();

  var DISEASE_SITUATION_DEFAULT = [
    { disease: 'เนเธเนเธซเธงเธฑเธ”', patients: '5 เธเธ', room: 'เธก.3/2', advice: 'เธ”เธทเนเธกเธเนเธณเธกเธฒเธ เนเธขเธเธเธนเนเธเนเธงเธข เธชเธฑเธเน€เธเธ•เธญเธฒเธเธฒเธฃเนเธเนเธชเธนเธ เนเธเนเธเธเธฃเธนเธซเธฒเธเนเธกเนเธ”เธตเธเธถเนเธ', status: 'เน€เธเนเธฒเธฃเธฐเธงเธฑเธ', badge: 'badge-gold' },
    { disease: 'เน€เธซเธฒ', patients: '12 เธเธ', room: 'เธก.1/1-4', advice: 'เนเธเนเธเธเธนเนเธเธเธเธฃเธญเธ เนเธกเนเนเธเนเธซเธงเธต/เธซเธกเธงเธเธฃเนเธงเธกเธเธฑเธ เนเธซเนเธขเธฒเธ•เธฒเธกเนเธเธงเธ—เธฒเธ เธ•เธฃเธงเธเธเธฑเธ”เธเธฃเธญเธเธซเนเธญเธเน€เธฃเธตเธขเธ', status: 'เธเธณเธฅเธฑเธเธ”เธนเนเธฅ', badge: 'badge-gold' }
  ];
  function loadDiseaseSituation() {
    let items = [];
    try { items = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('sh-disease-situation') || '[]'); } catch (e) {}
    if (!items.length) return DISEASE_SITUATION_DEFAULT.map(function(x) { return Object.assign({}, x); });
    return items.map(function(item, i) {
      const def = DISEASE_SITUATION_DEFAULT[i] || {};
      return {
        disease: item.disease || def.disease || '',
        patients: item.patients || def.patients || '',
        room: item.room || def.room || '',
        advice: item.advice || def.advice || '',
        status: item.status || def.status || '',
        badge: item.badge || def.badge || 'badge-gold'
      };
    });
  }
  function renderDiseaseSituation() {
    if (!staffRolesReady()) return;
    const isStaff = STAFF_ROLES.includes(getCurrentRole());
    const head = document.getElementById('disease-situation-head');
    const tbody = document.getElementById('disease-situation-body');
    const twoCol = document.getElementById('disease-two-col');
    if (!head || !tbody) return;
    if (twoCol) twoCol.style.gridTemplateColumns = isStaff ? '' : '1fr';
    const items = loadDiseaseSituation();
    if (isStaff) {
      head.innerHTML = '<tr><th>เนเธฃเธ</th><th>เธเธนเนเธเนเธงเธข</th><th>เธซเนเธญเธ</th><th>เธเธณเนเธเธฐเธเธณ</th><th>เธชเธ–เธฒเธเธฐ</th></tr>';
      tbody.innerHTML = items.map(function(r) {
        return '<tr><td>' + escDashHtml(r.disease) + '</td><td>' + escDashHtml(r.patients) +
          '</td><td>' + escDashHtml(r.room) + '</td><td>' + escDashHtml(r.advice) +
          '</td><td><span class="badge ' + r.badge + '">' + escDashHtml(r.status) + '</span></td></tr>';
      }).join('');
    } else {
      head.innerHTML = '<tr><th>เนเธฃเธ</th><th>เธเธณเนเธเธฐเธเธณ</th><th>เธชเธ–เธฒเธเธฐ</th></tr>';
      tbody.innerHTML = items.map(function(r) {
        return '<tr><td>' + escDashHtml(r.disease) + '</td><td>' + escDashHtml(r.advice) +
          '</td><td><span class="badge ' + r.badge + '">' + escDashHtml(r.status) + '</span></td></tr>';
      }).join('');
    }
  }

  function loadDiseaseReports() {
    let records = [];
    try { records = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('sh-disease-reports') || '[]'); } catch (e) {}
    return records;
  }
  function saveDiseaseReports(records) {
    try { localStorage.setItem('sh-disease-reports', JSON.stringify(records)); } catch (e) {}
  }
  function renderDiseaseReports() {
    const tbody = document.getElementById('disease-reports-body');
    if (!tbody) return;
    const records = loadDiseaseReports().filter(function(r) { return r.source === 'student'; })
      .slice().sort(function(a, b) { return (b.savedAt || 0) - (a.savedAt || 0); });
    if (!records.length) {
      tbody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="6" style="text-align:center;color:var(--gray-mid);padding:18px;">เธขเธฑเธเนเธกเนเธกเธตเธฃเธฒเธขเธเธฒเธฃเธฃเธฒเธขเธเธฒเธเธเธฒเธเธเธฑเธเน€เธฃเธตเธขเธ</td></tr>';
      return;
    }
    tbody.innerHTML = records.map(function(r) {
      const badge = r.status === 'เธ”เธณเน€เธเธดเธเธเธฒเธฃเนเธฅเนเธง' ? 'badge-green' : 'badge-gold';
      return '<tr><td>' + escDashHtml(r.recordedAt) + '</td><td>' + escDashHtml(r.id) +
        '</td><td>' + escDashHtml(r.name) + '</td><td>' + escDashHtml(r.disease) +
        '</td><td>' + escDashHtml(r.note || 'โ€”') + '</td><td><span class="badge ' + badge + '">' +
        escDashHtml(r.status || 'เธฃเธญเธ•เธฃเธงเธเธชเธญเธ') + '</span></td></tr>';
    }).join('');
  }
  function renderStudentDiseaseHistory() {
    const tbody = document.getElementById('disease-student-history-body');
    const scopeId = getLimitedUserScopeId();
    if (!tbody || !scopeId) return;
    const mine = loadDiseaseReports().filter(function(r) {
      return r.source === 'student' && visitIdMatch(r.id, scopeId);
    }).slice().sort(function(a, b) { return (b.savedAt || 0) - (a.savedAt || 0); });
    if (!mine.length) {
      tbody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="4" style="text-align:center;color:var(--gray-mid);padding:16px;">เธขเธฑเธเนเธกเนเธกเธตเธฃเธฒเธขเธเธฒเธ โ€” เธเธฃเธญเธเนเธเธเธเธญเธฃเนเธกเธ”เนเธฒเธเธเธเนเธฅเนเธงเธเธ”เธฃเธฒเธขเธเธฒเธเธ”เนเธงเธ</td></tr>';
      return;
    }
    tbody.innerHTML = mine.map(function(r) {
      const badge = r.status === 'เธ”เธณเน€เธเธดเธเธเธฒเธฃเนเธฅเนเธง' ? 'badge-green' : 'badge-gold';
      return '<tr><td>' + escDashHtml(r.recordedAt) + '</td><td>' + escDashHtml(r.disease) +
        '</td><td>' + escDashHtml(r.note || 'โ€”') + '</td><td><span class="badge ' + badge + '">' +
        escDashHtml(r.status || 'เธฃเธญเธ•เธฃเธงเธเธชเธญเธ') + '</span></td></tr>';
    }).join('');
  }
  function fillStudentDiseaseForm() {
    if (!isLimitedUser()) return;
    const isStudentLogin = getCurrentRole() === 'student' && loggedInStudentId;
    setLimitedUserFieldMode(!!isStudentLogin);
    const idEl = document.getElementById('dis-stu-id');
    const nameEl = document.getElementById('dis-stu-name');
    if (isStudentLogin) {
      const d = (typeof lookupStudent === 'function') ? lookupStudent(loggedInStudentId) : null;
      if (idEl) idEl.value = loggedInStudentId;
      if (nameEl) nameEl.value = (d && d.fullName) ? d.fullName : '';
    } else if (getCurrentRole() === 'teacher') {
      if (idEl) idEl.value = '';
      if (nameEl) nameEl.value = '';
    }
    const diseaseEl = document.getElementById('dis-stu-disease');
    const dateEl = document.getElementById('dis-stu-date');
    const noteEl = document.getElementById('dis-stu-note');
    if (diseaseEl) diseaseEl.selectedIndex = 0;
    if (dateEl) dateEl.value = '';
    if (noteEl) noteEl.value = '';
    renderStudentDiseaseHistory();
  }
  function saveStudentDiseaseReport() {
    const id = (document.getElementById('dis-stu-id').value || '').trim();
    const name = (document.getElementById('dis-stu-name').value || '').trim();
    const disease = document.getElementById('dis-stu-disease').value;
    const date = (document.getElementById('dis-stu-date').value || '').trim();
    const note = (document.getElementById('dis-stu-note').value || '').trim();
    if (!id || !disease) {
      alert('เธเธฃเธธเธ“เธฒเน€เธฅเธทเธญเธเนเธฃเธเธ—เธตเนเธเธ / เธชเธเธชเธฑเธข');
      return;
    }
    const now = new Date();
    const record = {
      source: 'student',
      id: id,
      name: name,
      disease: disease,
      symptomDate: date,
      note: note,
      status: 'เธฃเธญเธ•เธฃเธงเธเธชเธญเธ',
      recordedAt: now.toLocaleString('th-TH'),
      savedAt: now.getTime()
    };
    const records = loadDiseaseReports();
    records.unshift(record);
    saveDiseaseReports(records);
    document.getElementById('dis-stu-date').value = '';
    document.getElementById('dis-stu-note').value = '';
    renderStudentDiseaseHistory();
    renderDiseaseReports();
    syncToSheetQuiet(SHEET_NAMES.diseaseStudent, buildDiseaseStudentSheetRow(record));
    notifyReportDataChanged();
    alert('๐จ เธชเนเธเธฃเธฒเธขเธเธฒเธเธ”เนเธงเธเธชเธณเน€เธฃเนเธ โ€” เน€เธเนเธฒเธซเธเนเธฒเธ—เธตเนเธเธฐเธ•เธดเธ”เธ•เธฒเธกเนเธ”เธขเน€เธฃเนเธง');
  }
  function saveStaffDiseaseReport() {
    const disease = document.getElementById('dis-disease').value;
    const patients = (document.getElementById('dis-patients').value || '').trim();
    const room = (document.getElementById('dis-room').value || '').trim();
    const date = (document.getElementById('dis-date').value || '').trim();
    const measures = [];
    document.querySelectorAll('#dis-measures input[type="checkbox"]:checked').forEach(function(cb) {
      measures.push(cb.value);
    });
    if (!disease) {
      alert('เธเธฃเธธเธ“เธฒเน€เธฅเธทเธญเธเนเธฃเธเธ—เธตเนเธเธ');
      return;
    }
    const now = new Date();
    const record = {
      source: 'staff',
      disease: disease,
      patients: patients,
      room: room,
      startDate: date,
      measures: measures,
      recordedAt: now.toLocaleString('th-TH'),
      savedAt: now.getTime()
    };
    const records = loadDiseaseReports();
    records.unshift(record);
    saveDiseaseReports(records);
    document.getElementById('dis-patients').value = '';
    document.getElementById('dis-room').value = '';
    document.getElementById('dis-date').value = '';
    document.querySelectorAll('#dis-measures input[type="checkbox"]').forEach(function(cb) { cb.checked = false; });
    syncToSheetQuiet(SHEET_NAMES.diseaseStaff, buildDiseaseStaffSheetRow(record));
    renderDiseaseReports();
    notifyReportDataChanged();
    alert('๐จ เธฃเธฒเธขเธเธฒเธเธ”เนเธงเธเธชเธณเน€เธฃเนเธ โ€” เธเธฑเธเธ—เธถเธเธเนเธญเธกเธนเธฅเนเธฅเนเธง');
  }
  (function initDiseaseReports() {
    renderDiseaseReports();
  })();

  var ENV_CHECKLIST_ITEMS = [
    'เธซเนเธญเธเธเธขเธฒเธเธฒเธฅเธเธเธฒเธ” โฅ64 เธ•เธฃ.เธก. (เนเธฃเธเน€เธฃเธตเธขเธเธเธเธฒเธ”เนเธซเธเนเธเธดเน€เธจเธฉ) โ€” เธกเธตเน€เธ•เธตเธขเธเธญเธขเนเธฒเธเธเนเธญเธข 6 เน€เธ•เธตเธขเธ เนเธขเธเธเธฒเธข-เธซเธเธดเธ',

    'เธกเธตเธซเนเธญเธเธเนเธณเนเธเธซเนเธญเธเธเธขเธฒเธเธฒเธฅเธซเธฃเธทเธญเนเธเธฅเนเน€เธเธตเธขเธ',
    'เธชเธณเธฃเธงเธเนเธฅเธฐเธเธณเธเธฑเธ”เนเธซเธฅเนเธเน€เธเธฒเธฐเธเธฑเธเธเธธเนเธขเธธเธเธเนเธญเธเน€เธเธดเธ”เธ เธฒเธเน€เธฃเธตเธขเธ',
