  function loadEnvironmentInspections() {
    let records = [];
    try { records = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('sh-environment') || '[]'); } catch (e) {}
    return records;
  }
  function saveEnvironmentInspections(records) {
    try { localStorage.setItem('sh-environment', JSON.stringify(records)); } catch (e) {}
  }
  function ensureEnvironmentSeed() {
    let records = loadEnvironmentInspections();
    if (records.length) return records;
    const now = Date.now() - 604800000;
    records = [{
      items: ENV_CHECKLIST_ITEMS.map(function(text, i) {
        return { text: text, checked: i !== 5 };
      }),
      passCount: 7,
      total: ENV_CHECKLIST_ITEMS.length,
      recordedAt: new Date(now).toLocaleString('th-TH'),
      savedAt: now,
      recordedBy: 'เน€เธเนเธฒเธซเธเนเธฒเธ—เธตเนเธญเธเธฒเธกเธฑเธข'
    }];
    saveEnvironmentInspections(records);
    return records;
  }
  function renderEnvironmentResults() {
    const tbody = document.getElementById('environment-results-body');
    if (!tbody) return;
    const records = ensureEnvironmentSeed().slice().sort(function(a, b) {
      return (b.savedAt || 0) - (a.savedAt || 0);
    });
    if (!records.length) {
      tbody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="5" style="text-align:center;color:var(--gray-mid);padding:18px;">เธขเธฑเธเนเธกเนเธกเธตเธเธฅเธ•เธฃเธงเธ โ€” เน€เธเนเธฒเธซเธเนเธฒเธ—เธตเนเธญเธเธฒเธกเธฑเธขเธชเธฒเธกเธฒเธฃเธ–เธเธฑเธเธ—เธถเธเธเธฅเธ•เธฃเธงเธเนเธ”เน</td></tr>';
      return;
    }
    tbody.innerHTML = records.map(function(r) {
      const passed = (r.items || []).filter(function(it) { return it.checked; });
      const failed = (r.items || []).filter(function(it) { return !it.checked; });
      const passCount = r.passCount != null ? r.passCount : passed.length;
      const total = r.total || ENV_CHECKLIST_ITEMS.length;
      const allPass = passCount >= total;
      const badge = allPass ? 'badge-green' : (passCount >= total - 2 ? 'badge-gold' : 'badge-red');
      const summary = passCount + '/' + total + ' เธเนเธญ';
      const passedText = passed.length
        ? passed.map(function(it) { return escDashHtml(it.text); }).join('<br>')
        : 'โ€”';
      const failedText = failed.length
        ? failed.map(function(it) { return escDashHtml(it.text); }).join('<br>')
        : 'โ€”';
      return '<tr><td>' + escDashHtml(r.recordedAt) + '</td><td><span class="badge ' + badge + '">' +
        escDashHtml(summary) + '</span></td><td style="font-size:12px;line-height:1.5;">' + passedText +
        '</td><td style="font-size:12px;line-height:1.5;">' + failedText +
        '</td><td>' + escDashHtml(r.recordedBy || 'เน€เธเนเธฒเธซเธเนเธฒเธ—เธตเนเธญเธเธฒเธกเธฑเธข') + '</td></tr>';
    }).join('');
  }
  function clearEnvironmentChecklist() {
    document.querySelectorAll('#env-checklist .check-box').forEach(function(el) {
      el.classList.remove('checked');
      el.textContent = '';
    });
  }
  function saveEnvironmentInspection() {
    if (getCurrentRole() !== 'nurse') return;
    const items = ENV_CHECKLIST_ITEMS.map(function(text, i) {
      const box = document.querySelector('#env-checklist .check-box[data-env-idx="' + i + '"]');
      return { text: text, checked: box && box.classList.contains('checked') };
    });
    const passCount = items.filter(function(it) { return it.checked; }).length;
    const now = new Date();
    const record = {
      items: items,
      passCount: passCount,
      total: ENV_CHECKLIST_ITEMS.length,
      recordedAt: now.toLocaleString('th-TH'),
      savedAt: now.getTime(),
      recordedBy: 'เน€เธเนเธฒเธซเธเนเธฒเธ—เธตเนเธญเธเธฒเธกเธฑเธข'
    };
    const records = loadEnvironmentInspections();
    records.unshift(record);
    saveEnvironmentInspections(records);
    clearEnvironmentChecklist();
    renderEnvironmentResults();
    syncToSheetQuiet(SHEET_NAMES.environment, buildEnvironmentSheetRow(record));
    alert('โ… เธเธฑเธเธ—เธถเธเธเธฅเธ•เธฃเธงเธเธชเธณเน€เธฃเนเธ (' + passCount + '/' + ENV_CHECKLIST_ITEMS.length + ' เธเนเธญ)');
  }
  (function initEnvironmentResults() {
    renderEnvironmentResults();
  })();

  // ===== เธชเนเธเธ•เนเธญ & เธ•เธดเธ”เธ•เธฒเธกเธเธฅ =====
  function loadReferralRecords() {
    try { return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('sh-referral') || '[]'); } catch (e) { return []; }
  }
  function saveReferralRecords(records) {
    try { localStorage.setItem('sh-referral', JSON.stringify(records)); } catch (e) {}
  }
  function formatReferralDate(record) {
    if (record.recordedAt) {
      const parts = String(record.recordedAt).split(' ');
      if (parts[0]) return parts[0];
    }
    if (record.savedAt) {
      return new Date(record.savedAt).toLocaleDateString('th-TH');
    }
    return 'โ€”';
  }
  function fillReferralFromId() {
    const id = (document.getElementById('ref-id').value || '').trim();
    if (!id || typeof lookupStudent !== 'function') return;
    const student = lookupStudent(id);
    if (!student) return;
    const nameEl = document.getElementById('ref-name');
    if (nameEl && student.fullName) nameEl.value = student.fullName;
    const classEl = document.getElementById('ref-class');
    if (classEl && student.classLevel) {
      for (const opt of classEl.options) {
        if (student.classLevel.indexOf(opt.value) === 0 || opt.text === student.classLevel) {
          classEl.value = opt.value;
          break;
        }
      }
    }
  }
  function syncReferralDashboardCount() {
    const pending = loadReferralRecords().filter(function(r) { return r.status === 'เธฃเธญเธ•เธดเธ”เธ•เธฒเธก'; }).length;
    const d = loadDashboard();
    d.referralCount = pending;
    saveDashboard(d);
    const el = document.getElementById('referralCount');
    if (el && staffRolesReady() && STAFF_ROLES.includes(getCurrentRole())) {
      renderDashStatNum('referralCount', pending, 'referralCount', true);
    } else if (el) {
      el.textContent = pending.toLocaleString('th-TH');
    }
  }
  function maybeCreateReferralFromCare(record, source, silent) {
    if ((record.result || '').indexOf('เธชเนเธเธ•เนเธญ') === -1) return false;
    const records = loadReferralRecords();
    const sourceKey = source + ':' + (record.savedAt || '') + ':' + (record.id || record.name || '');
    if (records.some(function(r) { return r.sourceKey === sourceKey; })) return false;
    const now = Date.now();
    const ref = {
      uid: 'ref-' + now + '-' + Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 7),
      id: record.id || '',
      name: record.name || 'โ€”',
      class: record.class || 'โ€”',
      hospital: record.hospital || 'เธขเธฑเธเนเธกเนเธฃเธฐเธเธธ',
      urgency: source === 'emergency' ? 'เธเธธเธเน€เธเธดเธ (เน€เธฃเธตเธขเธ 1669)' : 'เธ”เนเธงเธ',
      reason: (record.symptom || record.firstaid || record.diagnosis || record.type || '').trim() || 'เธชเนเธเธ•เนเธญเธเธฒเธเธเธฑเธเธ—เธถเธเธเธฒเธฃเธฃเธฑเธเธฉเธฒ',
      parentNotified: 'เธขเธฑเธเนเธกเนเนเธ”เนเนเธเนเธ',
      note: source === 'visit' ? 'เธชเธฃเนเธฒเธเธญเธฑเธ•เนเธเธกเธฑเธ•เธดเธเธฒเธเธเธฑเธเธ—เธถเธเธเธฒเธฃเธฃเธฑเธเธฉเธฒ' : 'เธชเธฃเนเธฒเธเธญเธฑเธ•เนเธเธกเธฑเธ•เธดเธเธฒเธเน€เธซเธ•เธธเธเธธเธเน€เธเธดเธ',
      status: 'เธฃเธญเธ•เธดเธ”เธ•เธฒเธก',
      followupNote: '',
      source: source,
      sourceKey: sourceKey,
      recordedAt: record.recordedAt || new Date(now).toLocaleString('th-TH'),
      savedAt: record.savedAt || now,
      followedUpAt: null
    };
    records.unshift(ref);
    saveReferralRecords(records);
    if (typeof syncToSheetQuiet === 'function' && typeof SHEET_NAMES !== 'undefined' && SHEET_NAMES.referral && typeof buildReferralSheetRow === 'function') {
      syncToSheetQuiet(SHEET_NAMES.referral, buildReferralSheetRow(ref));
    }
    if (!silent) {
      syncReferralDashboardCount();
      notifyReportDataChanged();
    }
    return true;
  }
  function migrateReferralsFromCare() {
    if (localStorage.getItem('sh-referral-migrated-v1')) return;
    let created = false;
    loadVisitRecords().forEach(function(r) {
      if (maybeCreateReferralFromCare(r, 'visit', true)) created = true;
    });
    loadEmergencyRecords().forEach(function(r) {
      if (maybeCreateReferralFromCare(r, 'emergency', true)) created = true;
    });
    localStorage.setItem('sh-referral-migrated-v1', '1');
    if (created) {
      syncReferralDashboardCount();
      notifyReportDataChanged();
    }
  }
  function saveReferral() {
    const name = (document.getElementById('ref-name').value || '').trim();
    const hospital = (document.getElementById('ref-hospital').value || '').trim();
    const reason = (document.getElementById('ref-reason').value || '').trim();
    if (!name) {
      alert('เธเธฃเธธเธ“เธฒเธเธฃเธญเธเธเธทเนเธญ-เธเธฒเธกเธชเธเธธเธฅ');
      document.getElementById('ref-name').focus();
      return;
    }
    if (!hospital) {
      alert('เธเธฃเธธเธ“เธฒเธฃเธฐเธเธธเธชเธ–เธฒเธเธเธขเธฒเธเธฒเธฅเธ—เธตเนเธชเนเธเธ•เนเธญ');
      document.getElementById('ref-hospital').focus();
      return;
    }
    const now = Date.now();
    const record = {
      uid: 'ref-' + now + '-' + Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 7),
      id: (document.getElementById('ref-id').value || '').trim(),
      name: name,
      class: document.getElementById('ref-class').value,
      hospital: hospital,
      urgency: document.getElementById('ref-urgency').value,
      reason: reason || 'โ€”',
      parentNotified: document.getElementById('ref-parent').value,
      note: (document.getElementById('ref-note').value || '').trim(),
      status: 'เธฃเธญเธ•เธดเธ”เธ•เธฒเธก',
      followupNote: '',
      source: 'manual',
      sourceKey: '',
      recordedAt: new Date(now).toLocaleString('th-TH'),
      savedAt: now,
      followedUpAt: null
    };
    const records = loadReferralRecords();
    records.unshift(record);
    saveReferralRecords(records);
    if (typeof syncToSheetQuiet === 'function' && typeof SHEET_NAMES !== 'undefined' && SHEET_NAMES.referral && typeof buildReferralSheetRow === 'function') {
      syncToSheetQuiet(SHEET_NAMES.referral, buildReferralSheetRow(record));
    }
    document.getElementById('ref-id').value = '';
    document.getElementById('ref-name').value = '';
    document.getElementById('ref-hospital').value = '';
    document.getElementById('ref-reason').value = '';
    document.getElementById('ref-note').value = '';
    syncReferralDashboardCount();
    renderReferralRecords();
    notifyReportDataChanged();
    alert('โ… เธเธฑเธเธ—เธถเธเธเธฒเธฃเธชเนเธเธ•เนเธญเธชเธณเน€เธฃเนเธ');
  }
  function markReferralFollowedUp(uid) {
    const records = loadReferralRecords();
    const idx = records.findIndex(function(r) { return r.uid === uid; });
    if (idx < 0) return;
    const note = prompt('เธเธฅเธเธฒเธฃเธ•เธดเธ”เธ•เธฒเธก (เธ–เนเธฒเธกเธต):', records[idx].followupNote || '');
    if (note === null) return;
    records[idx].status = 'เธ•เธดเธ”เธ•เธฒเธกเนเธฅเนเธง';
    records[idx].followupNote = (note || '').trim();
    records[idx].followedUpAt = Date.now();
    saveReferralRecords(records);
    syncReferralDashboardCount();
    renderReferralRecords();
    notifyReportDataChanged();
  }
  function deleteReferralRecord(uid) {
    if (!confirm('เธฅเธเธฃเธฒเธขเธเธฒเธฃเธชเนเธเธ•เนเธญเธเธตเน?')) return;
    const records = loadReferralRecords().filter(function(r) { return r.uid !== uid; });
    saveReferralRecords(records);
    syncReferralDashboardCount();
    renderReferralRecords();
    notifyReportDataChanged();
  }
  function renderReferralRecords() {
    const tbody = document.getElementById('referral-list-body');
    if (!tbody) return;
    const filter = (document.getElementById('ref-filter') && document.getElementById('ref-filter').value) || 'all';
    let records = loadReferralRecords().slice().sort(function(a, b) { return (b.savedAt || 0) - (a.savedAt || 0); });
    if (filter === 'pending') records = records.filter(function(r) { return r.status === 'เธฃเธญเธ•เธดเธ”เธ•เธฒเธก'; });
    else if (filter === 'done') records = records.filter(function(r) { return r.status === 'เธ•เธดเธ”เธ•เธฒเธกเนเธฅเนเธง'; });
    const pending = loadReferralRecords().filter(function(r) { return r.status === 'เธฃเธญเธ•เธดเธ”เธ•เธฒเธก'; }).length;
    const done = loadReferralRecords().filter(function(r) { return r.status === 'เธ•เธดเธ”เธ•เธฒเธกเนเธฅเนเธง'; }).length;
    const pendingEl = document.getElementById('ref-pending-count');
    const doneEl = document.getElementById('ref-done-count');
    if (pendingEl) pendingEl.textContent = pending.toLocaleString('th-TH');
    if (doneEl) doneEl.textContent = done.toLocaleString('th-TH');
    if (!records.length) {
      tbody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="5" style="text-align:center;color:var(--gray-mid);padding:18px;">เธขเธฑเธเนเธกเนเธกเธตเธฃเธฒเธขเธเธฒเธฃเธชเนเธเธ•เนเธญ</td></tr>';
      return;
    }
    tbody.innerHTML = records.map(function(r) {
      const badge = r.status === 'เธ•เธดเธ”เธ•เธฒเธกเนเธฅเนเธง' ? 'badge-green' : 'badge-gold';
      const hospital = r.hospital || 'โ€”';
      const title = escVisitHtml(r.reason || '') + (r.urgency ? ' ยท ' + escVisitHtml(r.urgency) : '');
      let actions = '';
      if (r.status === 'เธฃเธญเธ•เธดเธ”เธ•เธฒเธก') {
        actions = '<button type="button" class="btn btn-sm btn-primary" onclick="markReferralFollowedUp(\'' + r.uid + '\')">เธ•เธดเธ”เธ•เธฒเธกเนเธฅเนเธง</button>';
      } else {
        actions = '<span style="font-size:11px;color:var(--gray-mid);">' + escVisitHtml(r.followupNote || 'โ€”') + '</span>';
      }
      actions += ' <button type="button" class="btn btn-sm btn-secondary" onclick="deleteReferralRecord(\'' + r.uid + '\')" title="เธฅเธ">โ•</button>';
      return '<tr title="' + title + '"><td>' + escVisitHtml(r.name) +
        '</td><td>' + escVisitHtml(hospital) +
        '</td><td>' + escVisitHtml(formatReferralDate(r)) +
        '</td><td><span class="badge ' + badge + '">' + escVisitHtml(r.status) + '</span></td>' +
        '<td style="white-space:nowrap;">' + actions + '</td></tr>';
    }).join('');
  }
  function initReferralRecords() {
    migrateReferralsFromCare();
    syncReferralDashboardCount();
    renderReferralRecords();
  }

  function persistNewVisitRecord(record) {
    var now = Date.now();
    if (!record.savedAt) record.savedAt = now;
    if (!record.recordId) record.recordId = 'v-' + record.savedAt + '-' + Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 8);
    if (!record.recordedAt) record.recordedAt = new Date(record.savedAt).toLocaleString('th-TH');
    record.timeRepaired = true;
    var records = loadVisitRecords();
    records = records.filter(function(r) { return r.recordId !== record.recordId; });
    records.unshift(record);
    saveVisitRecords(records);
    if (typeof appendStudentHealthVisit === 'function') appendStudentHealthVisit(record);
    maybeCreateReferralFromCare(record, 'visit');
    const d = loadDashboard();
    d.todayVisit = (parseInt(d.todayVisit, 10) || 0) + 1;
    visitCount = d.todayVisit;
    saveDashboard(d);
    renderDashboard();
    var periodEl = document.getElementById('visit-list-period');
    if (periodEl) periodEl.value = 'today';
    renderVisitToday(record.recordId);
    renderVisitHistory();
    syncToSheetQuiet(SHEET_NAMES.visit, buildVisitSheetRow(record));
    notifyReportDataChanged();
    return record;
  }
  var guardianContactContext = null;
  function collectVisitFormData(prefix) {
    prefix = prefix || 'vis';
    function val(id) {
      var el = document.getElementById(id);
      return el ? (el.value || '').trim() : '';
    }
    return {
      id: val(prefix + '-id'),
      name: val(prefix + '-name'),
      class: val(prefix + '-class'),
      type: val(prefix + '-type'),
      symptom: val(prefix + '-symptom'),
      temp: val(prefix + '-temp'),
      bp: val(prefix + '-bp'),
      pulse: val(prefix + '-pulse'),
      diagnosis: val(prefix + '-diagnosis'),
      treatment: val(prefix + '-treatment'),
      result: val(prefix + '-result'),
      provider: typeof getVisitProviderValue === 'function' ? getVisitProviderValue(prefix) : val(prefix + '-provider')
    };
  }
  function normalizePhoneForTel(phone) {
    var p = String(phone || '').replace(/[^\d+]/g, '');
    if (!p) return '';
    if (p.indexOf('+') === 0) return p;
    if (p.indexOf('66') === 0 && p.length >= 11) return '+' + p;
    if (p.indexOf('0') === 0) return p;
    if (p.length === 9) return '0' + p;
    return p;
  }
  function formatPhoneDisplay(phone) {
    var p = normalizePhoneForTel(phone);
    if (!p) return '';
    if (p.length === 10 && p.indexOf('0') === 0) {
      return p.slice(0, 3) + '-' + p.slice(3, 6) + '-' + p.slice(6);
    }
    return phone;
  }
  function getStudentGuardianContact(id) {
    id = String(id || '').trim();
    var result = { name: '', phone: '', rel: '', studentName: '' };
    if (!id) return result;
    var student = (typeof lookupStudent === 'function') ? lookupStudent(id) : null;
    if (student) {
      result.name = student.guardian || '';
      result.rel = student.guardianRel || '';
      result.studentName = student.fullName || '';
      result.phone = student.guardianPhone || student.guardianTel || student.phone || student.tel || '';
    }
    if (!result.studentName && typeof getStudentDisplayName === 'function') {
      result.studentName = getStudentDisplayName(id) || '';
    }
    if (!result.phone && typeof getStudentHealthExtra === 'function') {
      var extra = getStudentHealthExtra(id);
      if (extra && extra.guardianPhone) result.phone = extra.guardianPhone;
    }
    if (!result.phone) {
      var chronic = loadChronicFromStorage().find(function(r) { return visitIdMatch(r.id, id); });
      if (chronic && chronic.phone) result.phone = chronic.phone;
    }
    return result;
  }
  function saveGuardianPhone(id, phone) {
    phone = String(phone || '').trim();
    if (!id || !phone) return;
    if (typeof setStudentHealthExtra === 'function') {
      setStudentHealthExtra(id, { guardianPhone: phone });
    }
  }
  function buildGuardianNotifyMessage(data, contact) {
    data = data || {};
    contact = contact || {};
    return [
      'เนเธเนเธเธเธฒเธเนเธฃเธเน€เธฃเธตเธขเธเธเนเธฒเธเนเธเน เธซเนเธญเธเธเธขเธฒเธเธฒเธฅ',
      'เธเธฑเธเน€เธฃเธตเธขเธ: ' + (data.name || contact.studentName || 'โ€”'),
      'เธฃเธซเธฑเธช: ' + (data.id || 'โ€”'),
      'เธเธฑเนเธ: ' + (data.class || 'โ€”'),
      'เธญเธฒเธเธฒเธฃ: ' + (data.symptom || data.diagnosis || 'โ€”'),
      'เธเธฅเธเธฒเธฃเธฃเธฑเธเธฉเธฒ: ' + (data.result || 'โ€”'),
      'เธเธณเนเธเธฐเธเธณ: ' + getVisitAdvice({ result: data.result, treatment: data.treatment })
    ].join('\n');
  }
  function updateGuardianContactLinks() {
    var phoneEl = document.getElementById('guardian-contact-phone');
    var msgEl = document.getElementById('guardian-contact-message');
    var callEl = document.getElementById('guardian-call-link');
    var smsEl = document.getElementById('guardian-sms-link');
    if (!phoneEl || !callEl || !smsEl) return;
    var phone = normalizePhoneForTel(phoneEl.value);
    var msg = msgEl ? encodeURIComponent(msgEl.value || '') : '';
    callEl.href = phone ? ('tel:' + phone) : '#';
    smsEl.href = phone ? ('sms:' + phone + (msg ? ('?body=' + msg) : '')) : '#';
    callEl.style.opacity = phone ? '1' : '0.55';
    smsEl.style.opacity = phone ? '1' : '0.55';
  }
  function openGuardianContactModal(prefix) {
    var data = collectVisitFormData(prefix);
    if (!data.id || !data.name) {
      alert('เธเธฃเธธเธ“เธฒเธเธฃเธญเธเน€เธฅเธเธเธฃเธฐเธเธณเธ•เธฑเธงเนเธฅเธฐเธเธทเนเธญ-เธเธฒเธกเธชเธเธธเธฅเธเธญเธเธเธฑเธเน€เธฃเธตเธขเธเธเนเธญเธ');
      return;
    }
    var contact = getStudentGuardianContact(data.id);
    guardianContactContext = { prefix: prefix, data: data, contact: contact };
    var studentEl = document.getElementById('guardian-contact-student');
    var guardianEl = document.getElementById('guardian-contact-guardian');
    var phoneEl = document.getElementById('guardian-contact-phone');
    var msgEl = document.getElementById('guardian-contact-message');
    if (studentEl) {
      studentEl.textContent = (data.name || contact.studentName) + (data.class ? ' ยท ' + data.class : '') + ' (เธฃเธซเธฑเธช ' + data.id + ')';
    }
    if (guardianEl) {
      var gtxt = contact.name ? ('เธเธนเนเธเธเธเธฃเธญเธ: ' + contact.name + (contact.rel ? ' (' + contact.rel + ')' : '')) : 'เธขเธฑเธเนเธกเนเธกเธตเธเธทเนเธญเธเธนเนเธเธเธเธฃเธญเธเนเธเธฃเธฐเธเธ';
      guardianEl.textContent = gtxt;
    }
    if (phoneEl) phoneEl.value = contact.phone || '';
    if (msgEl) msgEl.value = buildGuardianNotifyMessage(data, contact);
    updateGuardianContactLinks();
    document.getElementById('guardianContactModal').classList.add('open');
    if (phoneEl) setTimeout(function() { if (!phoneEl.value) phoneEl.focus(); else msgEl && msgEl.focus(); }, 120);
  }
  function closeGuardianContactModal() {
    var modal = document.getElementById('guardianContactModal');
    if (modal) modal.classList.remove('open');
    guardianContactContext = null;
  }
  function saveGuardianPhoneFromModal() {
    var phoneEl = document.getElementById('guardian-contact-phone');
    if (!guardianContactContext || !phoneEl) return;
    var phone = (phoneEl.value || '').trim();
    if (!phone) {
      alert('เธเธฃเธธเธ“เธฒเธเธฃเธญเธเน€เธเธญเธฃเนเนเธ—เธฃเธเธนเนเธเธเธเธฃเธญเธ');
      return;
    }
    saveGuardianPhone(guardianContactContext.data.id, phone);
    alert('โ… เธเธฑเธเธ—เธถเธเน€เธเธญเธฃเนเธเธนเนเธเธเธเธฃเธญเธเนเธฅเนเธง');
  }
  function saveGuardianPhoneBeforeAction() {
    var phoneEl = document.getElementById('guardian-contact-phone');
    if (!phoneEl) return false;
    var phone = normalizePhoneForTel(phoneEl.value);
    if (!phone || phone.length < 9) {
      alert('เธเธฃเธธเธ“เธฒเธเธฃเธญเธเน€เธเธญเธฃเนเนเธ—เธฃเธเธนเนเธเธเธเธฃเธญเธเนเธซเนเธ–เธนเธเธ•เนเธญเธ');
      return false;
    }
    if (guardianContactContext && guardianContactContext.data.id) {
      saveGuardianPhone(guardianContactContext.data.id, phoneEl.value.trim());
    }
    return true;
  }
  function notifyVisitParent(prefix) {

  }
  function buildVisitCertificateHtml(data, contact) {
    var now = new Date().toLocaleString('th-TH');
    var phone = contact && contact.phone ? formatPhoneDisplay(contact.phone) : 'โ€”';
    var guardianName = contact && contact.name ? contact.name : 'โ€”';
    var guardianRel = contact && contact.rel ? contact.rel : '';
    function row(label, value) {
      return '<tr><td>' + escVisitHtml(label) + '</td><td>' + escVisitHtml(value || 'โ€”') + '</td></tr>';
    }
    return '<!DOCTYPE html><html lang="th"><head><meta charset="utf-8"><title>เนเธเธฃเธฑเธเธฃเธญเธเธเธฒเธฃเธฃเธฑเธเธฉเธฒ</title>' +

      'table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;margin:14px 0;} td{padding:8px 10px;border:1px solid #ccc;vertical-align:top;}' +
      'td:first-child{width:36%;font-weight:700;background:#f7faf8;} .sign{margin-top:48px;text-align:right;font-size:14px;line-height:1.8;}' +
      '@media print{body{padding:12px;}}</style></head><body>' +
      '<h1>เนเธเธฃเธฑเธเธฃเธญเธเธเธฒเธฃเธฃเธฑเธเธฉเธฒ / เธฃเธฑเธเธเธฃเธดเธเธฒเธฃเธซเนเธญเธเธเธขเธฒเธเธฒเธฅ</h1>' +

      row('เธงเธฑเธเธ—เธตเน/เน€เธงเธฅเธฒ', now) +

      row('เธเธตเธเธเธฃ', data.pulse) +
      row('เธเธฒเธฃเธงเธดเธเธดเธเธเธฑเธขเน€เธเธทเนเธญเธเธ•เนเธ', data.diagnosis) +
      row('เธเธฒเธฃเธฃเธฑเธเธฉเธฒเนเธฅเธฐเธขเธฒ', data.treatment) +

  function printVisitCertificateFromModal() {
    if (!guardianContactContext || !guardianContactContext.data) return;
    var phoneEl = document.getElementById('guardian-contact-phone');
    var contact = Object.assign({}, guardianContactContext.contact || {});
    if (phoneEl && phoneEl.value.trim()) {
      contact.phone = phoneEl.value.trim();
      saveGuardianPhone(guardianContactContext.data.id, contact.phone);
    }
    var html = buildVisitCertificateHtml(guardianContactContext.data, contact);
    var w = window.open('', '_blank', 'width=820,height=900');
    if (!w) {
      alert('เน€เธเธฃเธฒเธงเนเน€เธเธญเธฃเนเธเธฅเนเธญเธเธซเธเนเธฒเธ•เนเธฒเธเธเนเธญเธเธญเธฑเธ โ€” เธเธฃเธธเธ“เธฒเธญเธเธธเธเธฒเธ•เธเนเธญเธเธญเธฑเธเนเธฅเนเธงเธฅเธญเธเนเธซเธกเน');
      return;
    }
    w.document.open();
    w.document.write(html);
    w.document.close();
    w.focus();
    setTimeout(function() { w.print(); }, 350);
  }
  function printVisitCertificate(prefix) {
    var data = collectVisitFormData(prefix || 'vis');
    if (!data.id || !data.name) {
      alert('เธเธฃเธธเธ“เธฒเธเธฃเธญเธเน€เธฅเธเธเธฃเธฐเธเธณเธ•เธฑเธงเนเธฅเธฐเธเธทเนเธญ-เธเธฒเธกเธชเธเธธเธฅเธเธญเธเธเธฑเธเน€เธฃเธตเธขเธเธเนเธญเธ');
      return;
    }
    var contact = getStudentGuardianContact(data.id);
    if (!contact.phone) {
      guardianContactContext = { prefix: prefix || 'vis', data: data, contact: contact, forPrint: true };
      openGuardianContactModal(prefix || 'vis');
      return;
    }
    guardianContactContext = { prefix: prefix || 'vis', data: data, contact: contact };
    printVisitCertificateFromModal();
    guardianContactContext = null;
  }

  function saveVisit() {
    const id = (document.getElementById('vis-id').value || '').trim();
    const name = (document.getElementById('vis-name').value || '').trim();
    const symptom = (document.getElementById('vis-symptom').value || '').trim();
    if (!id || !name) {
      alert('เธเธฃเธธเธ“เธฒเธเธฃเธญเธเน€เธฅเธเธเธฃเธฐเธเธณเธ•เธฑเธงเนเธฅเธฐเธเธทเนเธญ-เธเธฒเธกเธชเธเธธเธฅ');
      return;
    }
    if (!validateVisitProvider('vis')) return;
    const now = new Date();
    const record = {
      recordId: 'v-' + now.getTime() + '-' + Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 8),
      id: id,
      name: name,
      class: document.getElementById('vis-class').value,
      type: document.getElementById('vis-type').value,
      symptom: symptom,
      temp: document.getElementById('vis-temp').value,
      bp: document.getElementById('vis-bp').value,
      pulse: document.getElementById('vis-pulse').value,
      diagnosis: document.getElementById('vis-diagnosis').value,
      treatment: (document.getElementById('vis-treatment').value || '').trim(),
      result: document.getElementById('vis-result').value,
      provider: getVisitProviderValue('vis'),
      recordedAt: now.toLocaleString('th-TH'),
      savedAt: now.getTime()
    };
    persistNewVisitRecord(record);
    document.getElementById('vis-symptom').value = '';
    document.getElementById('vis-temp').value = '';
    document.getElementById('vis-bp').value = '';
    document.getElementById('vis-pulse').value = '';
    document.getElementById('vis-treatment').value = '';
    focusVisitTodayList(record);
    alert('โ… เธเธฑเธเธ—เธถเธเธเนเธญเธกเธนเธฅเธชเธณเน€เธฃเนเธ!');
  }
  function saveVisitRecord() {
    const id = (document.getElementById('vis-rec-id').value || '').trim();
    const name = (document.getElementById('vis-rec-name').value || '').trim();
    const symptom = (document.getElementById('vis-rec-symptom').value || '').trim();
    if (!id || !name) {
      alert('เธเธฃเธธเธ“เธฒเธเธฃเธญเธเน€เธฅเธเธเธฃเธฐเธเธณเธ•เธฑเธงเนเธฅเธฐเธเธทเนเธญ-เธเธฒเธกเธชเธเธธเธฅ');
      return;
    }
    if (!validateVisitProvider('vis-rec')) return;
    const now = new Date();
    const record = {
      recordId: 'v-' + now.getTime() + '-' + Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 8),
      id: id,
      name: name,
      class: document.getElementById('vis-rec-class').value,
      type: document.getElementById('vis-rec-type').value,
      symptom: symptom,
      temp: document.getElementById('vis-rec-temp').value,
      bp: document.getElementById('vis-rec-bp').value,
      pulse: document.getElementById('vis-rec-pulse').value,
      diagnosis: document.getElementById('vis-rec-diagnosis').value,
      treatment: (document.getElementById('vis-rec-treatment').value || '').trim(),
      result: document.getElementById('vis-rec-result').value,
      provider: getVisitProviderValue('vis-rec'),
      recordedAt: now.toLocaleString('th-TH'),
      savedAt: now.getTime()
    };
    persistNewVisitRecord(record);
    document.getElementById('vis-rec-symptom').value = '';
    document.getElementById('vis-rec-temp').value = '';
    document.getElementById('vis-rec-bp').value = '';
    document.getElementById('vis-rec-pulse').value = '';
    document.getElementById('vis-rec-treatment').value = '';
    if (typeof renderVisitRecordViews === 'function') renderVisitRecordViews();
    alert('โ… เธเธฑเธเธ—เธถเธเธเนเธญเธกเธนเธฅเธชเธณเน€เธฃเนเธ!');
  }
  window.saveVisitRecord = saveVisitRecord;

  function pctFromCount(count, total) {
    if (!total) return 0;
    return Math.min(100, Math.round(count / total * 100));
  }
  function countUniqueIds(records) {
    var ids = {};
    records.forEach(function(r) {
      if (!r || !r.id) return;
      ids[String(r.id).trim()] = true;
    });
    return Object.keys(ids).length;
  }
  function countUniqueScreeningType(type) {
    var ids = {};
    loadScreeningRecords().filter(isRecordThisYear).forEach(function(r) {
      if (r.type !== type || !r.id) return;
      ids[String(r.id).trim()] = true;
    });
    return Object.keys(ids).length;
  }
  function getFemaleM2StudentIds() {
    var ids = {};
    var tbody = document.querySelector('#section-student tbody');
    if (tbody) {
      for (var i = 0; i < tbody.rows.length; i++) {
        var tr = tbody.rows[i];
        if (!tr.cells || !tr.cells[0]) continue;
        var id = tr.cells[0].textContent.trim();
        var cls = tr.cells[2] ? tr.cells[2].textContent.trim() : '';
        var gender = tr.cells[6] ? tr.cells[6].textContent.trim() : '';
        var student = (typeof lookupStudent === 'function') ? lookupStudent(id) : null;
        var isFemale = gender.indexOf('เธซเธเธดเธ') !== -1 || (student && student.gender === 'เธ');
        if (isFemale && cls.indexOf('เธก.2') === 0) ids[id] = true;
      }
    }
    return ids;
  }
  function computeHpvCoverageStats() {
    var targetIds = getFemaleM2StudentIds();
    var target = Object.keys(targetIds).length;
    var dose1Ids = {};
    var dose2Ids = {};
    loadVaccineRecords().forEach(function(r) {
      var v = (r.vaccine || '').toUpperCase();
      if (v.indexOf('HPV') === -1 || !r.id) return;
      var id = String(r.id).trim();
      if (target && !targetIds[id]) return;
      if (v.indexOf('2') !== -1 || v.indexOf('เน€เธเนเธก 2') !== -1) dose2Ids[id] = true;
      else dose1Ids[id] = true;
    });
    var dose1 = Object.keys(dose1Ids).length;
    var dose2 = Object.keys(dose2Ids).length;
    var base = target || dose1 || 1;
    return {
      target: target,
      dose1: dose1,
      dose2: dose2,
      dose1Pct: pctFromCount(dose1, target || getStudentRegistryCount() || 1),
      dose2Pct: pctFromCount(dose2, dose1 || target || 1),
      missing: target ? Math.max(0, target - dose1) : 0
    };
  }
  function computeLiveCoverageItems() {
    var total = getStudentRegistryCount() || 0;
    var hpv = computeHpvCoverageStats();
    var screeningAny = countUniqueIds(loadScreeningRecords().filter(isRecordThisYear));
    var nutritionCount = countUniqueIds(loadNutritionRecords().filter(isRecordThisYear));
    var visionCount = countUniqueScreeningType('vision');
    var bloodCount = countUniqueScreeningType('blood');
    var oralCount = countUniqueScreeningType('oral');
    return [
      { label: 'เธ•เธฃเธงเธเธชเธธเธเธ เธฒเธเธเธฃเธฐเธเธณเธเธต', pct: pctFromCount(screeningAny, total), count: screeningAny, total: total },
      { label: 'เธเธฑเนเธเธเนเธณเธซเธเธฑเธ/เธงเธฑเธ”เธชเนเธงเธเธชเธนเธ เธเธฃเธฑเนเธเธ—เธตเน 1', pct: pctFromCount(nutritionCount, total), count: nutritionCount, total: total },
      { label: 'เธ•เธฃเธงเธเธชเธฒเธขเธ•เธฒ', pct: pctFromCount(visionCount, total), count: visionCount, total: total },
      { label: 'เธงเธฑเธเธเธตเธ HPV', pct: hpv.dose1Pct, count: hpv.dose1, total: hpv.target || total },
      { label: 'เธเธฑเธ”เธเธฃเธญเธเนloเธซเธดเธ•เธเธฒเธ', pct: pctFromCount(bloodCount, total), count: bloodCount, total: total },
      { label: 'เธ•เธฃเธงเธเธชเธธเธเธ เธฒเธเธเนเธญเธเธเธฒเธ', pct: pctFromCount(oralCount, total), count: oralCount, total: total }
    ];
  }
  function renderVaccineHpvCoverageChart() {
    var body = document.getElementById('vaccine-hpv-coverage-body');
    if (!body) return;
    var hpv = computeHpvCoverageStats();
    var targetLabel = hpv.target ? hpv.target + ' เธเธ' : 'โ€”';
    body.innerHTML =
      '<div style="margin-bottom:10px;">' +
        '<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:12px;margin-bottom:2px;"><span>เน€เธเนเธก 1 (เธเธฑเธเน€เธฃเธตเธขเธเธซเธเธดเธ เธก.2)</span><span>' + hpv.dose1Pct + '% (' + hpv.dose1 + '/' + targetLabel + ')</span></div>' +
        '<div class="progress-bar-wrap"><div class="progress-bar" style="width:' + hpv.dose1Pct + '%"></div></div>' +
      '</div>' +
      '<div style="margin-bottom:10px;">' +
        '<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:12px;margin-bottom:2px;"><span>เน€เธเนเธก 2</span><span>' + hpv.dose2Pct + '% (' + hpv.dose2 + '/' + (hpv.dose1 || 'โ€”') + ')</span></div>' +
        '<div class="progress-bar-wrap"><div class="progress-bar" style="width:' + hpv.dose2Pct + '%"></div></div>' +
      '</div>';
    var alertEl = document.getElementById('vaccine-hpv-coverage-alert');
    if (!alertEl) return;
    if (hpv.target && hpv.missing > 0) {
      alertEl.innerHTML = '<div class="alert alert-warning" style="margin-top:12px;"><span>โ ๏ธ</span><div>เธเธฑเธเน€เธฃเธตเธขเธเธซเธเธดเธ เธก.2 เธ—เธตเนเธขเธฑเธเนเธกเนเนเธ”เนเธฃเธฑเธเธงเธฑเธเธเธตเธ HPV เน€เธเนเธก 1: <strong>' + hpv.missing + ' เธเธ</strong> โ€” เธ•เนเธญเธเธ•เธดเธ”เธ•เธฒเธก</div></div>';
    } else if (!hpv.target) {
      alertEl.innerHTML = '<div class="alert alert-info" style="margin-top:12px;"><span>โน๏ธ</span><div>เธขเธฑเธเนเธกเนเธเธเธเนเธญเธกเธนเธฅเธเธฑเธเน€เธฃเธตเธขเธเธซเธเธดเธ เธก.2 เนเธเธ—เธฐเน€เธเธตเธขเธ โ€” เนเธชเธ”เธเธเธฒเธเธเธฑเธเธ—เธถเธเธงเธฑเธเธเธตเธ HPV เธ—เธฑเนเธเธซเธกเธ” ' + hpv.dose1 + ' เธฃเธฒเธข</div></div>';
    } else {
      alertEl.innerHTML = '<div class="alert alert-success" style="margin-top:12px;"><span>โ…</span><div>เธเธฑเธเน€เธฃเธตเธขเธเธซเธเธดเธ เธก.2 เนเธ”เนเธฃเธฑเธเธงเธฑเธเธเธตเธ HPV เน€เธเนเธก 1 เธเธฃเธเนเธฅเนเธง</div></div>';
    }
  }
  function getGradeRegistryChartItems() {
    var levels = ['เธก.1', 'เธก.2', 'เธก.3', 'เธก.4', 'เธก.5', 'เธก.6'];
    var colors = ['#2d8a5e', '#3b82f6', '#8b5cf6', '#f59e0b', '#ef4444', '#14b8a6'];
    var counts = {};
    levels.forEach(function(l) { counts[l] = 0; });
    var tbody = document.querySelector('#section-student tbody');
    if (!tbody || !tbody.rows.length) return null;
    for (var i = 0; i < tbody.rows.length; i++) {
      var c = tbody.rows[i].cells[2] ? tbody.rows[i].cells[2].textContent.trim() : '';
      for (var k = 0; k < levels.length; k++) {
        if (c.indexOf(levels[k]) === 0) { counts[levels[k]]++; break; }
      }
    }
    var total = levels.reduce(function(s, l) { return s + counts[l]; }, 0);
    if (!total) return null;
    return levels.map(function(l, i) {
      return { label: l, count: counts[l], color: colors[i % colors.length] };
    });
  }
  function renderGradeChart() {
    var tbody = document.querySelector('#section-student tbody');
    var host = document.getElementById('grade-chart');
    if (!tbody || !host) return;
    var levels = ['เธก.1', 'เธก.2', 'เธก.3', 'เธก.4', 'เธก.5', 'เธก.6'];
    var counts = {};
    levels.forEach(function(l) { counts[l] = 0; });
    for (var i = 0; i < tbody.rows.length; i++) {
      var c = tbody.rows[i].cells[2] ? tbody.rows[i].cells[2].textContent.trim() : '';
      for (var j = 0; j < levels.length; j++) {
        if (c.indexOf(levels[j]) === 0) { counts[levels[j]]++; break; }
      }
    }
    var max = Math.max(1, levels.reduce(function(m, l) { return Math.max(m, counts[l]); }, 0));
    host.innerHTML = levels.map(function(l) {
      var w = Math.round(counts[l] / max * 100);
      return '<div class="bar-row"><div class="bar-label">' + l + '</div>' +
        '<div class="bar-track"><div class="bar-fill" data-w="' + w + '"></div></div>' +
        '<div class="bar-val">' + counts[l].toLocaleString('th-TH') + '</div></div>';
    }).join('');
    var chip = document.getElementById('grade-chips');
    if (chip) {
      chip.innerHTML = '<span class="chip">เธฃเธงเธก <b>' + tbody.rows.length.toLocaleString('th-TH') + '</b> เธเธ</span>' +
        levels.map(function(l) { return '<span class="chip">' + l + ' <b>' + counts[l].toLocaleString('th-TH') + '</b></span>'; }).join('');
    }
    requestAnimationFrame(function() {
      host.querySelectorAll('.bar-fill').forEach(function(f) { f.style.width = f.dataset.w + '%'; });
    });
  }

  function isRecordThisMonth(record) {
    const ts = getVisitRecordTime(record);
    if (!ts) return false;
    const d = new Date(ts);
    const now = new Date();
    return d.getMonth() === now.getMonth() && d.getFullYear() === now.getFullYear();
  }
  function isRecordThisYear(record) {
    const ts = getVisitRecordTime(record);
    if (!ts) return false;
    return new Date(ts).getFullYear() === new Date().getFullYear();
  }
  var ADMIN_CHART_COLORS = ['#2d8a5e', '#3b82f6', '#f59e0b', '#ef4444', '#8b5cf6', '#14b8a6', '#ec4899', '#64748b'];
  function renderAdminHorizBars(elId, items, emptyMsg) {
    var el = document.getElementById(elId);
    if (!el) return;
    if (!items || !items.length) {
      el.innerHTML = '<p class="dash-admin-chart-empty">' + (emptyMsg || 'เธขเธฑเธเนเธกเนเธกเธตเธเนเธญเธกเธนเธฅ') + '</p>';
      return;
    }
    var max = Math.max.apply(null, items.map(function(it) { return it.count; }).concat([1]));
    el.innerHTML = items.map(function(it, i) {
      var pct = Math.round(it.count / max * 100);
      var color = it.color || ADMIN_CHART_COLORS[i % ADMIN_CHART_COLORS.length];
      return '<div class="report-bar-row"><div class="report-bar-head"><span>' + escVisitHtml(it.label) +
        '</span><span class="report-bar-val">' + it.count.toLocaleString('th-TH') + '</span></div>' +
        '<div class="progress-bar-wrap"><div class="progress-bar" style="width:' + pct + '%;background:' + color + ';"></div></div></div>';
    }).join('');
  }
  function renderAdminColumnBars(elId, items, emptyMsg) {
    var el = document.getElementById(elId);
    if (!el) return;
    if (!items || !items.length) {
      el.innerHTML = '<p class="dash-admin-chart-empty">' + (emptyMsg || 'เธขเธฑเธเนเธกเนเธกเธตเธเนเธญเธกเธนเธฅ') + '</p>';
      return;
    }
    var max = Math.max.apply(null, items.map(function(it) { return it.count; }).concat([1]));
    var few = items.length <= 3;
    el.innerHTML = '<div class="report-week-bars' + (few ? ' is-few-cols' : '') + '">' + items.map(function(it, i) {
      var h = Math.max(8, Math.round(it.count / max * 100));
      var color = it.color || ADMIN_CHART_COLORS[i % ADMIN_CHART_COLORS.length];
      return '<div class="report-week-col"><div class="report-week-count">' + it.count.toLocaleString('th-TH') + '</div>' +
        '<div class="report-week-bar-wrap"><div class="report-week-bar" style="height:' + h + '%;background:linear-gradient(180deg,' + color + 'cc,' + color + ');"></div></div>' +
        '<div class="report-week-label" title="' + escVisitHtml(it.label) + '">' + escVisitHtml(it.label) + '</div></div>';
    }).join('') + '</div>';
  }
  function renderAdminDonut(elId, items, emptyMsg) {
    var el = document.getElementById(elId);
    if (!el) return;
    if (!items || !items.length) {
      el.innerHTML = '<p class="dash-admin-chart-empty">' + (emptyMsg || 'เธขเธฑเธเนเธกเนเธกเธตเธเนเธญเธกเธนเธฅ') + '</p>';
      return;
    }
    var built = buildDonutGradientStops(items, 0.8);
    var legend = items.map(function(it, i) {
      var count = parseInt(it.count, 10) || 0;
      var pct = Math.round(count / built.total * 100);
      var color = it.color || ADMIN_CHART_COLORS[i % ADMIN_CHART_COLORS.length];
      return '<div class="dash-donut-legend-item"><span class="dash-donut-swatch" style="background:' + color + ';"></span>' +
        '<span class="dash-donut-legend-text">' + escVisitHtml(it.label) + '</span>' +
        '<span class="dash-donut-legend-val">' + count.toLocaleString('th-TH') + ' (' + pct + '%)</span></div>';
    }).join('');
    el.innerHTML = '<div class="dash-donut-host"><div class="dash-donut-wrap"><div class="dash-donut-ring" style="background:conic-gradient(' + built.stops.join(', ') +
      ');"></div><div class="dash-donut-hole"></div></div><div class="dash-donut-legend">' + legend + '</div></div>';
  }
  function buildDonutGradientStops(items, gapDeg) {
    gapDeg = gapDeg == null ? 1.2 : gapDeg;
    var total = items.reduce(function(s, it) { return s + (parseInt(it.count, 10) || 0); }, 0) || 1;
    var cumulative = 0;
    var stops = [];
    items.forEach(function(it, i) {
      var count = parseInt(it.count, 10) || 0;
      var share = count / total;
      var start = cumulative * 100;
      cumulative += share;
      var end = cumulative * 100;
      var color = it.color || ADMIN_CHART_COLORS[i % ADMIN_CHART_COLORS.length];
      var gap = Math.min(gapDeg, (end - start) * 0.15);
      if (start > 0) stops.push('#ffffff ' + Math.max(0, start - gap / 2).toFixed(2) + '% ' + start.toFixed(2) + '%');
      stops.push(color + ' ' + start.toFixed(2) + '% ' + (end - gap / 2).toFixed(2) + '%');
      if (i < items.length - 1) stops.push('#ffffff ' + (end - gap / 2).toFixed(2) + '% ' + end.toFixed(2) + '%');
    });
    return { stops: stops, total: total };
  }
  function renderAdminArcGauge(pct, color, size, strokeWidth) {
    size = size || 84;
    strokeWidth = strokeWidth || 9;
    var r = (size - strokeWidth - 2) / 2;
    var cx = size / 2;
    var cy = size / 2;
    var circ = 2 * Math.PI * r;
    var offset = circ * (1 - Math.min(100, Math.max(0, pct)) / 100);
    return '<svg class="dash-gauge-svg" viewBox="0 0 ' + size + ' ' + size + '" aria-hidden="true">' +
      '<circle cx="' + cx + '" cy="' + cy + '" r="' + r + '" fill="none" stroke="#e8ece9" stroke-width="' + strokeWidth + '"/>' +
      '<circle cx="' + cx + '" cy="' + cy + '" r="' + r + '" fill="none" stroke="' + color + '" stroke-width="' + strokeWidth + '" ' +
      'stroke-linecap="round" stroke-dasharray="' + circ.toFixed(2) + '" stroke-dashoffset="' + offset.toFixed(2) + '" ' +
      'transform="rotate(-90 ' + cx + ' ' + cy + ')"/>' +
      '<text x="' + cx + '" y="' + (cy + (strokeWidth > 10 ? 6 : 5)) + '" text-anchor="middle" class="dash-gauge-pct">' + pct + '%</text></svg>';
  }
  function renderAdminDonutLarge(elId, items, centerValue, centerSub, emptyMsg) {
    var el = document.getElementById(elId);
    if (!el) return;
    if (!items || !items.length) {
      el.innerHTML = '<p class="dash-admin-chart-empty">' + (emptyMsg || 'เธขเธฑเธเนเธกเนเธกเธตเธเนเธญเธกเธนเธฅ') + '</p>';
      return;
    }
    var built = buildDonutGradientStops(items);
    var legend = items.map(function(it, i) {
      var count = parseInt(it.count, 10) || 0;
      var pct = Math.round(count / built.total * 100);
      var color = it.color || ADMIN_CHART_COLORS[i % ADMIN_CHART_COLORS.length];
      return '<div class="dash-donut-legend-item"><span class="dash-donut-swatch" style="background:' + color + ';"></span>' +
        '<span class="dash-donut-legend-text">' + escVisitHtml(it.label) + '</span>' +
        '<span class="dash-donut-legend-val">' + count.toLocaleString('th-TH') + ' (' + pct + '%)</span></div>';
    }).join('');
    el.innerHTML = '<div class="dash-donut-lg-host"><div class="dash-donut-lg-wrap"><div class="dash-donut-ring" style="background:conic-gradient(' + built.stops.join(', ') +
      ');"></div><div class="dash-donut-lg-hole"><div class="dash-donut-lg-val">' + escVisitHtml(centerValue) +
      '</div><div class="dash-donut-lg-sub">' + escVisitHtml(centerSub) + '</div></div></div><div class="dash-donut-legend">' + legend + '</div></div>';
  }
  function renderAdminTrendChart(elId, trend, emptyMsg) {
    var el = document.getElementById(elId);
    if (!el || !trend || !trend.series || !trend.series.length) {
      if (el) el.innerHTML = '<p class="dash-admin-chart-empty">' + (emptyMsg || 'เธขเธฑเธเนเธกเนเธกเธตเธเนเธญเธกเธนเธฅ') + '</p>';
      return;
    }
    var w = 360;
    var h = 156;
    var padL = 36;
    var padR = 12;
    var padT = 10;
    var padB = 26;
    var innerW = w - padL - padR;
    var innerH = h - padT - padB;
    var labels = trend.labels || [];
    var series = trend.series;
    var n = labels.length;
    var totals = labels.map(function(_, mi) {
      return series.reduce(function(s, ser) { return s + (ser.data[mi] || 0); }, 0) || 1;
    });
    var maxTotal = Math.max.apply(null, totals.concat([1]));
    var xAt = function(i) {
      if (n <= 2) {
        var inset = innerW * 0.18;
        return padL + inset + (n > 1 ? i * (innerW - inset * 2) / (n - 1) : (innerW - inset * 2) / 2);
      }
      return padL + (n > 1 ? i * innerW / (n - 1) : innerW / 2);
    };
    var yAt = function(v) {
      return padT + innerH - (v / maxTotal * innerH);
    };
    var grid = '';
    for (var g = 0; g <= 4; g++) {
      var gy = padT + innerH - (innerH * g / 4);
      var gv = Math.round(maxTotal * g / 4);
      grid += '<line x1="' + padL + '" y1="' + gy + '" x2="' + (w - padR) + '" y2="' + gy + '" stroke="#eef2f1" stroke-width="1"/>';
      grid += '<text x="' + (padL - 6) + '" y="' + (gy + 3) + '" text-anchor="end" class="dash-trend-y-label">' + gv.toLocaleString('th-TH') + '</text>';
    }
    var areas = '';
    var lines = '';
    var points = '';
    var cumulative = labels.map(function() { return 0; });
    series.forEach(function(s) {
      var topPts = [];
      var botPts = [];
      for (var i = 0; i < n; i++) {
        var bottom = cumulative[i];
        var top = bottom + (s.data[i] || 0);
        cumulative[i] = top;
        topPts.push({ x: xAt(i), y: yAt(top) });
        botPts.push({ x: xAt(i), y: yAt(bottom) });
      }
      var areaPath = 'M' + topPts[0].x.toFixed(1) + ',' + topPts[0].y.toFixed(1);
      for (var ti = 1; ti < n; ti++) areaPath += ' L' + topPts[ti].x.toFixed(1) + ',' + topPts[ti].y.toFixed(1);
      for (var bi = n - 1; bi >= 0; bi--) areaPath += ' L' + botPts[bi].x.toFixed(1) + ',' + botPts[bi].y.toFixed(1);
      areaPath += ' Z';
      areas += '<path d="' + areaPath + '" fill="' + s.color + '" fill-opacity="0.82" stroke="none"/>';
      var linePts = topPts.map(function(p) { return p.x.toFixed(1) + ',' + p.y.toFixed(1); }).join(' ');
      lines += '<polyline fill="none" stroke="' + s.color + '" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linejoin="round" points="' + linePts + '" opacity="0.35"/>';
      topPts.forEach(function(p) {
        points += '<circle cx="' + p.x.toFixed(1) + '" cy="' + p.y.toFixed(1) + '" r="2.5" fill="' + s.color + '" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="1"/>';
      });
    });
    var xlabels = labels.map(function(lbl, i) {
      return '<text x="' + xAt(i) + '" y="' + (h - 6) + '" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" fill="#64748b" font-weight="500">' + escVisitHtml(lbl) + '</text>';
    }).join('');
    var legend = series.map(function(s) {
      return '<span><i class="dash-trend-dot" style="background:' + s.color + ';"></i>' + escVisitHtml(s.label) + '</span>';
    }).join('');
    el.innerHTML = '<div class="dash-trend-host"><svg class="dash-trend-svg" viewBox="0 0 ' + w + ' ' + h + '" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet">' +
      grid + areas + lines + points + xlabels + '</svg><div class="dash-trend-legend">' + legend + '</div></div>';
  }
  function renderAdminExecHorizBars(elId, items, limit, emptyMsg) {
    var el = document.getElementById(elId);
    if (!el) return;
    var list = (items || []).slice(0, limit || 5);
    if (!list.length) {
      el.innerHTML = '<p class="dash-admin-chart-empty">' + (emptyMsg || 'เธขเธฑเธเนเธกเนเธกเธตเธเนเธญเธกเธนเธฅ') + '</p>';
      return;
    }
    var max = Math.max.apply(null, list.map(function(it) { return it.count; }).concat([1]));
    var barColors = [
      'linear-gradient(90deg,#3b82f6,#1d4ed8)',
      'linear-gradient(90deg,#60a5fa,#2563eb)',
      'linear-gradient(90deg,#93c5fd,#3b82f6)',
      'linear-gradient(90deg,#bfdbfe,#60a5fa)',
      'linear-gradient(90deg,#dbeafe,#93c5fd)'
    ];
    el.innerHTML = '<div class="dash-hbar-list">' + list.map(function(it, i) {
      var pct = Math.max(8, Math.round(it.count / max * 100));
      var bg = it.color
        ? 'linear-gradient(90deg,' + it.color + ',' + it.color + 'cc)'
        : barColors[i % barColors.length];
      return '<div class="dash-hbar-item"><div class="dash-hbar-rank">' + (i + 1) + '</div><div class="dash-hbar-body">' +
        '<div class="dash-hbar-meta"><span class="lbl">' + escVisitHtml(it.label) + '</span>' +
        '<span class="val">' + it.count.toLocaleString('th-TH') + (it.unit || '') + '</span></div>' +
        '<div class="dash-hbar-track"><div class="dash-hbar-fill" style="width:' + pct + '%;background:' + bg + ';"></div></div></div></div>';
    }).join('') + '</div>';
  }
  function renderAdminGauges(elId, items, emptyMsg) {
    var el = document.getElementById(elId);
    if (!el) return;
    if (!items || !items.length) {
      el.innerHTML = '<p class="dash-admin-chart-empty">' + (emptyMsg || 'เธขเธฑเธเนเธกเนเธกเธตเธเนเธญเธกเธนเธฅ') + '</p>';
      return;
    }
    el.innerHTML = '<div class="dash-gauge-grid">' + items.map(function(it) {
      var pct = Math.min(100, Math.max(0, parseInt(it.pct, 10) || 0));
      var color = it.color || '#3b82f6';
      return '<div class="dash-gauge-item">' + renderAdminArcGauge(pct, color, 84) +
        '<div class="dash-gauge-label">' + escVisitHtml(it.label) + '</div></div>';
    }).join('') + '</div>';
  }
  function renderAdminReferralGrid(elId, items, emptyMsg) {
    var el = document.getElementById(elId);
    if (!el) return;
    if (!items || !items.length) {
      el.innerHTML = '<p class="dash-admin-chart-empty">' + (emptyMsg || 'เธขเธฑเธเนเธกเนเธกเธตเธเนเธญเธกเธนเธฅ') + '</p>';
      return;
    }
    el.innerHTML = '<div class="dash-ref-grid">' + items.map(function(it) {
      return '<div class="dash-ref-stat"><div class="ico">' + (it.icon || '๐“') + '</div>' +
        '<div class="num" style="color:' + (it.color || 'var(--green-deep)') + ';">' + (it.count || 0).toLocaleString('th-TH') + '</div>' +
        '<div class="lbl">' + escVisitHtml(it.label) + '</div></div>';
    }).join('') + '</div>';
  }
  function renderAdminClinicGrouped(elId, items, emptyMsg) {
    var el = document.getElementById(elId);
    if (!el) return;
    if (!items || !items.length) {
      el.innerHTML = '<p class="dash-admin-chart-empty">' + (emptyMsg || 'เธขเธฑเธเนเธกเนเธกเธตเธเนเธญเธกเธนเธฅ') + '</p>';
      return;
    }
    var maxV = Math.max.apply(null, items.map(function(it) { return it.visits; }).concat([1]));
    var maxS = Math.max.apply(null, items.map(function(it) { return it.students; }).concat([1]));
    var maxAll = Math.max(maxV, maxS);
    var barMaxPx = 90;
    var few = items.length <= 3;
    var groupedCls = 'dash-clinic-grouped' + (few ? ' is-few-months' : '');
    var monthCls = 'dash-clinic-month' + (few ? ' is-few-months' : '');
    el.innerHTML = '<div class="dash-clinic-host" style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;flex:1;min-height:0;width:100%;">' +
      '<div class="' + groupedCls + '">' + items.map(function(it) {
      var vh = Math.max(6, Math.round(it.visits / maxAll * barMaxPx));
      var sh = Math.max(6, Math.round(it.students / maxAll * barMaxPx));
      return '<div class="' + monthCls + '"><div class="dash-clinic-bars">' +
        '<div class="dash-clinic-bar-col"><span class="dash-clinic-bar-val">' + it.visits.toLocaleString('th-TH') + '</span>' +
        '<div class="dash-clinic-bar visits" style="height:' + vh + 'px;" title="เธเธฃเธฑเนเธ: ' + it.visits + '"></div></div>' +
        '<div class="dash-clinic-bar-col"><span class="dash-clinic-bar-val">' + it.students.toLocaleString('th-TH') + '</span>' +
        '<div class="dash-clinic-bar students" style="height:' + sh + 'px;" title="เธเธฑเธเน€เธฃเธตเธขเธ: ' + it.students + '"></div></div></div>' +
        '<div class="dash-clinic-lbl">' + escVisitHtml(it.label) + '</div></div>';
    }).join('') + '</div><div class="dash-clinic-legend"><span><i style="background:#2563eb;"></i>เธเธณเธเธงเธเธเธฃเธฑเนเธ</span>' +
      '<span><i style="background:#059669;"></i>เธเธณเธเธงเธเธเธฑเธเน€เธฃเธตเธขเธ</span></div></div>';
  }
  function renderAdminVaccineRings(elId, items, emptyMsg) {
    var el = document.getElementById(elId);
    if (!el) return;
    if (!items || !items.length) {
      el.innerHTML = '<p class="dash-admin-chart-empty">' + (emptyMsg || 'เธขเธฑเธเนเธกเนเธกเธตเธเนเธญเธกเธนเธฅ') + '</p>';
      return;
    }
    el.innerHTML = '<div class="dash-ring-row">' + items.map(function(it) {
      var pct = Math.min(100, Math.max(0, parseInt(it.pct, 10) || 0));
      var color = it.color || '#3b82f6';
      return '<div class="dash-ring-item"><div class="dash-ring-wrap">' + renderAdminArcGauge(pct, color, 88, 11).replace('dash-gauge-svg', 'dash-ring-svg').replace('dash-gauge-pct', 'dash-ring-pct') +
        '</div><div class="dash-ring-label">' + escVisitHtml(it.label) + '</div></div>';
    }).join('') + '</div>';
  }
  function computeAdminHealthProblems() {
    var visits = loadVisitRecords().filter(isRecordThisYear);
    var emergencies = loadEmergencyRecords().filter(isRecordThisYear);
    var counts = {};
    visits.concat(emergencies).forEach(function(r) {
      var key = (r.diagnosis && r.diagnosis !== '-- เน€เธฅเธทเธญเธ --') ? r.diagnosis : (r.symptom || '').trim();
      if (!key || key === '-- เน€เธฅเธทเธญเธ --') key = 'เนเธกเนเธฃเธฐเธเธธ';
      counts[key] = (counts[key] || 0) + 1;
    });
    var items = Object.keys(counts).map(function(k) { return { label: k, count: counts[k] }; })
      .sort(function(a, b) { return b.count - a.count; }).slice(0, 8);
    return { items: items, isDemo: !items.length };
  }
  function computeAdminReferralStats() {
    var visits = loadVisitRecords().filter(isRecordThisYear);
    var emergencies = loadEmergencyRecords().filter(isRecordThisYear);
    var stats = {
      'เธชเนเธเธ•เนเธญเนเธฃเธเธเธขเธฒเธเธฒเธฅ': { count: 0, color: '#ef4444' },
      'เธฃเธญเธเธนเนเธเธเธเธฃเธญเธ': { count: 0, color: '#f59e0b' },
      'เธเธฑเธเธเธขเธฒเธเธฒเธฅ': { count: 0, color: '#3b82f6' },
      'เธเธฅเธฑเธเธเธฑเนเธเนเธฅเนเธง': { count: 0, color: '#2d8a5e' },
      'เธ•เธดเธ”เธ•เธฒเธกเนเธฅเนเธง': { count: 0, color: '#8b5cf6' }
    };
    visits.concat(emergencies).forEach(function(r) {
      var res = r.result || '';
      if (res.indexOf('เธชเนเธเธ•เนเธญ') !== -1) stats['เธชเนเธเธ•เนเธญเนเธฃเธเธเธขเธฒเธเธฒเธฅ'].count++;
      else if (res.indexOf('เธเธนเนเธเธเธเธฃเธญเธ') !== -1) stats['เธฃเธญเธเธนเนเธเธเธเธฃเธญเธ'].count++;
      else if (res.indexOf('เธเธฑเธ') !== -1) stats['เธเธฑเธเธเธขเธฒเธเธฒเธฅ'].count++;
      else if (res.indexOf('เธเธฅเธฑเธเธเธฑเนเธ') !== -1) stats['เธเธฅเธฑเธเธเธฑเนเธเนเธฅเนเธง'].count++;
      else if (res.indexOf('เธ•เธดเธ”เธ•เธฒเธก') !== -1) stats['เธ•เธดเธ”เธ•เธฒเธกเนเธฅเนเธง'].count++;
    });
    var items = Object.keys(stats).map(function(k) {
      return { label: k, count: stats[k].count, color: stats[k].color };
    }).filter(function(it) { return it.count > 0; });
    return { items: items, isDemo: !items.length };
  }
  function computeAdminClinicMonthly() {
    var months = [];
    var now = new Date();
    for (var i = 5; i >= 0; i--) {
      var d = new Date(now.getFullYear(), now.getMonth() - i, 1);
      months.push({
        label: d.toLocaleDateString('th-TH', { month: 'short' }),
        year: d.getFullYear(),
        month: d.getMonth(),
        count: 0
      });
    }
    loadVisitRecords().concat(loadEmergencyRecords()).forEach(function(r) {
      var ts = r.savedAt || getRecordTimestamp(r);
      if (!ts) return;
      var rd = new Date(ts);
      months.forEach(function(m) {
        if (rd.getFullYear() === m.year && rd.getMonth() === m.month) m.count++;
      });
    });
    return { items: months.map(function(m) { return { label: m.label, count: m.count }; }), isDemo: months.every(function(m) { return m.count === 0; }) };
  }
  function computeAdminVaccineStats() {
    var vaccines = loadVaccineRecords().filter(isRecordThisYear);
    var counts = {};
    vaccines.forEach(function(r) {
      var key = (r.vaccine || 'เนเธกเนเธฃเธฐเธเธธ').trim();
      counts[key] = (counts[key] || 0) + 1;
    });
    var items = Object.keys(counts).map(function(k) { return { label: k, count: counts[k] }; })
      .sort(function(a, b) { return b.count - a.count; }).slice(0, 8);
    return { items: items, isDemo: !items.length };
  }
  function setAdminChartDemoNote(noteId, isDemo, useSample) {
    var el = document.getElementById(noteId);
    if (!el) return;
    if (!el.getAttribute('data-base-note')) {
      el.setAttribute('data-base-note', el.textContent
        .replace(/\s*\(เธเนเธญเธกเธนเธฅเธ•เธฑเธงเธญเธขเนเธฒเธ\)$/, '')
        .replace(/\s*\(เธ•เธฑเธงเธญเธขเนเธฒเธ\)$/, '')
        .replace(/\s*\(เธขเธฑเธเนเธกเนเธกเธตเธเนเธญเธกเธนเธฅ โ€” เธเธฐเธญเธฑเธเน€เธ”เธ•เน€เธกเธทเนเธญเธกเธตเธเธฒเธฃเธเธฑเธเธ—เธถเธ\)$/, '')
        .replace(/\s*ยท เธญเธฑเธเน€เธ”เธ• .+$/, ''));
    }
    var base = el.getAttribute('data-base-note') || '';
    if (useSample) {
      el.textContent = base + ' (เธเนเธญเธกเธนเธฅเธ•เธฑเธงเธญเธขเนเธฒเธ)';
    } else if (isDemo) {
      el.textContent = base + ' (เธขเธฑเธเนเธกเนเธกเธตเธเนเธญเธกเธนเธฅ โ€” เธเธฐเธญเธฑเธเน€เธ”เธ•เน€เธกเธทเนเธญเธกเธตเธเธฒเธฃเธเธฑเธเธ—เธถเธ)';
    } else {
      el.textContent = base + ' ยท เธญเธฑเธเน€เธ”เธ• ' + new Date().toLocaleTimeString('th-TH');
    }
  }
  function renderAdminDashboardCharts() {
    if (getCurrentRole() !== 'admin') return;
    document.querySelectorAll('#dash-admin-charts [id$="-note"]').forEach(function(el) {
      el.removeAttribute('data-base-note');
    });
    var summary = ADMIN_CHART_SAMPLES.healthSummary.slice();
    var screened = DASHBOARD_ADMIN_SAMPLE.screenedCount || 1847;
    renderAdminDonutLarge('admin-chart-health-summary', summary, screened.toLocaleString('th-TH'), 'เธเธฑเธ”เธเธฃเธญเธเนเธฅเนเธง', 'เธขเธฑเธเนเธกเนเธกเธตเธเนเธญเธกเธนเธฅ');
    setAdminChartDemoNote('admin-chart-summary-note', false, true);
    renderAdminTrendChart('admin-chart-trend', ADMIN_CHART_SAMPLES.healthTrend, 'เธขเธฑเธเนเธกเนเธกเธตเธเนเธญเธกเธนเธฅ');
    setAdminChartDemoNote('admin-chart-trend-note', false, true);
    renderAdminExecHorizBars('admin-chart-health', ADMIN_CHART_SAMPLES.health.slice(), 5, 'เธขเธฑเธเนเธกเนเธกเธตเธเนเธญเธกเธนเธฅ');
    setAdminChartDemoNote('admin-chart-health-note', false, true);
    renderAdminGauges('admin-chart-gauges', ADMIN_CHART_SAMPLES.gauges.slice(), 'เธขเธฑเธเนเธกเนเธกเธตเธเนเธญเธกเธนเธฅ');
    setAdminChartDemoNote('admin-chart-gauges-note', false, true);
    var refGrid = ADMIN_CHART_SAMPLES.referralGrid.map(function(r) { return Object.assign({}, r); });
    var pendingRef = refGrid.find(function(r) { return r.label === 'เธฃเธญเธชเนเธเธ•เนเธญ'; });
    if (pendingRef) pendingRef.count = DASHBOARD_ADMIN_SAMPLE.referralCount || pendingRef.count;
    renderAdminReferralGrid('admin-chart-referral', refGrid, 'เธขเธฑเธเนเธกเนเธกเธตเธเนเธญเธกเธนเธฅ');
    setAdminChartDemoNote('admin-chart-referral-note', false, true);
    renderAdminClinicGrouped('admin-chart-clinic', ADMIN_CHART_SAMPLES.clinicGrouped.slice(), 'เธขเธฑเธเนเธกเนเธกเธตเธเนเธญเธกเธนเธฅ');
    setAdminChartDemoNote('admin-chart-clinic-note', false, true);
    renderAdminVaccineRings('admin-chart-vaccine', ADMIN_CHART_SAMPLES.vaccineRings.slice(), 'เธขเธฑเธเนเธกเนเธกเธตเธเนเธญเธกเธนเธฅ');
    setAdminChartDemoNote('admin-chart-vaccine-note', false, true);
    renderAdminModuleCharts();
  }
  function renderAdminModuleCharts() {
    renderAdminColumnBars('admin-chart-screening', ADMIN_CHART_SAMPLES.screening.slice(), 'เธขเธฑเธเนเธกเนเธกเธตเธเนเธญเธกเธนเธฅ');

    renderAdminDonut('admin-chart-nutrition', ADMIN_CHART_SAMPLES.nutrition.slice(), 'เธขเธฑเธเนเธกเนเธกเธตเธเนเธญเธกเธนเธฅ');
    setAdminChartDemoNote('admin-chart-nutrition-note', false, true);
    renderAdminExecHorizBars('admin-chart-chronic', ADMIN_CHART_SAMPLES.chronic.slice(), 5, 'เธขเธฑเธเนเธกเนเธกเธตเธเนเธญเธกเธนเธฅ');
    setAdminChartDemoNote('admin-chart-chronic-note', false, true);
    renderAdminReferralGrid('admin-chart-appointment', ADMIN_CHART_SAMPLES.appointmentGrid.slice(), 'เธขเธฑเธเนเธกเนเธกเธตเธเนเธญเธกเธนเธฅ');
    setAdminChartDemoNote('admin-chart-appointment-note', false, true);

    setAdminChartDemoNote('admin-chart-mental-note', false, true);
    renderAdminExecHorizBars('admin-chart-disease', ADMIN_CHART_SAMPLES.diseaseWatch.slice(), 4, 'เธขเธฑเธเนเธกเนเธกเธตเธเนเธญเธกเธนเธฅ');
    setAdminChartDemoNote('admin-chart-disease-note', false, true);

    if (useGradeSample) gradeItems = ADMIN_CHART_SAMPLES.gradeVisits.slice();

    setAdminChartDemoNote('admin-chart-student-note', false, useGradeSample);
    renderAdminExecHorizBars('admin-chart-medicine', ADMIN_CHART_SAMPLES.medicineStock.map(function(it) {
      return { label: it.label, count: it.count, color: it.color, unit: '%' };

    setAdminChartDemoNote('admin-chart-medicine-note', false, true);
  }
  function loadNutritionRecords() {
    try { return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('sh-nutrition') || '[]'); } catch (e) { return []; }
  }
  function loadVaccineRecords() {
    try { return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('sh-vaccine') || '[]'); } catch (e) { return []; }
  }
  function computeMonthlyReportStats() {
    const visits = loadVisitRecords().filter(isRecordThisMonth);
    const emergencies = loadEmergencyRecords().filter(isRecordThisMonth);
    const nutrition = loadNutritionRecords().filter(isRecordThisMonth);
    const screening = loadScreeningRecords().filter(isRecordThisMonth);
    const vaccines = loadVaccineRecords().filter(isRecordThisMonth);
    const referralRecords = loadReferralRecords().filter(isRecordThisMonth);
    let referrals = referralRecords.length;
    if (!referrals) {
      referrals = visits.filter(function(r) {
        return (r.result || '').indexOf('เธชเนเธเธ•เนเธญ') !== -1;
      }).length + emergencies.filter(function(r) {
        return (r.result || '').indexOf('เธชเนเธเธ•เนเธญ') !== -1;
      }).length;
    }
    const hpv = vaccines.filter(function(r) {
      return (r.vaccine || '').indexOf('HPV') !== -1;
    }).length;
    return {
      visits: visits.length,
      emergencies: emergencies.length,
      referrals: referrals,
      screenings: nutrition.length + screening.length,
      vaccines: vaccines.length,
      hpv: hpv
    };
  }
  function getRecordTimestamp(record) {
    return getVisitRecordTime(record) || 0;
  }
  function computeReportWeeklyTrend() {
    const all = loadVisitRecords().concat(loadEmergencyRecords());
    const weeks = [];
    const now = new Date();
    for (let i = 3; i >= 0; i--) {
      const start = new Date(now);
      const dow = start.getDay();
      const mondayOffset = dow === 0 ? -6 : 1 - dow;
      start.setDate(start.getDate() + mondayOffset - i * 7);
      start.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);
      const end = new Date(start);
      end.setDate(end.getDate() + 6);
      end.setHours(23, 59, 59, 999);
      const label = start.toLocaleDateString('th-TH', { day: 'numeric', month: 'short' }) +
        'โ€“' + end.toLocaleDateString('th-TH', { day: 'numeric', month: 'short' });
      weeks.push({ start: start.getTime(), end: end.getTime(), label: label, count: 0 });
    }
    all.forEach(function(r) {
      const ts = getRecordTimestamp(r);
      if (!ts) return;
      weeks.forEach(function(w) {
        if (ts >= w.start && ts <= w.end) w.count++;
      });
    });
    return weeks;
  }
  function computeReportDiagnosisBreakdown() {
    const visits = loadVisitRecords().filter(isRecordThisMonth);
    const counts = {};
    visits.forEach(function(r) {
      const key = (r.diagnosis && r.diagnosis !== '-- เน€เธฅเธทเธญเธ --') ? r.diagnosis :
        ((r.symptom || '').trim().substring(0, 40) || 'เนเธกเนเธฃเธฐเธเธธ');
      counts[key] = (counts[key] || 0) + 1;
    });
    return Object.keys(counts).map(function(k) {
      return { label: k, count: counts[k] };
    }).sort(function(a, b) { return b.count - a.count; }).slice(0, 6);
  }
  function renderReportBarChart(stats) {
    const el = document.getElementById('report-bar-chart');
    if (!el) return;
    const items = [
      { label: 'เธฃเธฑเธเธเธฃเธดเธเธฒเธฃ', val: stats.visits, color: 'var(--green-mid)' },
      { label: 'เน€เธซเธ•เธธเธเธธเธเน€เธเธดเธ', val: stats.emergencies, color: 'var(--red)' },
      { label: 'เธชเนเธเธ•เนเธญ เธฃเธ.', val: stats.referrals, color: 'var(--blue)' },
      { label: 'เธเธฑเธ”เธเธฃเธญเธ/เนเธ เธเธเธฒเธเธฒเธฃ', val: stats.screenings, color: 'var(--gold)' },
      { label: 'เธเธตเธ”เธงเธฑเธเธเธตเธ', val: stats.vaccines, color: 'var(--teal)' },
      { label: 'เธงเธฑเธเธเธตเธ HPV', val: stats.hpv, color: '#8b5cf6' }
    ];
    const max = Math.max.apply(null, items.map(function(it) { return it.val; }).concat([1]));
    el.innerHTML = items.map(function(it) {
      const pct = Math.round(it.val / max * 100);
      return '<div class="report-bar-row"><div class="report-bar-head"><span>' + escVisitHtml(it.label) +
        '</span><span class="report-bar-val">' + it.val.toLocaleString('th-TH') + '</span></div>' +
        '<div class="progress-bar-wrap"><div class="progress-bar" style="width:' + pct + '%;background:' + it.color + ';"></div></div></div>';
    }).join('');
  }
  function renderReportWeekChart(weeks) {
    const el = document.getElementById('report-week-chart');
    if (!el) return;
    if (!weeks.length) {
      el.innerHTML = '<p style="color:var(--gray-mid);font-size:13px;">เธขเธฑเธเนเธกเนเธกเธตเธเนเธญเธกเธนเธฅ</p>';
      return;
    }
    const max = Math.max.apply(null, weeks.map(function(w) { return w.count; }).concat([1]));
    el.innerHTML = '<div class="report-week-bars">' + weeks.map(function(w) {
      const h = Math.max(3, Math.round(w.count / max * 100));
      return '<div class="report-week-col"><div class="report-week-count">' + w.count + '</div>' +
        '<div class="report-week-bar-wrap"><div class="report-week-bar" style="height:' + h + '%;"></div></div>' +
        '<div class="report-week-label">' + escVisitHtml(w.label) + '</div></div>';
    }).join('') + '</div>';
  }
  function renderReportDiagnosisChart(items) {
    const el = document.getElementById('report-diagnosis-chart');
    if (!el) return;
    if (!items.length) {
      el.innerHTML = '<p style="color:var(--gray-mid);font-size:13px;">เธขเธฑเธเนเธกเนเธกเธตเธเนเธญเธกเธนเธฅเธเธฒเธฃเธฃเธฑเธเธฉเธฒเนเธเน€เธ”เธทเธญเธเธเธตเน</p>';
      return;
    }
    const max = Math.max.apply(null, items.map(function(it) { return it.count; }).concat([1]));
    el.innerHTML = items.map(function(it) {
      const pct = Math.round(it.count / max * 100);
      return '<div class="report-bar-row"><div class="report-bar-head"><span>' + escVisitHtml(it.label) +
        '</span><span class="report-bar-val">' + it.count.toLocaleString('th-TH') + '</span></div>' +
        '<div class="progress-bar-wrap"><div class="progress-bar" style="width:' + pct + '%;"></div></div></div>';
    }).join('');
  }
  function setReportStatNum(id, n) {
    const el = document.getElementById(id);
    if (!el) return;
    const formatted = n.toLocaleString('th-TH');
    if (el.textContent !== formatted) {
      el.textContent = formatted;
      el.classList.add('report-stat-flash');
      setTimeout(function() { el.classList.remove('report-stat-flash'); }, 550);
    }
  }
  function notifyReportDataChanged() {
    refreshAllLiveCharts();
  }
  function refreshAdminDashboard() {
    if (getCurrentRole() !== 'admin') return;
    if (typeof renderAdminDashboardCharts === 'function') renderAdminDashboardCharts();
    if (typeof renderAdminDashboardExtras === 'function') renderAdminDashboardExtras();
  }
  function refreshAllLiveCharts() {
    renderMonthlyReportSummary();
    var dashPanel = document.getElementById('section-dashboard');
    var dashActive = dashPanel && dashPanel.classList.contains('active');
    if (getCurrentRole() === 'admin' && dashActive) {
      refreshAdminDashboard();
    }
    if (typeof renderVaccineHpvCoverageChart === 'function') renderVaccineHpvCoverageChart();
    if (typeof renderGradeChart === 'function') renderGradeChart();
    if (dashActive && typeof renderDashboard === 'function') {
      renderDashboard();
    } else if (getCurrentRole() === 'admin') {
      updateDashboardLayoutForRole();
    }
    var infoPanel = document.getElementById('section-gshps');
    if (infoPanel && infoPanel.classList.contains('active') && typeof renderInfoHub === 'function') {
      renderInfoHub();
    }
    var refPanel = document.getElementById('section-referral');
    if (refPanel && refPanel.classList.contains('active') && typeof renderReferralRecords === 'function') {
      renderReferralRecords();
    }
  }
  function renderMonthlyReportSummary() {
    const stats = computeMonthlyReportStats();
    setReportStatNum('report-month-visits', stats.visits);
    setReportStatNum('report-month-referrals', stats.referrals);
    setReportStatNum('report-month-screenings', stats.screenings);
    setReportStatNum('report-month-hpv', stats.hpv);
    const label = document.getElementById('report-month-label');
    if (label) {
      label.textContent = new Date().toLocaleDateString('th-TH', { month: 'long', year: 'numeric' });
    }
    const updated = document.getElementById('report-updated-at');
    if (updated) {
      updated.textContent = 'เธญเธฑเธเน€เธ”เธ•เธฅเนเธฒเธชเธธเธ”: ' + new Date().toLocaleString('th-TH');
    }
    renderReportBarChart(stats);
    renderReportWeekChart(computeReportWeeklyTrend());
    renderReportDiagnosisChart(computeReportDiagnosisBreakdown());
  }

  window.addEventListener('storage', function(e) {
    if (!e.key) return;
    if (e.key === 'sh-student-health') {
      renderStudentMyAppointment();
      if (typeof renderAppointmentList === 'function') renderAppointmentList();
    }
    if (e.key === 'sh-visit') {
      renderVisitToday();
      renderVisitHistory();
      if (isLimitedUserRole()) {
        renderVisitMyHistory();
        if (typeof renderVisitRecordViews === 'function') renderVisitRecordViews();
      }
    }
    var reportKeys = ['sh-visit', 'sh-emergency', 'sh-nutrition', 'sh-vaccine', 'sh-chronic', 'sh-disease-reports', 'sh-screening', 'sh-mental', 'sh-dashboard', 'sh-referral'];
    if (reportKeys.indexOf(e.key) !== -1) refreshAllLiveCharts();
  });

  document.addEventListener('visibilitychange', function() {
    if (!document.hidden) {
      refreshAllLiveCharts();
      if (getCurrentRole() === 'student' && loggedInStudentId) {
        refreshStudentAppointmentFromSheet(loggedInStudentId);
        var visitRecPanel = document.getElementById('section-visit-record');
        if (visitRecPanel && visitRecPanel.classList.contains('active')) {
          refreshVisitRecordsFromSheet(loggedInStudentId, renderVisitRecordViews);
        }
      }
    }
  });

  var _apptPollTimer = null;
  function startAppointmentPolling() {
    if (_apptPollTimer) return;
    _apptPollTimer = setInterval(function() {
      var visitPanel = document.getElementById('section-visit');
      var visitRecPanel = document.getElementById('section-visit-record');
      if (getCurrentRole() === 'student' && loggedInStudentId) {
        if (visitPanel && visitPanel.classList.contains('active')) {
          refreshStudentAppointmentFromSheet(loggedInStudentId);
        }
        if (visitRecPanel && visitRecPanel.classList.contains('active')) {
          refreshVisitRecordsFromSheet(loggedInStudentId, renderVisitRecordViews);
        }
      } else if (getCurrentRole() === 'teacher') {
        if (visitRecPanel && visitRecPanel.classList.contains('active')) {
          var scopeId = getVisitRecordScopeId();
          if (scopeId) refreshVisitRecordsFromSheet(scopeId, renderVisitRecordViews);
        }
      }
    }, 15000);
  }
  startAppointmentPolling();

  var _liveChartTimer = null;
  function startLiveChartPolling() {
    if (_liveChartTimer) return;
    _liveChartTimer = setInterval(refreshAllLiveCharts, 8000);
  }
  startLiveChartPolling();

  function formatInfoDateRange(item) {
    if (!item.dateStart) return 'โ€”';
    const fmt = function(iso) {
      const p = iso.split('-');
      if (p.length !== 3) return iso;
      return parseInt(p[2], 10) + '/' + parseInt(p[1], 10) + '/' + (parseInt(p[0], 10) + 543);
    };
    if (item.dateEnd && item.dateEnd !== item.dateStart) return fmt(item.dateStart) + ' โ€“ ' + fmt(item.dateEnd);
    return fmt(item.dateStart);
  }
