  function loadPublicKnowledgeStore() {
    try {
      const saved = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('sh-public-knowledge') || 'null');
      if (saved && saved.length) return saved;
    } catch (e) {}
    return PUBLIC_KNOWLEDGE_DEFAULT.slice();
  }
  function renderPublicSchoolInfo() {
    const countEl = document.getElementById('pub-student-count');
    if (countEl) countEl.textContent = getStudentRegistryCount().toLocaleString('th-TH');
    renderPublicCalendar();
  }
  function renderPublicCalendar() {
    const el = document.getElementById('pub-calendar-list');
    if (!el) return;
    const dash = loadDashboard();
    const today = new Date();
    today.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);
    const upcoming = (dash.calendar || []).filter(function(c) {
      if (!c.dateStart) return true;
      const d = new Date(c.dateStart);
      return !isNaN(d.getTime()) && d >= today;
    }).slice(0, 6);
    if (!upcoming.length) {
      el.innerHTML = '<p style="color:var(--gray-mid);font-size:13px;">เธขเธฑเธเนเธกเนเธกเธตเธเธดเธเธเธฃเธฃเธกเนเธเธเธเธดเธ—เธดเธ</p>';
      return;
    }
    el.innerHTML = upcoming.map(function(c) {
      const text = c.text || 'โ€”';
      let target = 'เธ—เธธเธเธฃเธฐเธ”เธฑเธเธเธฑเนเธ';
      const m = text.match(/\(([^)]+)\)/);
      if (m) target = m[1];
      const name = text.replace(/\s*\([^)]*\)\s*$/, '').trim();
      return '<div class="pub-activity-item"><h4>' + escVisitHtml(name) + '</h4>' +
        '<p>๐“… ' + escVisitHtml(formatInfoDateRange(c)) + ' | ๐‘ฅ ' + escVisitHtml(target) + '</p></div>';
    }).join('');
  }
  function loadPublicKnowledge(cat) {
    const el = document.getElementById('pub-knowledge-list');
    if (!el) return;
    let items = loadPublicKnowledgeStore();
    if (cat) items = items.filter(function(k) { return k.category === cat; });
    if (!items.length) {
      el.innerHTML = '<p style="color:var(--gray-mid);font-size:13px;">เธขเธฑเธเนเธกเนเธกเธตเน€เธเธทเนเธญเธซเธฒเนเธเธซเธกเธงเธ”เธเธตเน</p>';
      return;
    }
    el.innerHTML = items.map(function(k, i) {
      const id = 'pub-kn-' + i;
      const excerpt = (k.content || '').substring(0, 150) + ((k.content || '').length > 150 ? '...' : '');
      return '<div class="pub-article">' +
        '<div class="pub-article-title">' + escVisitHtml(k.title) + '</div>' +
        '<div class="pub-article-meta">๐“ ' + escVisitHtml(k.category) + ' | โ๏ธ ' + escVisitHtml(k.author) + ' | ๐“… ' + escVisitHtml(k.date) + '</div>' +
        '<div class="pub-article-excerpt">' + escVisitHtml(excerpt) + '</div>' +
        '<div id="' + id + '" class="pub-article-body">' + escVisitHtml(k.content) + '</div>' +
        '<button type="button" class="btn btn-sm btn-secondary" style="margin-top:8px;" onclick="togglePublicArticle(\'' + id + '\', this)">เธญเนเธฒเธเธ•เนเธญ</button></div>';
    }).join('');
  }
  function togglePublicArticle(id, btn) {
    const el = document.getElementById(id);
    if (!el || !btn) return;
    if (el.style.display === 'block') {
      el.style.display = 'none';
      btn.textContent = 'เธญเนเธฒเธเธ•เนเธญ';
    } else {
      el.style.display = 'block';
      btn.textContent = 'เธขเนเธญ';
    }
  }
  function renderPublicActivityList() {
    const el = document.getElementById('pub-activity-list');
    if (!el) return;
    const dash = loadDashboard();
    const items = (dash.calendar || []).map(function(c) {
      const text = c.text || '';
      let target = 'เธ—เธธเธเธฃเธฐเธ”เธฑเธเธเธฑเนเธ';
      const m = text.match(/\(([^)]+)\)/);
      if (m) target = m[1];
      const name = text.replace(/\s*\([^)]*\)\s*$/, '').trim();
      return { name: name, period: formatInfoDateRange(c), target: target, status: c.done ? 'โ… เน€เธชเธฃเนเธเนเธฅเนเธง' : '๐“… เธงเธฒเธเนเธเธ' };
    });
    if (!items.length) {
      el.innerHTML = '<p style="color:var(--gray-mid);font-size:13px;">เธขเธฑเธเนเธกเนเธกเธตเธเธดเธเธเธฃเธฃเธก</p>';
      return;
    }
    el.innerHTML = items.map(function(a) {
      return '<div class="pub-activity-item"><h4>' + escVisitHtml(a.name) + '</h4>' +
        '<p>๐“… ' + escVisitHtml(a.period) + ' | ๐‘ฅ ' + escVisitHtml(a.target) + '</p>' +
        '<p style="margin-top:4px;">' + a.status + '</p></div>';
    }).join('');
  }
  function renderPublicGshpsStatic() {
    const compEl = document.getElementById('pub-gshps-components');
    if (compEl && !compEl.dataset.rendered) {
      compEl.innerHTML = PUBLIC_GSHPS_COMPONENTS.map(function(c) {
        return '<li><div class="pub-comp-no">' + c.no + '</div><div><strong>' + escVisitHtml(c.title) + '</strong> โ€” ' + escVisitHtml(c.desc) + '</div></li>';
      }).join('');
      compEl.dataset.rendered = '1';
    }
    const indEl = document.getElementById('pub-gshps-indicators');
    if (indEl && !indEl.dataset.rendered) {
      indEl.innerHTML = PUBLIC_GSHPS_INDICATORS.map(function(ind) {
        return '<div class="pub-indicator-box ' + ind.cls + '"><strong>' + escVisitHtml(ind.title) + '</strong><p>' + escVisitHtml(ind.text) + '</p></div>';
      }).join('');
      indEl.dataset.rendered = '1';
    }
    const awEl = document.getElementById('pub-gshps-awards');
    if (awEl && !awEl.dataset.rendered) {
      awEl.innerHTML = PUBLIC_GSHPS_AWARDS.map(function(a) {
        return '<div class="pub-award-box pub-svc-gold"><div class="pub-award-icon">' + a.icon + '</div>' +
          '<div class="pub-award-name" style="color:' + a.color + ';">' + escVisitHtml(a.name) + '</div>' +
          '<div class="pub-award-range">' + escVisitHtml(a.range) + '</div></div>';
      }).join('');
      awEl.dataset.rendered = '1';
    }
  }
  function showPublicPage(page, el) {
    document.querySelectorAll('#section-public .pub-page').forEach(function(p) { p.classList.remove('active'); });
    document.querySelectorAll('#section-public .pub-tabs .tab').forEach(function(t) { t.classList.remove('active'); });
    const panel = document.getElementById('pub-page-' + page);
    if (panel) panel.classList.add('active');
    if (el) el.classList.add('active');
    if (page === 'knowledge') loadPublicKnowledge('');
    else if (page === 'activity') renderPublicActivityList();
    else if (page === 'gshps') renderPublicGshpsStatic();
  }
  function renderPublicHub() {
    renderPublicSchoolInfo();
    renderPublicGshpsStatic();
    const active = document.querySelector('#section-public .pub-tabs .tab.active');
    const page = active && active.getAttribute('data-pub-page');
    if (page === 'knowledge') loadPublicKnowledge('');
    else if (page === 'activity') renderPublicActivityList();
  }

  function visitIdMatch(a, b) {
    const sa = String(a).trim();
    const sb = String(b).trim();
    if (sa === sb) return true;
    const na = parseInt(sa, 10);
    const nb = parseInt(sb, 10);
    return !isNaN(na) && !isNaN(nb) && na === nb;
  }
  function getVisitRecordTime(record) {
    if (!record) return 0;
    if (typeof resolveVisitSavedAt === 'function') {
      var resolved = resolveVisitSavedAt(record);
      if (resolved) return resolved;
    }
    if (record.savedAt && record.savedAt >= 1e11) return record.savedAt;
    return 0;
  }
  function repairVisitRecordTimestamp(record, orphanIndex) {
    if (!record || typeof record !== 'object') return record;
    var ts = 0;
    if (typeof resolveVisitSavedAt === 'function') ts = resolveVisitSavedAt(record);
    if (!ts && record.savedAt && record.savedAt >= 1e11) ts = record.savedAt;
    if (!ts) {
      var m = String(record.recordId || '').match(/^v-(\d{11,})-/);
      if (m) ts = parseInt(m[1], 10);
    }
    if (!ts && typeof parseVisitRecordedAt === 'function') {
      ts = parseVisitRecordedAt(record.recordedAt);
    }
    if (record.timeRepaired && (!record.savedAt || (typeof isValidVisitSavedAt === 'function' && !isValidVisitSavedAt(record.savedAt)))) {
      delete record.timeRepaired;
    }
    if (!ts && record.timeRepaired && record.savedAt) ts = record.savedAt;
    if (!ts && (record.id || record.name) && !record.timeRepaired) {
      var base = new Date();
      base.setHours(8, 0, 0, 0);
      ts = base.getTime() + (orphanIndex || 0) * 180000;
      record.timeRepaired = true;
    }
    if (ts) {
      record.savedAt = ts;
      if (!record.recordedAt) record.recordedAt = new Date(ts).toLocaleString('th-TH');
      if (!record.recordId || String(record.recordId).indexOf('v-') !== 0) {
        record.recordId = 'v-' + ts + '-' + Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 8);
      }
    } else if (record.savedAt && typeof isValidVisitSavedAt === 'function' && !isValidVisitSavedAt(record.savedAt)) {
      delete record.savedAt;
    }
    return record;
  }
  function normalizeVisitRecord(record, orphanIndex) {
    return repairVisitRecordTimestamp(record, orphanIndex);
  }
  function getStudentClassForVisit(id) {
    var tr = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('#section-student tbody tr')).find(function(r) {
      return r.cells[0] && visitIdMatch(r.cells[0].textContent.trim(), id);
    });
    if (tr && tr.cells[2]) {
      var cls = tr.cells[2].textContent.trim();
      if (cls && cls !== 'โ€”') return cls;
    }
    return '';
  }
  function enrichVisitFromStudentRegistry(record) {
    if (!record || !record.id) return record;
    var id = String(record.id).trim();
    var sheetName = record.name ? String(record.name).trim() : '';
    if (sheetName === 'เธเธฑเธเน€เธฃเธตเธขเธ' || sheetName === 'เธเธฃเธน' || sheetName === 'เธเธธเธเธฅเธฒเธเธฃ') sheetName = '';
    var name = typeof getStudentDisplayName === 'function' ? getStudentDisplayName(id) : '';
    if (!name) {
      var student = typeof lookupStudent === 'function' ? lookupStudent(id) : null;
      if (student && student.fullName) name = student.fullName;
    }
    if (name) record.name = name;
    else if (sheetName) record.name = sheetName;
    var cls = getStudentClassForVisit(id);
    if (cls) record.class = cls;
    if (!record.type) record.type = 'เธเธฑเธเน€เธฃเธตเธขเธ';
    return record;
  }
  function pruneEmptyVisitTodayRecords(records) {
    var before = records.length;
    for (var i = records.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
      var r = records[i];
      if (!isVisitToday(r)) continue;
      var name = r.name ? String(r.name).trim() : '';
      var id = r.id ? String(r.id).trim() : '';
      if (!name || !id) records.splice(i, 1);
    }
    return records.length !== before;
  }
  function dedupeVisitRecordsByStudentDay(records) {
    var best = {};
    records.forEach(function(r) {
      if (!r.id) return;
      var ts = getVisitRecordTime(r);
      if (!ts) return;
      var d = new Date(ts);
      var dayKey = d.getFullYear() + '-' + d.getMonth() + '-' + d.getDate() + '|' + String(r.id).trim();
      if (!best[dayKey] || ts > (getVisitRecordTime(best[dayKey]) || 0)) best[dayKey] = r;
    });
    var keepSet = {};
    Object.keys(best).forEach(function(k) { keepSet[best[k].recordId || visitRecordMergeKey(best[k])] = true; });
    var before = records.length;
    for (var i = records.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
      var r = records[i];
      if (!r.id || !isVisitToday(r)) continue;
      if (r.fromSheet || (r.recordId && String(r.recordId).indexOf('v-sheet-') === 0)) continue;
      var key = r.recordId || visitRecordMergeKey(r);
      if (keepSet[key]) continue;
      var ts = getVisitRecordTime(r);
      if (!ts) continue;
      var d = new Date(ts);
      var dayKey = d.getFullYear() + '-' + d.getMonth() + '-' + d.getDate() + '|' + String(r.id).trim();
      if (best[dayKey] && best[dayKey] !== r) records.splice(i, 1);
    }
    return records.length !== before;
  }
  function loadVisitRecords() {
    let records = [];
    try { records = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('sh-visit') || '[]'); } catch (e) {}
    if (!records.length) {
      try {
        var backup = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('sh-visit-backup') || '[]');
        if (Array.isArray(backup) && backup.length) records = backup;
      } catch (e2) {}
    }
    var repaired = false;
    var orphanIdx = 0;
    records.forEach(function(r) {
      var before = r.savedAt;
      var beforeRecorded = r.recordedAt;
      var beforeId = r.recordId;
      var isSheet = r.fromSheet || (r.recordId && String(r.recordId).indexOf('v-sheet-') === 0);
      if (isSheet && !isVisitToday(r) && typeof assignSheetVisitTodayTime_ === 'function') {
        assignSheetVisitTodayTime_(r, r.sheetRow ? r.sheetRow - 2 : orphanIdx++);
        repaired = true;
      } else if (!getVisitRecordTime(r)) {
        repairVisitRecordTimestamp(r, orphanIdx++);
      } else {
        normalizeVisitRecord(r, 0);
      }
      if (r.savedAt !== before || r.recordedAt !== beforeRecorded || r.recordId !== beforeId) repaired = true;
      enrichVisitFromStudentRegistry(r);
    });
    if (pruneEmptyVisitTodayRecords(records)) repaired = true;
    if (dedupeVisitRecordsByStudentDay(records)) repaired = true;
    if (repaired) saveVisitRecords(records);
    return records;
  }
  function saveVisitRecords(records) {
    try {
      localStorage.setItem('sh-visit', JSON.stringify(records));
      localStorage.setItem('sh-visit-backup', JSON.stringify(records));
    } catch (e) {
      console.error('[sh-visit] save failed', e);
      try { alert('เธเธฑเธเธ—เธถเธเธฃเธฒเธขเธเธฒเธฃเธฃเธฑเธเธฉเธฒเนเธกเนเธชเธณเน€เธฃเนเธ โ€” เธ—เธตเนเน€เธเนเธเน€เธ•เนเธกเธซเธฃเธทเธญเธ–เธนเธเธเธดเธ”เธเธฑเนเธ เธเธฃเธธเธ“เธฒเธฅเธญเธเธญเธตเธเธเธฃเธฑเนเธ'); } catch (e2) {}
    }
  }
  function escVisitHtml(s) {
    return String(s || '').replace(/&/g, '&amp;').replace(/</g, '&lt;').replace(/"/g, '&quot;');
  }
  function getVisitResultOptions() {
    return ['เธเธฅเธฑเธเธเธฑเนเธเน€เธฃเธตเธขเธเนเธ”เน', 'เธเธฑเธเธ—เธตเนเธซเนเธญเธเธเธขเธฒเธเธฒเธฅ', 'เนเธเนเธเธเธนเนเธเธเธเธฃเธญเธเธฃเธฑเธเธเธฅเธฑเธเธเนเธฒเธ', 'เธชเนเธเธ•เนเธญเนเธฃเธเธเธขเธฒเธเธฒเธฅ'];
  }
  function visitResultMatches(a, b) {
    var x = String(a || '').trim();
    var y = String(b || '').trim();
    if (!x || !y) return x === y;
    if (x === y) return true;
    if (x.indexOf(y) !== -1 || y.indexOf(x) !== -1) return true;
    if (x.indexOf('เธเธฅเธฑเธเธเธฑเนเธ') !== -1 && y.indexOf('เธเธฅเธฑเธเธเธฑเนเธ') !== -1) return true;
    if (x.indexOf('เธเธฑเธเธ—เธตเน') !== -1 && y.indexOf('เธเธฑเธเธ—เธตเน') !== -1) return true;
    if (x.indexOf('เธเธนเนเธเธเธเธฃเธญเธ') !== -1 && y.indexOf('เธเธนเนเธเธเธเธฃเธญเธ') !== -1) return true;
    if (x.indexOf('เธชเนเธเธ•เนเธญ') !== -1 && y.indexOf('เธชเนเธเธ•เนเธญ') !== -1) return true;
    return false;
  }
  function getVisitStatusSelectClass(result) {
    var badge = getVisitBadgeInfo(result);
    if (badge.cls === 'badge-green') return 'visit-status-green';
    if (badge.cls === 'badge-gold') return 'visit-status-gold';
    if (badge.cls === 'badge-red') return 'visit-status-red';
    return 'visit-status-blue';
  }
  function buildVisitStatusSelectHtml(r) {
    if (!r || !r.recordId) {
      var badge = getVisitBadgeInfo(r && r.result);
      return '<span class="badge ' + badge.cls + '">' + escVisitHtml(badge.text) + '</span>';
    }
    var current = r.result || '';
    var opts = getVisitResultOptions();
    var cls = getVisitStatusSelectClass(current);
    var rid = escVisitHtml(r.recordId);
    var html = '<select class="visit-status-select ' + cls + '" data-visit-id="' + rid + '" onchange="updateVisitRecordResult(this)" title="เน€เธเธฅเธตเนเธขเธเธชเธ–เธฒเธเธฐ">';
    var matched = false;
    opts.forEach(function(opt) {
      var selected = visitResultMatches(current, opt);
      if (selected) matched = true;
      html += '<option value="' + escVisitHtml(opt) + '"' + (selected ? ' selected' : '') + '>' + escVisitHtml(getVisitBadgeInfo(opt).text) + '</option>';
    });
    if (current && !matched) {
      html += '<option value="' + escVisitHtml(current) + '" selected>' + escVisitHtml(getVisitBadgeInfo(current).text) + '</option>';
    }
    html += '</select>';
    return html;
  }
  function updateVisitRecordResult(el) {
    if (!el) return;
    var recordId = el.getAttribute('data-visit-id');
    var newResult = el.value;
    if (!recordId || !newResult) return;
    var records = loadVisitRecords();
    var idx = records.findIndex(function(r) { return r.recordId === recordId; });
    if (idx < 0) return;
    records[idx].result = newResult;
    saveVisitRecords(records);
    if (typeof syncToSheetQuiet === 'function' && typeof buildVisitSheetRow === 'function' && typeof SHEET_NAMES !== 'undefined') {
      syncToSheetQuiet(SHEET_NAMES.visit, buildVisitSheetRow(records[idx]));
    }
    if (typeof notifyReportDataChanged === 'function') notifyReportDataChanged();
    el.className = 'visit-status-select ' + getVisitStatusSelectClass(newResult);
    var row = el.closest('tr');
    if (row && row.cells && row.cells.length >= 6) {
      var advice = getVisitAdvice(records[idx]);
      row.cells[5].textContent = advice;
    }
    renderVisitHistory();
  }
  window.updateVisitRecordResult = updateVisitRecordResult;
  function getVisitBadgeInfo(result) {
    const r = result || '';
    if (r.indexOf('เธเธฅเธฑเธเธเธฑเนเธ') !== -1) return { cls: 'badge-green', text: 'เธเธฅเธฑเธเธเธฑเนเธเนเธฅเนเธง' };
    if (r.indexOf('เธเธฑเธเธ—เธตเน') !== -1) return { cls: 'badge-gold', text: 'เธเธฑเธเธเธขเธฒเธเธฒเธฅ' };
    if (r.indexOf('เธเธนเนเธเธเธเธฃเธญเธ') !== -1) return { cls: 'badge-red', text: 'เธฃเธญเธเธนเนเธเธเธเธฃเธญเธ' };
    if (r.indexOf('เธชเนเธเธ•เนเธญ') !== -1) return { cls: 'badge-red', text: 'เธชเนเธเธ•เนเธญเนเธฃเธเธเธขเธฒเธเธฒเธฅ' };
    return { cls: 'badge-blue', text: r || 'โ€”' };
  }
  function getVisitAdvice(record) {
    const r = record.result || '';
    if (r.indexOf('เธเธฅเธฑเธเธเธฑเนเธ') !== -1) return 'เธ”เธทเนเธกเธเนเธณเธกเธฒเธ เธเธฑเธเธเนเธญเธ เธซเธฅเธตเธเน€เธฅเธตเนเธขเธเธเธดเธเธเธฃเธฃเธกเธซเธเธฑเธ';
    if (r.indexOf('เธเธฑเธเธ—เธตเน') !== -1) return 'เธชเธฑเธเน€เธเธ•เธญเธฒเธเธฒเธฃ 1 เธเธก. เนเธเนเธเธเธฃเธนเธซเธฒเธเนเธกเนเธ”เธตเธเธถเนเธ';
    if (r.indexOf('เธเธนเนเธเธเธเธฃเธญเธ') !== -1) return 'เธเธฑเธเนเธเธ—เธตเนเธฃเนเธก เธฃเธญเธเธนเนเธเธเธเธฃเธญเธเธกเธฒเธฃเธฑเธ เธซเธฒเธเนเธเนเธชเธนเธเนเธซเนเธเธเนเธเธ—เธขเน';
    if (r.indexOf('เธชเนเธเธ•เนเธญ') !== -1) return 'เธชเนเธเธ•เนเธญเนเธฃเธเธเธขเธฒเธเธฒเธฅเธ—เธฑเธเธ—เธต';
    return record.treatment || 'โ€”';
  }
  function formatVisitTime(record) {
    var fromRecorded = formatVisitRecordedAtDisplay(record.recordedAt, 'today');
    if (fromRecorded && /^\d{1,2}:\d{2}$/.test(fromRecorded)) return fromRecorded;
    var ts = getVisitRecordTime(record);
    if (!ts) return 'โ€”';
    const d = new Date(ts);
    return String(d.getHours()).padStart(2, '0') + ':' + String(d.getMinutes()).padStart(2, '0');
  }
  function isVisitToday(record) {
    var ts = getVisitRecordTime(record);
    if (!ts && record.recordedAt && typeof parseVisitRecordedAt === 'function') {
      ts = parseVisitRecordedAt(record.recordedAt);
    }
    if (!ts) return false;
    const d = new Date(ts);
    const now = new Date();
    return d.getDate() === now.getDate() && d.getMonth() === now.getMonth() && d.getFullYear() === now.getFullYear();
  }
  function getVisitListPeriod() {
    var el = document.getElementById('visit-list-period');
    return (el && el.value) ? el.value : 'today';
  }
  function isVisitThisWeek(record) {
    var ts = getVisitRecordTime(record);
    if (!ts) return false;
    var now = new Date();
    var start = new Date(now);
    var dow = start.getDay();
    var mondayOffset = dow === 0 ? -6 : 1 - dow;
    start.setDate(start.getDate() + mondayOffset);
    start.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);
    var end = new Date(start);
    end.setDate(end.getDate() + 6);
    end.setHours(23, 59, 59, 999);
    return ts >= start.getTime() && ts <= end.getTime();
  }
  function filterVisitRecordsByPeriod(records, period) {
    if (period === 'week') return records.filter(isVisitThisWeek);
    if (period === 'month') return records.filter(isRecordThisMonth);
    if (period === 'year') return records.filter(isRecordThisYear);
    return records.filter(function(r) {
      return isVisitToday(r);
    });
  }
  function formatVisitRecordedAtDisplay(recordedAt, period) {
    if (!recordedAt) return '';
    var ra = String(recordedAt).trim();
    var comma = ra.indexOf(',');
    if (comma !== -1) {
      var datePart = ra.slice(0, comma).trim();
      var timePart = ra.slice(comma + 1).trim();
      if (period === 'today' && /^\d{1,2}:\d{2}/.test(timePart)) return timePart.slice(0, 5);
      return datePart + (timePart ? ' ' + timePart.slice(0, 5) : '');
    }
    var parts = ra.split(/\s+/);
    if (parts.length >= 2) {
      var timePart2 = parts[parts.length - 1];
      if (period === 'today' && /^\d{1,2}:\d{2}/.test(timePart2)) return timePart2.slice(0, 5);
      return parts[0] + ' ' + timePart2.slice(0, 5);
    }
    return ra;
  }
  function formatVisitListTime(record, period) {
    if (period === 'today') return formatVisitTime(record);
    var fromRecorded = formatVisitRecordedAtDisplay(record.recordedAt, period);
    if (fromRecorded) return fromRecorded;
    var ts = getVisitRecordTime(record);
    if (!ts) return 'โ€”';
    var d = new Date(ts);
    return d.toLocaleDateString('th-TH', { day: 'numeric', month: 'short', year: '2-digit' }) + ' ' +
      String(d.getHours()).padStart(2, '0') + ':' + String(d.getMinutes()).padStart(2, '0');
  }
  function buildVisitListRowHtml(r, period, highlightId) {
    var badge = getVisitBadgeInfo(r.result);
    var symptom = r.symptom || r.diagnosis || 'โ€”';
    var rowClass = (highlightId && r.recordId === highlightId) ? ' class="visit-row-flash"' : '';
    var rowId = r.recordId ? ' data-visit-id="' + escVisitHtml(r.recordId) + '"' : '';
    var statusCell = (typeof isFullStaffRole === 'function' && isFullStaffRole())
      ? buildVisitStatusSelectHtml(r)
      : '<span class="badge ' + badge.cls + '">' + escVisitHtml(badge.text) + '</span>';
    return '<tr' + rowClass + rowId + '><td>' + escVisitHtml(formatVisitListTime(r, period)) +
      '</td><td class="visit-col-staff">' + escVisitHtml(r.name) +
      '</td><td class="visit-col-staff">' + escVisitHtml(r.class) +
      '</td><td>' + escVisitHtml(symptom) +
      '</td><td>' + statusCell +
      '</td><td>' + escVisitHtml(getVisitAdvice(r)) + '</td></tr>';
  }
  function applyVisitColStaffVisibility() {
    if (staffRolesReady() && typeof getCurrentRole === 'function') {
      var isStaff = STAFF_ROLES.includes(getCurrentRole());
      document.querySelectorAll('.visit-col-staff').forEach(function(el) {
        el.style.display = isStaff ? '' : 'none';
      });
    }
  }
  function renderVisitHistory() {
    var tbody = document.getElementById('visit-history');
    if (!tbody) return;
    var note = document.getElementById('visit-history-note');
    var all = loadVisitRecords().slice().sort(function(a, b) { return (b.savedAt || 0) - (a.savedAt || 0); });
    var limit = 100;
    var records = all.length > limit ? all.slice(0, limit) : all;
    if (!records.length) {
      tbody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="6" style="text-align:center;color:var(--gray-mid);padding:18px;">เธขเธฑเธเนเธกเนเธกเธตเธเธฃเธฐเธงเธฑเธ•เธดเธเธฒเธฃเธฃเธฑเธเธเธฃเธดเธเธฒเธฃ</td></tr>';
      if (note) note.textContent = '';
      return;
    }
    tbody.innerHTML = records.map(function(r) { return buildVisitListRowHtml(r, 'history'); }).join('');
    if (note) {
      note.textContent = all.length > limit
        ? 'เนเธชเธ”เธ ' + limit.toLocaleString('th-TH') + ' เธฃเธฒเธขเธเธฒเธฃเธฅเนเธฒเธชเธธเธ” เธเธฒเธเธ—เธฑเนเธเธซเธกเธ” ' + all.length.toLocaleString('th-TH') + ' เธฃเธฒเธขเธเธฒเธฃ'
        : 'เธ—เธฑเนเธเธซเธกเธ” ' + all.length.toLocaleString('th-TH') + ' เธฃเธฒเธขเธเธฒเธฃ';
    }
    applyVisitColStaffVisibility();
  }
  function renderVisitToday(highlightId) {
    const tbody = document.getElementById('visit-today');
    if (!tbody) return;
    const period = getVisitListPeriod();
    const periodLabels = {
      today: 'เธฃเธฒเธขเธเธฒเธฃเธงเธฑเธเธเธตเน',
      week: 'เธฃเธฒเธขเธเธฒเธฃเธชเธฑเธเธ”เธฒเธซเนเธเธตเน',
      month: 'เธฃเธฒเธขเธเธฒเธฃเน€เธ”เธทเธญเธเธเธตเน',
      year: 'เธฃเธฒเธขเธเธฒเธฃเธเธตเธเธตเน'
    };
    const emptyLabels = {
      today: 'เธขเธฑเธเนเธกเนเธกเธตเธฃเธฒเธขเธเธฒเธฃเธงเธฑเธเธเธตเน',
      week: 'เธขเธฑเธเนเธกเนเธกเธตเธฃเธฒเธขเธเธฒเธฃเธชเธฑเธเธ”เธฒเธซเนเธเธตเน',
      month: 'เธขเธฑเธเนเธกเนเธกเธตเธฃเธฒเธขเธเธฒเธฃเน€เธ”เธทเธญเธเธเธตเน',
      year: 'เธขเธฑเธเนเธกเนเธกเธตเธฃเธฒเธขเธเธฒเธฃเธเธตเธเธตเน'
    };
    var titleEl = document.getElementById('visit-list-title');
    if (titleEl) titleEl.textContent = periodLabels[period] || periodLabels.today;
    var timeHead = document.getElementById('visit-list-time-head');
    if (timeHead) timeHead.textContent = period === 'today' ? 'เน€เธงเธฅเธฒ' : 'เธงเธฑเธเธ—เธตเน/เน€เธงเธฅเธฒ';
    const records = filterVisitRecordsByPeriod(loadVisitRecords(), period)
      .sort(function(a, b) { return (b.savedAt || 0) - (a.savedAt || 0); });
    if (!records.length) {
      tbody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="6" style="text-align:center;color:var(--gray-mid);padding:18px;">' +
        (emptyLabels[period] || emptyLabels.today) + '</td></tr>';
    } else {
      tbody.innerHTML = records.map(function(r) { return buildVisitListRowHtml(r, period, highlightId); }).join('');
    }
    applyVisitColStaffVisibility();
    renderVisitHistory();
  }
  function focusVisitTodayList(record) {
    var periodEl = document.getElementById('visit-list-period');
    if (periodEl) periodEl.value = 'today';
    var highlightId = record && record.recordId ? record.recordId : null;
    renderVisitToday(highlightId);
    var card = document.getElementById('visit-today-card');
    if (card) {
      card.classList.add('visit-card-pulse');
      card.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'start' });
      setTimeout(function() { card.classList.remove('visit-card-pulse'); }, 2400);
    }
    if (highlightId) {
      setTimeout(function() {
        var row = document.querySelector('#visit-today tr[data-visit-id="' + highlightId.replace(/"/g, '\\"') + '"]');
        if (row) row.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'nearest' });
      }, 350);
    }
  }
  window.focusVisitTodayList = focusVisitTodayList;
  function getVisitMyScopeId() {
    if (loggedInStudentId) return loggedInStudentId;
    if (getCurrentRole() === 'teacher') {
      const el = document.getElementById('vis-my-id');
      return el ? (el.value || '').trim() : '';
    }
    return '';
  }
  function fillVisitMyForm() {
    if (!isLimitedUser()) return;
    const isStudentLogin = getCurrentRole() === 'student' && loggedInStudentId;
    setLimitedUserFieldMode(!!isStudentLogin);
    const idEl = document.getElementById('vis-my-id');
    const nameEl = document.getElementById('vis-my-name');
    if (isStudentLogin) {
      const d = (typeof lookupStudent === 'function') ? lookupStudent(loggedInStudentId) : null;
      if (idEl) idEl.value = loggedInStudentId;
      if (nameEl) nameEl.value = (d && d.fullName) ? d.fullName : '';
    } else if (getCurrentRole() === 'teacher') {
      if (idEl) idEl.value = '';
      if (nameEl) nameEl.value = '';
    }
    if (isStudentLogin) {
      renderStudentScreeningResults(getVisitMyScopeId());
      refreshStudentAppointmentFromSheet(loggedInStudentId);
    } else {
      renderVisitMyHistory();
      renderStudentMyAppointment();
    }
  }
  function visitRecordMergeKey(r) {
    if (r.sheetRow) return 'sheet-r' + r.sheetRow + '|' + String(r.id || '');
    return String(r.id || '') + '|' + String(r.recordedAt || '') + '|' + String(r.symptom || '') + '|' + String(r.diagnosis || '');
  }
  function appendStudentHealthVisit(record) {
    if (!record || !record.id) return;
    var idKey = canonicalStudentIdKey(record.id);
    var extra = getStudentHealthExtra(idKey) || {};
    var visits = Array.isArray(extra.visits) ? extra.visits.slice() : [];
    var key = visitRecordMergeKey(record);
    if (!visits.some(function(v) { return visitRecordMergeKey(v) === key; })) {
      visits.unshift(record);
      setStudentHealthExtra(idKey, { visits: visits });
    }
  }
  function collectVisitRecordsForScope(scopeId) {
    var merged = [];
    var keys = {};
    function add(r) {
      if (!r || !visitIdMatch(r.id, scopeId)) return;
      var k = visitRecordMergeKey(r);
      if (keys[k]) return;
      keys[k] = true;
      merged.push(r);
    }
    loadVisitRecords().forEach(add);
    var extra = getStudentHealthExtra(canonicalStudentIdKey(scopeId));
    if (extra && Array.isArray(extra.visits)) extra.visits.forEach(add);
    return merged.sort(function(a, b) { return (b.savedAt || 0) - (a.savedAt || 0); });
  }
  function mergeVisitRecordsFromSheet(studentId, sheetVisits) {
    if (!sheetVisits || !sheetVisits.length) return;
    var all = loadVisitRecords();
    var keys = {};
    all.forEach(function(r) { keys[visitRecordMergeKey(r)] = true; });
    sheetVisits.forEach(function(r) {
      if (!r || !visitIdMatch(r.id, studentId)) return;
      enrichVisitFromStudentRegistry(r);
      if (typeof repairVisitRecordTimestamp === 'function') repairVisitRecordTimestamp(r, 0);
      var key = visitRecordMergeKey(r);
      if (keys[key]) return;
      keys[key] = true;
      all.unshift(r);
    });
    saveVisitRecords(all);
  }
  function replaceVisitRecordsFromSheetAll(sheetVisits) {
    if (!sheetVisits || !sheetVisits.length) return;
    var localToday = [];
    try {
      localToday = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('sh-visit') || '[]').filter(function(r) {
        return isVisitToday(r) && r.recordId && String(r.recordId).indexOf('v-sheet-') !== 0;
      });
    } catch (e) {}
    var keys = {};
    var merged = [];
    sheetVisits.forEach(function(r) {
      if (typeof assignSheetVisitTodayTime_ === 'function') {
        assignSheetVisitTodayTime_(r, r.sheetRow ? r.sheetRow - 2 : merged.length);
      }
      enrichVisitFromStudentRegistry(r);
      var key = visitRecordMergeKey(r);
      if (keys[key]) return;
      keys[key] = true;
      merged.push(r);
    });
    localToday.forEach(function(r) {
      enrichVisitFromStudentRegistry(r);
      var key = visitRecordMergeKey(r);
      if (keys[key]) return;
      keys[key] = true;
      merged.unshift(r);
    });
    merged.sort(function(a, b) { return (b.savedAt || 0) - (a.savedAt || 0); });
    saveVisitRecords(merged);
  }
  var visitSheetRefreshPending = false;
  function refreshAllVisitRecordsFromSheetForStaff(callback) {
    if (typeof isFullStaffRole === 'function' && !isFullStaffRole()) {
      if (callback) callback();
      return;
    }
    if (typeof fetchAllVisitRecordsFromSheet !== 'function') {
      if (callback) callback();
      return;
    }
    if (visitSheetRefreshPending) {
      if (callback) callback();
      return;
    }
    visitSheetRefreshPending = true;
    fetchAllVisitRecordsFromSheet().then(function(sheetVisits) {
      visitSheetRefreshPending = false;
      if (sheetVisits && sheetVisits.length) {
        replaceVisitRecordsFromSheetAll(sheetVisits);
      }
      if (typeof renderVisitToday === 'function') renderVisitToday();
      if (typeof renderVisitHistory === 'function') renderVisitHistory();
      if (callback) callback();
    }).catch(function() {
      visitSheetRefreshPending = false;
      if (callback) callback();
    });
  }
  function refreshVisitRecordsFromSheet(studentId, callback) {
    if (!studentId) {
      if (callback) callback();
      return;
    }
    if (typeof fetchVisitRecordsFromSheet !== 'function') {
      if (callback) callback();
      return;
    }
    fetchVisitRecordsFromSheet(studentId).then(function(visits) {
      if (visits && visits.length) {
        visits.forEach(function(r) { enrichVisitFromStudentRegistry(r); });
      }
      mergeVisitRecordsFromSheet(studentId, visits);
      if (typeof renderVisitToday === 'function') renderVisitToday();
      if (typeof renderVisitHistory === 'function') renderVisitHistory();
      if (typeof renderVisitRecordViews === 'function') renderVisitRecordViews();
      if (callback) callback();
    }).catch(function() {
      if (typeof renderVisitRecordViews === 'function') renderVisitRecordViews();
      if (callback) callback();
    });
  }
  function getVisitRecordScopeId() {
    if (loggedInStudentId) return loggedInStudentId;
    var el = document.getElementById('vis-rec-id');
    return el ? (el.value || '').trim() : '';
  }
  function getVisitRecordListPeriod() {
    var el = document.getElementById('visit-rec-list-period');
    return (el && el.value) ? el.value : 'today';
  }
  function renderVisitRecordHistoryPanel(scopeId) {
    scopeId = scopeId !== undefined ? scopeId : getVisitRecordScopeId();
    var tbody = document.getElementById('visit-rec-history');
    if (!tbody) return;
    var note = document.getElementById('visit-rec-history-note');
    if (!scopeId) {
      tbody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="6" style="text-align:center;color:var(--gray-mid);padding:18px;">เธเธฃเธธเธ“เธฒเธเธฃเธญเธเน€เธฅเธเธเธฃเธฐเธเธณเธ•เธฑเธงเน€เธเธทเนเธญเธ”เธนเธเธฃเธฐเธงเธฑเธ•เธดเธเธฒเธฃเธฃเธฑเธเธฉเธฒ</td></tr>';
      if (note) note.textContent = '';
      applyVisitColStaffVisibility();
      return;
    }
    var all = collectVisitRecordsForScope(scopeId);
    var limit = 100;
    var records = all.length > limit ? all.slice(0, limit) : all;
    if (!records.length) {
      tbody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="6" style="text-align:center;color:var(--gray-mid);padding:18px;">เธขเธฑเธเนเธกเนเธกเธตเธเธฃเธฐเธงเธฑเธ•เธดเธเธฒเธฃเธฃเธฑเธเธเธฃเธดเธเธฒเธฃ</td></tr>';
      if (note) note.textContent = '';
      applyVisitColStaffVisibility();
      return;
    }
    tbody.innerHTML = records.map(function(r) { return buildVisitListRowHtml(r, 'history'); }).join('');
    if (note) {
      note.textContent = all.length > limit
        ? 'เนเธชเธ”เธ ' + limit.toLocaleString('th-TH') + ' เธฃเธฒเธขเธเธฒเธฃเธฅเนเธฒเธชเธธเธ” เธเธฒเธเธ—เธฑเนเธเธซเธกเธ” ' + all.length.toLocaleString('th-TH') + ' เธฃเธฒเธขเธเธฒเธฃ'
        : 'เธ—เธฑเนเธเธซเธกเธ” ' + all.length.toLocaleString('th-TH') + ' เธฃเธฒเธขเธเธฒเธฃ';
    }
    applyVisitColStaffVisibility();
  }
  function renderVisitRecordToday(scopeId) {
    scopeId = scopeId !== undefined ? scopeId : getVisitRecordScopeId();
    var tbody = document.getElementById('visit-rec-today');
    if (!tbody) return;
    var period = getVisitRecordListPeriod();
    var periodLabels = {
      today: 'เธฃเธฒเธขเธเธฒเธฃเธงเธฑเธเธเธตเน',
      week: 'เธฃเธฒเธขเธเธฒเธฃเธชเธฑเธเธ”เธฒเธซเนเธเธตเน',
      month: 'เธฃเธฒเธขเธเธฒเธฃเน€เธ”เธทเธญเธเธเธตเน',
      year: 'เธฃเธฒเธขเธเธฒเธฃเธเธตเธเธตเน'
    };
    var emptyLabels = {
      today: 'เธขเธฑเธเนเธกเนเธกเธตเธฃเธฒเธขเธเธฒเธฃเธงเธฑเธเธเธตเน',
      week: 'เธขเธฑเธเนเธกเนเธกเธตเธฃเธฒเธขเธเธฒเธฃเธชเธฑเธเธ”เธฒเธซเนเธเธตเน',
      month: 'เธขเธฑเธเนเธกเนเธกเธตเธฃเธฒเธขเธเธฒเธฃเน€เธ”เธทเธญเธเธเธตเน',
      year: 'เธขเธฑเธเนเธกเนเธกเธตเธฃเธฒเธขเธเธฒเธฃเธเธตเธเธตเน'
    };
    var titleEl = document.getElementById('visit-rec-list-title');
    if (titleEl) titleEl.textContent = periodLabels[period] || periodLabels.today;
    var timeHead = document.getElementById('visit-rec-list-time-head');
    if (timeHead) timeHead.textContent = period === 'today' ? 'เน€เธงเธฅเธฒ' : 'เธงเธฑเธเธ—เธตเน/เน€เธงเธฅเธฒ';
    if (!scopeId) {
      tbody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="6" style="text-align:center;color:var(--gray-mid);padding:18px;">เธเธฃเธธเธ“เธฒเธเธฃเธญเธเน€เธฅเธเธเธฃเธฐเธเธณเธ•เธฑเธงเน€เธเธทเนเธญเธ”เธนเธเธฃเธฐเธงเธฑเธ•เธดเธเธฒเธฃเธฃเธฑเธเธฉเธฒ</td></tr>';
      applyVisitColStaffVisibility();
      renderVisitRecordHistoryPanel(scopeId);
      return;
    }
    var records = filterVisitRecordsByPeriod(collectVisitRecordsForScope(scopeId), period)
      .sort(function(a, b) { return (b.savedAt || 0) - (a.savedAt || 0); });
    if (!records.length) {
      tbody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="6" style="text-align:center;color:var(--gray-mid);padding:18px;">' +
        (emptyLabels[period] || emptyLabels.today) + '</td></tr>';
    } else {
      tbody.innerHTML = records.map(function(r) { return buildVisitListRowHtml(r, period); }).join('');
    }
    applyVisitColStaffVisibility();
    renderVisitRecordHistoryPanel(scopeId);
  }
  window.renderVisitRecordToday = renderVisitRecordToday;
  function renderVisitRecordViews() {
    renderVisitRecordToday(getVisitRecordScopeId());
  }
  function fillVisitRecordForm() {
    if (!isLimitedUser()) return;
    var isStudentLogin = getCurrentRole() === 'student' && loggedInStudentId;
    var idEl = document.getElementById('vis-rec-id');
    var nameEl = document.getElementById('vis-rec-name');
    if (idEl) {
      idEl.readOnly = !!isStudentLogin;
      idEl.classList.toggle('input-readonly', !!isStudentLogin);
    }
    if (nameEl) {
      nameEl.readOnly = !!isStudentLogin;
      nameEl.classList.toggle('input-readonly', !!isStudentLogin);
    }
    if (isStudentLogin) {
      var d = (typeof lookupStudent === 'function') ? lookupStudent(loggedInStudentId) : null;
      if (idEl) idEl.value = loggedInStudentId;
      if (nameEl) nameEl.value = (d && d.fullName) ? d.fullName : '';
      applyVisitRecordStudentMeta(loggedInStudentId);
      var histDesc = document.getElementById('visit-rec-history-desc');
      if (histDesc) histDesc.textContent = 'เธเธฃเธฐเธงเธฑเธ•เธดเธเธฒเธฃเธฃเธฑเธเธเธฃเธดเธเธฒเธฃเธซเนเธญเธเธเธขเธฒเธเธฒเธฅเธเธญเธเธเธฑเธ';
      refreshVisitRecordsFromSheet(loggedInStudentId, renderVisitRecordViews);
    } else if (getCurrentRole() === 'teacher') {
      if (idEl) {
        idEl.readOnly = false;
        idEl.classList.remove('input-readonly');
      }
      if (nameEl) {
        nameEl.readOnly = false;
        nameEl.classList.remove('input-readonly');
      }
      if (idEl && !idEl.value) {
        if (nameEl) nameEl.value = '';
        renderVisitRecordViews();
      } else {
        fillVisitRecordFromId();
      }
    }
  }
  function fillVisitRecordNameFromId() {
    var idEl = document.getElementById('vis-rec-id');
    var nameEl = document.getElementById('vis-rec-name');
    if (!idEl || !nameEl) return;
    fillStudentNameById(idEl.value, nameEl);
  }
  function fillVisitRecordIdFromName() {
    var idEl = document.getElementById('vis-rec-id');
    var nameEl = document.getElementById('vis-rec-name');
    if (!idEl || !nameEl || nameEl.readOnly) return;
    var name = (nameEl.value || '').trim();
    if (!name) return;
    var id = (idEl.value || '').trim();
    if (id && studentNameMatchesId(name, id)) return;
    var resolved = resolveStudentIdFromName(name, true);
    if (!resolved) return;
    idEl.value = resolved.id;
    nameEl.value = resolved.name;
    applyVisitRecordStudentMeta(resolved.id);
  }
  function fillVisitRecordFromName() {
    var idEl = document.getElementById('vis-rec-id');
    var nameEl = document.getElementById('vis-rec-name');
    if (!idEl || !nameEl || nameEl.readOnly) return;
    var name = (nameEl.value || '').trim();
    var id = (idEl.value || '').trim();
    if (!name) {
      if (!id) renderVisitRecordViews();
      return;
    }
    if (id && studentNameMatchesId(name, id)) {
      applyVisitRecordStudentMeta(id);
      refreshVisitRecordsFromSheet(id, renderVisitRecordViews);
      return;
    }
    var resolved = resolveStudentIdFromName(name, false);
    if (!resolved) return;
    idEl.value = resolved.id;
    nameEl.value = resolved.name;
    applyVisitRecordStudentMeta(resolved.id);
    refreshVisitRecordsFromSheet(resolved.id, renderVisitRecordViews);
  }
  function applyVisitRecordStudentMeta(id) {
    if (!id) return;
    var tr = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('#section-student tbody tr')).find(function(r) {
      return r.cells[0] && visitIdMatch(r.cells[0].textContent.trim(), id);
    });
    if (tr && tr.cells[2]) {
      var classEl = document.getElementById('vis-rec-class');
      var cls = tr.cells[2].textContent.trim();
      if (classEl && cls && cls !== 'โ€”') {
        for (var i = 0; i < classEl.options.length; i++) {
          var opt = classEl.options[i];
          if (opt.text === cls || opt.value === cls) {
            classEl.value = opt.value;
            break;
          }
        }
      }
    }
    var typeEl = document.getElementById('vis-rec-type');
    if (typeEl) typeEl.value = 'เธเธฑเธเน€เธฃเธตเธขเธ';
  }
  function fillVisitRecordFromId() {
    var idEl = document.getElementById('vis-rec-id');
    var nameEl = document.getElementById('vis-rec-name');
    if (!idEl || !nameEl) return;
    var id = (idEl.value || '').trim();
    fillVisitRecordNameFromId();
    if (!id) {
      renderVisitRecordViews();
      return;
    }
    applyVisitRecordStudentMeta(id);
    refreshVisitRecordsFromSheet(id, renderVisitRecordViews);
  }
  window.fillVisitRecordFromId = fillVisitRecordFromId;
  window.fillVisitRecordNameFromId = fillVisitRecordNameFromId;
  window.fillVisitRecordIdFromName = fillVisitRecordIdFromName;
  window.fillVisitRecordFromName = fillVisitRecordFromName;
  function updateLimitedUserVisitLabels(role) {
    var isStudent = role === 'student';
    var isLimitedNav = isStudent || role === 'teacher';
    var navLabel = document.getElementById('nav-visit-label');
    var navIcon = document.getElementById('nav-visit-icon');
    var studentIcon = (navIcon && navIcon.getAttribute('data-student-icon')) || '๐“';
    var staffIcon = (navIcon && navIcon.getAttribute('data-staff-icon')) || '๐ฉบ';
    if (navLabel) {
      navLabel.textContent = isLimitedNav
        ? (navLabel.getAttribute('data-student-text') || 'เธเธฅเธ•เธฃเธงเธเธชเธธเธเธ เธฒเธ')
        : (navLabel.getAttribute('data-staff-text') || 'เธเธฑเธเธ—เธถเธเธเธฒเธฃเธฃเธฑเธเธฉเธฒ');
    }
    if (navIcon) navIcon.textContent = isLimitedNav ? studentIcon : staffIcon;
    var pageIcon = document.getElementById('visit-student-page-icon');
    var cardIcon = document.getElementById('visit-my-card-icon');
    if (isStudent) {
      if (pageIcon) pageIcon.textContent = studentIcon;
      if (cardIcon) cardIcon.textContent = studentIcon;
    }
    if (isStudent) {
      var pageDesc = document.getElementById('visit-student-page-desc');
      var cardTitle = document.getElementById('visit-my-card-title');
      var cardDesc = document.getElementById('visit-my-card-desc');
      if (pageDesc) pageDesc.textContent = 'เธ”เธนเธเธฅเธเธฒเธฃเธ•เธฃเธงเธเธเธฑเธ”เธเธฃเธญเธเนเธฅเธฐเธเนเธญเธกเธนเธฅเธชเธธเธเธ เธฒเธเธ—เธตเนเน€เธเนเธฒเธซเธเนเธฒเธ—เธตเนเธญเธเธฒเธกเธฑเธขเธเธฑเธเธ—เธถเธเนเธงเน';
      if (cardTitle) cardTitle.textContent = 'เธเธฅเธ•เธฃเธงเธเธชเธธเธเธ เธฒเธเธเธญเธเธเธฑเธ';
      if (cardDesc) cardDesc.textContent = 'เนเธชเธ”เธเนเธเธเธฑเธ” เธเธฅเธ•เธฃเธงเธเธเธฑเธ”เธเธฃเธญเธ เธ เธฒเธงเธฐเนเธ เธเธเธฒเธเธฒเธฃ เนเธฅเธฐเธชเธธเธเธ เธฒเธเธเธดเธ•';
      var scrResults = document.getElementById('student-screening-results');
      if (scrResults) scrResults.style.display = '';
    } else if (role === 'teacher') {
      if (pageIcon) pageIcon.textContent = studentIcon;
      if (cardIcon) cardIcon.textContent = studentIcon;
      var cardTitle = document.getElementById('visit-my-card-title');
      var cardDesc = document.getElementById('visit-my-card-desc');
      if (cardTitle) cardTitle.textContent = 'เธเธฅเธ•เธฃเธงเธเธชเธธเธเธ เธฒเธเธเธฑเธเน€เธฃเธตเธขเธ';
      if (cardDesc) cardDesc.textContent = 'เธเธฃเธญเธเน€เธฅเธเธเธฃเธฐเธเธณเธ•เธฑเธงเธเธฑเธเน€เธฃเธตเธขเธเน€เธเธทเนเธญเธ”เธนเธเธฅเธ•เธฃเธงเธเธชเธธเธเธ เธฒเธ';
      var scrResultsT = document.getElementById('student-screening-results');
      if (scrResultsT) scrResultsT.style.display = '';
      var recHistDesc = document.getElementById('visit-rec-history-desc');
      if (recHistDesc) recHistDesc.textContent = 'เธฃเธฒเธขเธเธฒเธฃเธฃเธฑเธเธเธฃเธดเธเธฒเธฃเธซเนเธญเธเธเธขเธฒเธเธฒเธฅเธ—เธตเนเธเธฑเธเธ—เธถเธเนเธงเนเนเธเธฃเธฐเธเธ';
    }
  }
  var SCREENING_COMBINED_TYPES = ['vision', 'hearing', 'blood', 'oral', 'physical'];
  var SCREENING_TYPE_LABELS = {
    vision: 'เธเธฅเธ•เธฃเธงเธเธชเธฒเธขเธ•เธฒ',
    hearing: 'เธเธฅเธ•เธฃเธงเธเธเธฒเธฃเนเธ”เนเธขเธดเธ',
    blood: 'เธเธฅเธ•เธฃเธงเธเนเธฅเธซเธดเธ•เธเธฒเธ',
    oral: 'เธเธฅเธ•เธฃเธงเธเธเนเธญเธเธเธฒเธ',
    physical: 'เธเธฅเธ•เธฃเธงเธเธฃเนเธฒเธเธเธฒเธข'
  };
  function renderCombinedScreeningTable(tbodyId, scopeId, emptyMsg) {
    var tbody = document.getElementById(tbodyId);
    if (!tbody) return;
    var cols = 3;
    if (!scopeId) {
      tbody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="' + cols + '" style="text-align:center;color:var(--gray-mid);padding:14px;">' + emptyMsg + '</td></tr>';
      return;
    }
    var records = loadScreeningRecords().filter(function(r) {
      return SCREENING_COMBINED_TYPES.indexOf(r.type) !== -1 && visitIdMatch(r.id, scopeId);
    }).sort(function(a, b) { return (b.savedAt || 0) - (a.savedAt || 0); });
    if (!records.length) {
      tbody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="' + cols + '" style="text-align:center;color:var(--gray-mid);padding:14px;">' + emptyMsg + '</td></tr>';
      return;
    }
    tbody.innerHTML = records.map(function(r) {
      var typeLabel = SCREENING_TYPE_LABELS[r.type] || r.type || 'โ€”';
      return '<tr><td>' + escVisitHtml(typeLabel) + '</td><td>' + escVisitHtml(r.recordedAt || 'โ€”') +
        '</td><td>' + escVisitHtml(r.summary || 'โ€”') + '</td></tr>';
    }).join('');
  }
  function renderStudentRecordTable(tbodyId, scopeId, cols, emptyMsg, loadRecords, rowFn) {
    var tbody = document.getElementById(tbodyId);
    if (!tbody) return;
    if (!scopeId) {
      tbody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="' + cols + '" style="text-align:center;color:var(--gray-mid);padding:14px;">' + emptyMsg + '</td></tr>';
      return;
    }
    var records = loadRecords().filter(function(r) {
      return visitIdMatch(r.id, scopeId);
    }).sort(function(a, b) { return (b.savedAt || 0) - (a.savedAt || 0); });
    if (!records.length) {
      tbody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="' + cols + '" style="text-align:center;color:var(--gray-mid);padding:14px;">' + emptyMsg + '</td></tr>';
      return;
    }
    tbody.innerHTML = records.map(rowFn).join('');
  }
  function renderStudentScreeningResults(scopeId, tablePrefix) {
    if (scopeId === undefined) scopeId = getVisitMyScopeId();
    tablePrefix = tablePrefix || 'student-scr';
    renderCombinedScreeningTable(tablePrefix + '-screening', scopeId, 'เธขเธฑเธเนเธกเนเธกเธตเธเธฅเธ•เธฃเธงเธเธเธฑเธ”เธเธฃเธญเธเธชเธธเธเธ เธฒเธ');
    renderStudentRecordTable(tablePrefix + '-nutrition', scopeId, 3, 'เธขเธฑเธเนเธกเนเธกเธตเธเธฅเธเธฃเธฐเน€เธกเธดเธเนเธ เธเธเธฒเธเธฒเธฃ', loadNutritionRecords, function(r) {
      return '<tr><td>' + escVisitHtml(r.date || r.recordedAt || 'โ€”') + '</td><td>' + escVisitHtml(r.category || 'โ€”') +
        '</td><td>' + escVisitHtml(r.bmi || 'โ€”') + '</td></tr>';
    });
    renderStudentRecordTable(tablePrefix + '-mental', scopeId, 3, 'เธขเธฑเธเนเธกเนเธกเธตเธเธฅเธเธฑเธ”เธเธฃเธญเธเธชเธธเธเธ เธฒเธเธเธดเธ•', loadMentalRecords, function(r) {
      return '<tr><td>' + escVisitHtml(r.recordedAt || 'โ€”') + '</td><td>' + escVisitHtml(r.score != null ? r.score : 'โ€”') +
        '</td><td>' + escVisitHtml(r.risk || 'โ€”') + '</td></tr>';
    });
    renderStudentRecordTable(tablePrefix + '-chronic', scopeId, 5, 'เธขเธฑเธเนเธกเนเธกเธตเธเนเธญเธกเธนเธฅเนroเธเธเธฃเธฐเธเธณเธ•เธฑเธง/เธเธฒเธฃเนเธเนเธญเธฒเธซเธฒเธฃ/เธเธฒเธฃเนเธเนเธขเธฒ', loadChronicFromStorage, function(r) {
      return '<tr><td><span class="badge ' + getChronicBadgeClass(r.disease) + '">' + escVisitHtml(r.disease || 'โ€”') +
        '</span></td><td>' + escVisitHtml(r.medicine || 'โ€”') + '</td><td>' + escVisitHtml(r.phone || 'โ€”') +
        '</td><td>' + escVisitHtml(r.note || 'โ€”') + '</td><td>' + escVisitHtml(r.recordedAt || 'โ€”') + '</td></tr>';
    });
  }
  function normalizeStudentName(name) {
    return String(name || '')
      .trim()
      .toLowerCase()
      .replace(/^(เน€เธ”เนเธเธเธฒเธข|เน€เธ”เนเธเธซเธเธดเธ|เธ”\.เธ\.|เธ”\.เธ\.|เธเธฒเธข|เธเธฒเธ|เธเธฒเธเธชเธฒเธง|เธ\.เธช\.)\s*/g, '')
      .replace(/\s+/g, ' ');
  }
  function studentNameMatchesQuery(fullName, query) {
    var n = normalizeStudentName(fullName);
    var q = normalizeStudentName(query);
    if (!n || !q) return false;
    if (n === q) return true;
    if (n.indexOf(q) !== -1 || q.indexOf(n) !== -1) return true;
    return false;
  }
  function lookupStudentsByName(query) {
    if (!query) return [];
    var q = String(query).trim();
    if (!q) return [];
    var seen = {};
    var results = [];
    function add(id, fullName) {
      id = String(id || '').trim();
      fullName = String(fullName || '').trim();
      if (!id || !fullName || seen[id]) return;
      seen[id] = true;
      var student = (typeof lookupStudent === 'function') ? lookupStudent(id) : null;
      results.push({ id: id, name: fullName, student: student });
    }
    if (typeof STUDENT_BASIC !== 'undefined') {
      Object.keys(STUDENT_BASIC).forEach(function(k) {
        var s = STUDENT_BASIC[k];
        if (s && s.fullName && studentNameMatchesQuery(s.fullName, q)) {
          add(k, s.fullName);
        }
      });
    }
    document.querySelectorAll('#section-student tbody tr').forEach(function(tr) {
      if (!tr.cells[0] || !tr.cells[1]) return;
      var id = tr.cells[0].textContent.trim();
      var name = tr.cells[1].textContent.trim();
      if (studentNameMatchesQuery(name, q)) add(id, name);
    });
    return results;
  }
  function resolveStudentIdFromName(name, silent) {
    name = (name || '').trim();
    if (!name) return null;
    var matches = lookupStudentsByName(name);
    if (!matches.length) {
      if (!silent) alert('เนเธกเนเธเธเธเธฑเธเน€เธฃเธตเธขเธเธเธทเนเธญ "' + name + '" เนเธเธฃเธฐเธเธ');
      return null;
    }
    var exact = matches.filter(function(m) {
      return normalizeStudentName(m.name) === normalizeStudentName(name);
    });
    if (exact.length === 1) return exact[0];
    if (matches.length === 1) return matches[0];
    if (!silent) alert('เธเธเธเธฑเธเน€เธฃเธตเธขเธเธซเธฅเธฒเธขเธเธ (' + matches.length + ' เธเธ) โ€” เธเธฃเธธเธ“เธฒเธเธฃเธญเธเน€เธฅเธเธเธฃเธฐเธเธณเธ•เธฑเธงเน€เธเธดเนเธกเน€เธเธทเนเธญเธฃเธฐเธเธธเธ•เธฑเธงเธ•เธ');
    return null;
  }
  function studentNameMatchesId(name, id) {
    if (!name || !id) return false;
    var known = getStudentDisplayName(id);
    var student = (typeof lookupStudent === 'function') ? lookupStudent(id) : null;
    if (student && student.fullName) known = student.fullName;
    if (!known) return false;
    return studentNameMatchesQuery(known, name);
  }
  function resolveStaffHealthSearchStudent() {
    var idEl = document.getElementById('vis-health-search-id');
    var nameEl = document.getElementById('vis-health-search-name');
    var id = idEl ? idEl.value.trim() : '';
    var name = nameEl ? nameEl.value.trim() : '';
    if (id) {
      var student = (typeof lookupStudent === 'function') ? lookupStudent(id) : null;
      return { id: id, name: (student && student.fullName) ? student.fullName : name };
    }
    if (name) {
      var matches = lookupStudentsByName(name);
      if (!matches.length) {
        alert('เนเธกเนเธเธเธเธฑเธเน€เธฃเธตเธขเธเธเธทเนเธญ "' + name + '" เนเธเธฃเธฐเธเธ');
        return null;
      }
      if (matches.length === 1) {
        return { id: matches[0].id, name: matches[0].name };
      }
      var exact = matches.filter(function(m) {
        return normalizeStudentName(m.name) === normalizeStudentName(name);
      });
      if (exact.length === 1) {
        return { id: exact[0].id, name: exact[0].name };
      }
      alert('เธเธเธเธฑเธเน€เธฃเธตเธขเธเธซเธฅเธฒเธขเธเธ (' + matches.length + ' เธเธ) โ€” เธเธฃเธธเธ“เธฒเธเธฃเธญเธเน€เธฅเธเธเธฃเธฐเธเธณเธ•เธฑเธงเน€เธเธดเนเธกเน€เธเธทเนเธญเธฃเธฐเธเธธเธ•เธฑเธงเธ•เธ');
      return null;
    }
    alert('เธเธฃเธธเธ“เธฒเธเธฃเธญเธเน€เธฅเธเธเธฃเธฐเธเธณเธ•เธฑเธงเธซเธฃเธทเธญเธเธทเนเธญ-เธเธฒเธกเธชเธเธธเธฅ');
    return null;
  }
  function searchStaffVisitHealthResults() {
    if (typeof isFullStaffRole === 'function' && !isFullStaffRole()) return;
    var resolved = resolveStaffHealthSearchStudent();
    var wrap = document.getElementById('staff-health-results-wrap');
    var empty = document.getElementById('staff-health-results-empty');
    var label = document.getElementById('staff-health-results-label');
    if (!resolved) return;
    var idEl = document.getElementById('vis-health-search-id');
    var nameEl = document.getElementById('vis-health-search-name');
    if (idEl) idEl.value = resolved.id;
    if (nameEl && resolved.name) nameEl.value = resolved.name;
    if (empty) empty.style.display = 'none';
    if (wrap) wrap.style.display = '';
    if (label) {
      label.style.display = '';
      label.textContent = (resolved.name || 'โ€”') + ' (เน€เธฅเธเธเธฃเธฐเธเธณเธ•เธฑเธง ' + resolved.id + ')';
    }
    if (document.getElementById('staff-vis-scr-screening')) {
      renderStudentScreeningResults(resolved.id, 'staff-vis-scr');
    }
  }
  function syncStaffHealthSearchFromVisitForm() {
    var visId = document.getElementById('vis-id');
    var visName = document.getElementById('vis-name');
    var idEl = document.getElementById('vis-health-search-id');
    var nameEl = document.getElementById('vis-health-search-name');
    if (visId && idEl) idEl.value = visId.value;
    if (nameEl) {
      if (visName && visName.value.trim()) nameEl.value = visName.value;
      else fillStudentNameById(idEl ? idEl.value : '', nameEl);
    }
    searchStaffVisitHealthResults();
  }
  window.searchStaffVisitHealthResults = searchStaffVisitHealthResults;
  window.syncStaffHealthSearchFromVisitForm = syncStaffHealthSearchFromVisitForm;
  function refreshAllScreeningResultViews(scopeId) {
    if (scopeId === undefined && typeof getVisitMyScopeId === 'function') {
      scopeId = getVisitMyScopeId();
    }
    if (document.getElementById('student-scr-screening')) {
      renderStudentScreeningResults(scopeId, 'student-scr');
    }
    var hIdEl = document.getElementById('vis-health-search-id');
    var wrap = document.getElementById('staff-health-results-wrap');
    if (hIdEl && hIdEl.value.trim() && wrap && wrap.style.display !== 'none') {
      if (!scopeId || visitIdMatch(hIdEl.value.trim(), scopeId)) {
        renderStudentScreeningResults(hIdEl.value.trim(), 'staff-vis-scr');
      }
    }
  }
  function renderVisitMyHistory() {
    const role = getCurrentRole();
    const scopeId = getVisitMyScopeId();
    if (isLimitedUserRole(role)) {
      renderStudentScreeningResults(scopeId);
    }
  }
  function fillVisitMyFromId() {
    const idEl = document.getElementById('vis-my-id');
    const nameEl = document.getElementById('vis-my-name');
    if (!idEl || !nameEl) return;
    const id = (idEl.value || '').trim();
    if (!id) {
      nameEl.value = '';
      renderVisitMyHistory();
      renderStudentMyAppointment();
      return;
    }
    const student = (typeof lookupStudent === 'function') ? lookupStudent(id) : null;
    if (student && student.fullName) {
      nameEl.value = student.fullName;
    } else {
      const fromRegistry = getStudentDisplayName(id);
      nameEl.value = fromRegistry || nameEl.value || '';
    }
    renderVisitMyHistory();
    if (typeof refreshStudentAppointmentFromSheet === 'function') {
      refreshStudentAppointmentFromSheet(id);
    } else {
      renderStudentMyAppointment();
    }
  }
  function getStudentDisplayName(id) {
    const tr = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('#section-student tbody tr')).find(function(r) {
      return r.cells[0] && visitIdMatch(r.cells[0].textContent.trim(), id);
    });
    if (tr && tr.cells[1]) return tr.cells[1].textContent.trim();
    const student = (typeof lookupStudent === 'function') ? lookupStudent(id) : null;
    return (student && student.fullName) ? student.fullName : '';
  }
  function showStudentHistory(id) {
    const studentId = String(id).trim();
    const records = loadVisitRecords().filter(function(r) {
      return visitIdMatch(r.id, studentId);
    }).sort(function(a, b) { return (b.savedAt || 0) - (a.savedAt || 0); });
    const name = getStudentDisplayName(studentId) || (records[0] && records[0].name) || 'โ€”';
    const student = (typeof lookupStudent === 'function') ? lookupStudent(studentId) : null;
    document.getElementById('shAvatar').textContent = (student && student.gender === 'เธ') ? '๐‘ง' : '๐‘ฆ';
    document.getElementById('shName').textContent = name;
    document.getElementById('shMeta').textContent = 'เธฃเธซเธฑเธช ' + studentId + (records.length ? ' ยท ' + records.length + ' เธเธฃเธฑเนเธ' : '');
    const tbody = document.getElementById('student-history-body');
    if (!records.length) {
      tbody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="6" style="text-align:center;color:var(--gray-mid);padding:18px;">เธขเธฑเธเนเธกเนเธกเธตเธเธฃเธฐเธงเธฑเธ•เธดเธเธฒเธฃเธฃเธฑเธเธฉเธฒ</td></tr>';
    } else {
      tbody.innerHTML = records.map(function(r) {
        return '<tr><td>' + escVisitHtml(r.recordedAt) +
          '</td><td>' + escVisitHtml(r.symptom || 'โ€”') +
          '</td><td>' + escVisitHtml(r.diagnosis || 'โ€”') +
          '</td><td>' + escVisitHtml(r.treatment || 'โ€”') +
          '</td><td>' + escVisitHtml(r.result || 'โ€”') +
          '</td><td>' + escVisitHtml(r.provider || 'โ€”') + '</td></tr>';
      }).join('');
    }
    document.getElementById('studentHistoryModal').classList.add('open');
  }
  function closeStudentHistoryModal() {
    document.getElementById('studentHistoryModal').classList.remove('open');
  }
  function fillStudentNameById(id, nameFieldId) {
    var nameEl = typeof nameFieldId === 'string' ? document.getElementById(nameFieldId) : nameFieldId;
    if (!nameEl) return;
    id = (id || '').trim();
    if (!id) {
      nameEl.value = '';
      return;
    }
    var student = (typeof lookupStudent === 'function') ? lookupStudent(id) : null;
    if (student && student.fullName) {
      nameEl.value = student.fullName;
      return;
    }
    var fromRegistry = (typeof getStudentDisplayName === 'function') ? getStudentDisplayName(id) : '';
    if (fromRegistry) nameEl.value = fromRegistry;
  }
  function fillVisitNameFromId() {
    var idEl = document.getElementById('vis-id');
    var nameEl = document.getElementById('vis-name');
    if (!idEl || !nameEl) return;
    fillStudentNameById(idEl.value, nameEl);
  }
  function applyVisitStudentMeta(id) {
    if (!id) return;
    var tr = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('#section-student tbody tr')).find(function(r) {
      return r.cells[0] && visitIdMatch(r.cells[0].textContent.trim(), id);
    });
    if (tr && tr.cells[2]) {
      var classEl = document.getElementById('vis-class');
      var cls = tr.cells[2].textContent.trim();
      if (classEl && cls && cls !== 'โ€”') {
        for (var i = 0; i < classEl.options.length; i++) {
          var opt = classEl.options[i];
          if (opt.text === cls || opt.value === cls) {
            classEl.value = opt.value;
            break;
          }
        }
      }
    }
    var typeEl = document.getElementById('vis-type');
    if (typeEl) typeEl.value = 'เธเธฑเธเน€เธฃเธตเธขเธ';
  }
  function fillVisitIdFromName() {
    var idEl = document.getElementById('vis-id');
    var nameEl = document.getElementById('vis-name');
    if (!idEl || !nameEl) return;
    var name = (nameEl.value || '').trim();
    if (!name) return;
    var id = (idEl.value || '').trim();
    if (id && studentNameMatchesId(name, id)) return;
    var resolved = resolveStudentIdFromName(name, true);
    if (!resolved) return;
    idEl.value = resolved.id;
    nameEl.value = resolved.name;
    applyVisitStudentMeta(resolved.id);
  }
  function fillVisitFromName() {
    var idEl = document.getElementById('vis-id');
    var nameEl = document.getElementById('vis-name');
    if (!idEl || !nameEl) return;
    var name = (nameEl.value || '').trim();
    var id = (idEl.value || '').trim();
    if (!name) return;
    if (id && studentNameMatchesId(name, id)) {
      applyVisitStudentMeta(id);
      if (typeof isFullStaffRole === 'function' && isFullStaffRole()) {
        var hId = document.getElementById('vis-health-search-id');
        var hName = document.getElementById('vis-health-search-name');
        if (hId) hId.value = id;
        if (hName) fillStudentNameById(id, hName);
        searchStaffVisitHealthResults();
      }
      return;
    }
    var resolved = resolveStudentIdFromName(name, false);
    if (!resolved) return;
    idEl.value = resolved.id;
    nameEl.value = resolved.name;
    applyVisitStudentMeta(resolved.id);
    if (typeof isFullStaffRole === 'function' && isFullStaffRole()) {
      var hId2 = document.getElementById('vis-health-search-id');
      var hName2 = document.getElementById('vis-health-search-name');
      if (hId2) hId2.value = resolved.id;
      if (hName2) hName2.value = resolved.name;
      searchStaffVisitHealthResults();
    }
  }
  function fillVisitHealthSearchFromId() {
    var idEl = document.getElementById('vis-health-search-id');
    var nameEl = document.getElementById('vis-health-search-name');
    if (!idEl || !nameEl) return;
    fillStudentNameById(idEl.value, nameEl);
  }
  window.fillVisitNameFromId = fillVisitNameFromId;
  window.fillVisitIdFromName = fillVisitIdFromName;
  window.fillVisitFromName = fillVisitFromName;
  window.fillVisitHealthSearchFromId = fillVisitHealthSearchFromId;
  function fillVisitFromId() {
    const id = (document.getElementById('vis-id').value || '').trim();
    fillVisitNameFromId();
    if (id) applyVisitStudentMeta(id);
    if (id && typeof isFullStaffRole === 'function' && isFullStaffRole()) {
      var hId = document.getElementById('vis-health-search-id');
      var hName = document.getElementById('vis-health-search-name');
      if (hId) hId.value = id;
      if (hName) fillStudentNameById(id, hName);
      searchStaffVisitHealthResults();
    }
  }
  window.fillVisitFromId = fillVisitFromId;

  // Modal

    if (e.target === this) closeModal();
