  // ===== เธเนเธญเธกเธนเธฅเธเธทเนเธเธเธฒเธเธเธฑเธเน€เธฃเธตเธขเธ (เธเธฒเธ Excel) =====
  var basicInfoStudentId = '';
  function formatStudentGender(g) {
    if (g === 'เธ') return 'เธเธฒเธข';
    if (g === 'เธ') return 'เธซเธเธดเธ';
    return g || 'โ€”';
  }
  function escStudentCell(s) {
    return String(s == null || s === '' ? 'โ€”' : s)
      .replace(/&/g, '&amp;').replace(/</g, '&lt;').replace(/"/g, '&quot;');
  }
  function loadStudentHealthExtras() {
    try { return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('sh-student-health') || '{}'); } catch (e) { return {}; }
  }
  function saveStudentHealthExtras(map) {
    try { localStorage.setItem('sh-student-health', JSON.stringify(map)); } catch (e) {}
  }
  function canonicalStudentIdKey(id) {
    var k = String(id).trim();
    if (!k) return k;
    var extras = loadStudentHealthExtras();
    var keys = Object.keys(extras);
    for (var i = 0; i < keys.length; i++) {
      if (visitIdMatch(keys[i], k)) return keys[i];
    }
    if (typeof STUDENT_BASIC !== 'undefined') {
      var found = Object.keys(STUDENT_BASIC).find(function(key) {
        return visitIdMatch(key, k);
      });
      if (found) return found;
    }
    return k;
  }
  function getStudentHealthExtra(id) {
    var extras = loadStudentHealthExtras();
    var k = String(id).trim();
    if (extras[k]) return extras[k];
    var num = parseInt(k, 10);
    if (!isNaN(num) && extras[String(num)]) return extras[String(num)];
    var keys = Object.keys(extras);
    for (var i = 0; i < keys.length; i++) {
      if (visitIdMatch(keys[i], k)) return extras[keys[i]];
    }
    return {};
  }
  function setStudentHealthExtra(id, data) {
    var extras = loadStudentHealthExtras();
    var k = canonicalStudentIdKey(id);
    extras[k] = Object.assign({}, extras[k] || {}, data);
    saveStudentHealthExtras(extras);
  }
  function getStudentChronicLabel(id) {
    var records = [];
    try { records = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('sh-chronic') || '[]'); } catch (e) {}
    var rec = records.find(function(r) { return visitIdMatch(r.id, id); });
    if (!rec) return '';
    return rec.disease + (rec.note ? ' (' + rec.note + ')' : '');
  }
  function getStudentRegistryHealth(id, oldChronic, oldDrug) {
    var extra = getStudentHealthExtra(id);
    var chronic = getStudentChronicLabel(id) || extra.chronic || (oldChronic && oldChronic !== '-' ? oldChronic : '');
    var drug = extra.drugAllergy || (oldDrug && oldDrug !== '-' ? oldDrug : '');
    return {
      chronic: chronic || 'โ€”',
      drug: drug || 'โ€”',
      food: extra.foodAllergy || 'โ€”',
      precautions: extra.precautions || 'โ€”'
    };
  }
  function getStudentAppointment(id) {
    var extra = getStudentHealthExtra(id);
    return extra.appointment || null;
  }
  function formatAppointmentDate(iso) {
    if (!iso) return '';
    var d = new Date(iso + 'T12:00:00');
    if (isNaN(d.getTime())) return iso;
    return d.toLocaleDateString('th-TH', { day: 'numeric', month: 'short', year: '2-digit' });
  }
  function formatAppointmentTime(t) {
    if (!t) return '';
    var parts = String(t).split(':');
    if (parts.length >= 2) return parts[0] + ':' + parts[1];
    return t;
  }
  function formatAppointmentFull(appt) {
    if (!appt || !appt.date) return '';
    var line = formatAppointmentDate(appt.date);
    if (appt.time) line += ' เน€เธงเธฅเธฒ ' + formatAppointmentTime(appt.time) + ' เธ.';
    if (appt.purpose) line += ' ยท ' + appt.purpose;
    return line;
  }
  function buildAppointmentPanelInner(appt) {
    if (!appt || !appt.date) return '';
    var html = '';
    html += '<div class="appt-row"><span class="appt-label">เธงเธฑเธเธ—เธตเน</span><span>' + escStudentCell(formatAppointmentDate(appt.date)) + (appt.time ? ' เน€เธงเธฅเธฒ ' + escStudentCell(formatAppointmentTime(appt.time)) + ' เธ.' : '') + '</span></div>';
    if (appt.purpose) html += '<div class="appt-row"><span class="appt-label">เน€เธฃเธทเนเธญเธ</span><span>' + escStudentCell(appt.purpose) + '</span></div>';
    if (appt.place) html += '<div class="appt-row"><span class="appt-label">เธชเธ–เธฒเธเธ—เธตเน</span><span>' + escStudentCell(appt.place) + '</span></div>';
    if (appt.note) html += '<div class="appt-row"><span class="appt-label">เธซเธกเธฒเธขเน€เธซเธ•เธธ</span><span>' + escStudentCell(appt.note) + '</span></div>';
    return html;
  }
  function renderStudentMyAppointment() {
    var panel = document.getElementById('student-appointment-panel');
    if (!panel) return;
    var id = '';
    if (getCurrentRole() === 'student' && loggedInStudentId) {
      id = loggedInStudentId;
    } else if (getCurrentRole() === 'teacher') {
      id = (document.getElementById('vis-my-id') && document.getElementById('vis-my-id').value || '').trim();
    }
    if (!id) {
      panel.className = 'student-appointment-panel empty';
      panel.textContent = 'เธเธฃเธญเธเน€เธฅเธเธเธฃเธฐเธเธณเธ•เธฑเธงเน€เธเธทเนเธญเธ”เธนเนเธเธเธฑเธ”';
      return;
    }
    var appt = getStudentAppointment(id);
    if (!appt || !appt.date) {
      panel.className = 'student-appointment-panel empty';
      panel.textContent = 'เธขเธฑเธเนเธกเนเธกเธตเนเธเธเธฑเธ” โ€” เธ•เธดเธ”เธ•เนเธญเธซเนเธญเธเธเธขเธฒเธเธฒเธฅเน€เธกเธทเนเธญเนเธ”เนเธฃเธฑเธเนเธเนเธเธเธฑเธ”';
      return;
    }
    panel.className = 'student-appointment-panel';
    panel.innerHTML = buildAppointmentPanelInner(appt);
  }
  var appointmentEditStudentId = '';
  function saveAppointmentData(studentId, apptData) {
    var idKey = canonicalStudentIdKey(studentId);
    setStudentHealthExtra(idKey, { appointment: apptData });
    if (typeof syncAppointmentToSheetQuiet === 'function') {
      syncAppointmentToSheetQuiet(idKey, apptData);
    }
    refreshStudentRegistryRow(studentId);
  }
  function refreshStudentAppointmentFromSheet(studentId, callback) {
    if (!studentId) {
      renderStudentMyAppointment();
      if (callback) callback();
      return;
    }
    if (typeof fetchAppointmentFromSheet !== 'function') {
      renderStudentMyAppointment();
      if (callback) callback();
      return;
    }
    fetchAppointmentFromSheet(studentId).then(function(appt) {
      var idKey = canonicalStudentIdKey(studentId);
      if (appt && appt.date) {
        setStudentHealthExtra(idKey, { appointment: appt });
      }
      renderStudentMyAppointment();
      if (callback) callback();
    }).catch(function() {
      renderStudentMyAppointment();
      if (callback) callback();
    });
  }
  function fillAppointmentPageFromId() {
    var id = (document.getElementById('appt-page-id') && document.getElementById('appt-page-id').value || '').trim();
    var nameEl = document.getElementById('appt-page-name');
    var classEl = document.getElementById('appt-page-class');
    if (!id) {
      if (nameEl) nameEl.value = '';
      return;
    }
    if (typeof lookupStudent === 'function') {
      var student = lookupStudent(id);
      if (student) {
        if (nameEl && student.fullName) nameEl.value = student.fullName;
        if (classEl && student.classLevel) setSelectByValueOrText('appt-page-class', student.classLevel);
      }
    }
    if (classEl) {
      var fullCls = getStudentFullClassFromRegistry(id);
      if (fullCls) setSelectByValueOrText('appt-page-class', fullCls);
    }
    if (nameEl && !nameEl.value) {
      var fromReg = getStudentDisplayName(id);
      if (fromReg) nameEl.value = fromReg;
    }
    var appt = getStudentAppointment(id);
    if (appt) {
      document.getElementById('appt-page-date').value = appt.date || '';
      document.getElementById('appt-page-time').value = appt.time || '';
      document.getElementById('appt-page-purpose').value = appt.purpose || 'เธ•เธฃเธงเธเธชเธธเธเธ เธฒเธ';
      document.getElementById('appt-page-place').value = appt.place || 'เธซเนเธญเธเธเธขเธฒเธเธฒเธฅเนเธฃเธเน€เธฃเธตเธขเธ';
      document.getElementById('appt-page-note').value = appt.note || '';
    }
  }
  function loadAppointmentPageForm(id) {
    clearAppointmentPageForm(false);
    var idEl = document.getElementById('appt-page-id');
    if (idEl) idEl.value = String(id || '').trim();
    fillAppointmentPageFromId();
  }
  function clearAppointmentPageForm(clearId) {
    if (clearId !== false) {
      var idEl = document.getElementById('appt-page-id');
      if (idEl) idEl.value = '';
    }
    var fields = ['appt-page-name', 'appt-page-date', 'appt-page-time', 'appt-page-note'];
    fields.forEach(function(fid) {
      var el = document.getElementById(fid);
      if (el) el.value = '';
    });
    var place = document.getElementById('appt-page-place');
    if (place) place.value = 'เธซเนเธญเธเธเธขเธฒเธเธฒเธฅเนเธฃเธเน€เธฃเธตเธขเธ';
    var purpose = document.getElementById('appt-page-purpose');
    if (purpose) purpose.value = 'เธ•เธฃเธงเธเธชเธธเธเธ เธฒเธ';
    appointmentEditStudentId = '';
  }
  function saveAppointmentFromPage() {
    var id = (document.getElementById('appt-page-id').value || '').trim();
    var name = (document.getElementById('appt-page-name').value || '').trim();
    var date = (document.getElementById('appt-page-date').value || '').trim();
    if (!id) {
      alert('เธเธฃเธธเธ“เธฒเธเธฃเธญเธเน€เธฅเธเธเธฃเธฐเธเธณเธ•เธฑเธงเธเธฑเธเน€เธฃเธตเธขเธ');
      document.getElementById('appt-page-id').focus();
      return;
    }
    if (!name) {
      alert('เธเธฃเธธเธ“เธฒเธเธฃเธญเธเธเธทเนเธญ-เธเธฒเธกเธชเธเธธเธฅ');
      document.getElementById('appt-page-name').focus();
      return;
    }
    if (!date) {
      alert('เธเธฃเธธเธ“เธฒเน€เธฅเธทเธญเธเธงเธฑเธเธ—เธตเนเธเธฑเธ”');
      document.getElementById('appt-page-date').focus();
      return;
    }
    saveAppointmentData(id, {
      date: date,
      time: (document.getElementById('appt-page-time').value || '').trim(),
      purpose: document.getElementById('appt-page-purpose').value,
      place: (document.getElementById('appt-page-place').value || '').trim(),
      note: (document.getElementById('appt-page-note').value || '').trim(),
      studentName: name,
      updatedAt: Date.now()
    });
    var filterEl = document.getElementById('appt-list-filter');
    if (filterEl) filterEl.value = 'all';
    renderAppointmentList();
    alert('โ… เธเธฑเธเธ—เธถเธเนเธเธเธฑเธ”เธชเธณเน€เธฃเนเธ โ€” เธเธฑเธเน€เธฃเธตเธขเธเธเธฐเน€เธซเนเธเนเธเน€เธกเธเธนเธเธฅเธ•เธฃเธงเธเธชเธธเธเธ เธฒเธเธเธญเธเธเธฑเธ');
  }
  function deleteAppointmentById(id) {
    if (!confirm('เธฅเธเนเธเธเธฑเธ”เธเธญเธเธเธฑเธเน€เธฃเธตเธขเธเธฃเธซเธฑเธช ' + id + '?')) return;
    var k = canonicalStudentIdKey(id);
    var extras = loadStudentHealthExtras();
    if (extras[k]) {
      delete extras[k].appointment;
      saveStudentHealthExtras(extras);
    }
    if (typeof deleteAppointmentFromSheetQuiet === 'function') {
      deleteAppointmentFromSheetQuiet(k);
    }
    refreshStudentRegistryRow(id);
    renderAppointmentList();
    if ((document.getElementById('appt-page-id').value || '').trim() === String(id).trim()) {
      clearAppointmentPageForm();
    }
    if (getCurrentRole() === 'student' && loggedInStudentId && visitIdMatch(loggedInStudentId, id)) {
      renderStudentMyAppointment();
    }
  }
  function localDateKey(d) {
    var y = d.getFullYear();
    var m = String(d.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0');
    var day = String(d.getDate()).padStart(2, '0');
    return y + '-' + m + '-' + day;
  }
  function parseAppointmentTs(appt) {
    if (!appt || !appt.date) return NaN;
    var datePart = String(appt.date).trim().slice(0, 10);
    var t = String(appt.time || '').trim();
    if (t) {
      var parts = t.split(':');
      var dt = new Date(datePart + 'T00:00:00');
      if (isNaN(dt.getTime())) return NaN;
      dt.setHours(parseInt(parts[0], 10) || 0, parseInt(parts[1], 10) || 0, 0, 0);
      return dt.getTime();
    }
    var day = new Date(datePart + 'T12:00:00');
    return day.getTime();
  }
  function isAppointmentUpcoming(appt) {
    var datePart = appt && appt.date ? String(appt.date).trim().slice(0, 10) : '';
    if (!datePart) return false;
    return datePart >= localDateKey(new Date());
  }
  function collectAllAppointments() {
    var extras = loadStudentHealthExtras();
    var list = [];
    Object.keys(extras).forEach(function(k) {
      var appt = extras[k] && extras[k].appointment;
      if (!appt || !appt.date) return;
      var student = typeof lookupStudent === 'function' ? lookupStudent(k) : null;
      var name = appt.studentName || (student && student.fullName) || getStudentDisplayName(k) || 'โ€”';
      list.push({
        id: k,
        name: name,
        appt: appt,
        ts: parseAppointmentTs(appt)
      });
    });
    list.sort(function(a, b) {
      var ta = isNaN(a.ts) ? 0 : a.ts;
      var tb = isNaN(b.ts) ? 0 : b.ts;
      return ta - tb;
    });
    return list;
  }
  function renderAppointmentList() {
    var tbody = document.getElementById('appointment-list-body');
    if (!tbody) return;
    var filter = (document.getElementById('appt-list-filter') && document.getElementById('appt-list-filter').value) || 'upcoming';
    var today = new Date();
    today.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);
    var all = collectAllAppointments();
    var upcoming = all.filter(function(item) {
      return isAppointmentUpcoming(item.appt);
    });
    var countEl = document.getElementById('appt-list-count');
    var upEl = document.getElementById('appt-upcoming-count');
    if (countEl) countEl.textContent = all.length.toLocaleString('th-TH');
    if (upEl) upEl.textContent = upcoming.length.toLocaleString('th-TH');
    var show = filter === 'all' ? all : upcoming;
    if (!show.length) {
      var msg = all.length
        ? 'เนเธกเนเธกเธตเธฃเธฒเธขเธเธฒเธฃเธ—เธตเนเธ•เธฃเธเธเธฑเธเธ•เธฑเธงเธเธฃเธญเธ (เธกเธต ' + all.length + ' เธฃเธฒเธขเธเธฒเธฃ โ€” เธฅเธญเธเน€เธฅเธทเธญเธ "เนเธชเธ”เธเธ—เธฑเนเธเธซเธกเธ”")'
        : 'เธขเธฑเธเนเธกเนเธกเธตเธฃเธฒเธขเธเธฒเธฃเนเธเธเธฑเธ”';
      tbody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="5" style="text-align:center;color:var(--gray-mid);padding:18px;">' + msg + '</td></tr>';
      return;
    }
    var todayKey = localDateKey(today);
    tbody.innerHTML = show.map(function(item) {
      var sid = String(item.id).replace(/'/g, "\\'");
      var datePart = String(item.appt.date || '').slice(0, 10);
      var past = datePart < todayKey;
      var dateStr = formatAppointmentDate(item.appt.date) + (item.appt.time ? ' ' + formatAppointmentTime(item.appt.time) : '');
      return '<tr' + (past ? ' style="opacity:.65;"' : '') + '>' +
        '<td data-label="เธฃเธซเธฑเธช">' + escStudentCell(item.id) + '</td>' +
        '<td data-label="เธเธทเนเธญ">' + escStudentCell(item.name) + '</td>' +
        '<td data-label="เธงเธฑเธเธ—เธตเนเธเธฑเธ”">' + escStudentCell(dateStr) + '</td>' +
        '<td data-label="เน€เธฃเธทเนเธญเธ">' + escStudentCell(item.appt.purpose || 'โ€”') + '</td>' +
        '<td style="white-space:nowrap;"><button type="button" class="btn btn-sm btn-secondary" onclick="loadAppointmentPageForm(\'' + sid + '\')">เนเธเนเนเธ</button> ' +
        '<button type="button" class="btn btn-sm btn-danger" onclick="deleteAppointmentById(\'' + sid + '\')">เธฅเธ</button></td></tr>';
    }).join('');
  }
  function openStudentAppointment(id) {
    if (typeof isFullStaffRole === 'function' && !isFullStaffRole()) return;
    loadAppointmentPageForm(id);
    showSection('appointment');
    document.querySelectorAll('.nav-item').forEach(function(n) {
      n.classList.remove('active');
      if (n.getAttribute('onclick') && n.getAttribute('onclick').indexOf("'appointment'") !== -1) {
        n.classList.add('active');
      }
    });
  }
  function closeStudentAppointmentModal() {
    appointmentEditStudentId = '';
    var modal = document.getElementById('studentAppointmentModal');
    if (modal) modal.classList.remove('open');
  }
  function saveStudentAppointment() {
    if (!appointmentEditStudentId) return;
    var date = (document.getElementById('appt-date').value || '').trim();
    if (!date) {
      alert('เธเธฃเธธเธ“เธฒเน€เธฅเธทเธญเธเธงเธฑเธเธ—เธตเนเธเธฑเธ”');
      document.getElementById('appt-date').focus();
      return;
    }
    saveAppointmentData(appointmentEditStudentId, {
      date: date,
      time: (document.getElementById('appt-time').value || '').trim(),
      purpose: document.getElementById('appt-purpose').value,
      place: (document.getElementById('appt-place').value || '').trim(),
      note: (document.getElementById('appt-note').value || '').trim(),
      updatedAt: Date.now()
    });
    var filterEl = document.getElementById('appt-list-filter');
    if (filterEl) filterEl.value = 'all';
    renderAppointmentList();
    closeStudentAppointmentModal();
    alert('โ… เธเธฑเธเธ—เธถเธเนเธเธเธฑเธ”เธชเธณเน€เธฃเนเธ');
  }
  function clearStudentAppointment() {
    if (!appointmentEditStudentId) return;
    if (!confirm('เธฅเธเนเธเธเธฑเธ”เธเธญเธเธเธฑเธเน€เธฃเธตเธขเธเธฃเธฒเธขเธเธตเน?')) return;
    var k = canonicalStudentIdKey(appointmentEditStudentId);
    var extras = loadStudentHealthExtras();
    if (extras[k]) {
      delete extras[k].appointment;
      saveStudentHealthExtras(extras);
    }
    if (typeof deleteAppointmentFromSheetQuiet === 'function') {
      deleteAppointmentFromSheetQuiet(k);
    }
    refreshStudentRegistryRow(appointmentEditStudentId);
    renderAppointmentList();
    closeStudentAppointmentModal();
  }
  function buildStudentRegistryRow(id, name, cls, age, health, genderText) {
    var sid = String(id).replace(/'/g, "\\'");
    var appt = getStudentAppointment(id);
    var apptHtml = 'โ€”';
    var isStaff = typeof isFullStaffRole === 'function' && isFullStaffRole();
    if (appt && appt.date) {
      apptHtml = '<span class="badge badge-gold stu-appt-badge">' + escStudentCell(formatAppointmentDate(appt.date)) +
        (appt.time ? ' ' + escStudentCell(formatAppointmentTime(appt.time)) : '') + '</span>';
      if (appt.purpose) apptHtml += '<div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--gray-mid);margin-top:2px;">' + escStudentCell(appt.purpose) + '</div>';
    }
    if (isStaff) {
      apptHtml += '<div style="margin-top:4px;"><button type="button" class="btn btn-sm btn-secondary" onclick="openStudentAppointment(\'' + sid + '\')">๐“… เนเธเธเธฑเธ”</button></div>';
    }
    return '<td>' + escStudentCell(id) + '</td>' +
      '<td>' + escStudentCell(name) + '</td>' +
      '<td>' + escStudentCell(cls) + '</td>' +
      '<td>' + escStudentCell(age) + '</td>' +
      '<td>' + escStudentCell(genderText) + '</td>' +
      '<td>' + escStudentCell(health.chronic) + '</td>' +
      '<td>' + escStudentCell(health.drug) + '</td>' +
      '<td>' + escStudentCell(health.food) + '</td>' +
      '<td>' + escStudentCell(health.precautions) + '</td>' +
      '<td class="stu-appt-cell">' + apptHtml + '</td>' +
      '<td><div class="action-btns"><button type="button" class="btn btn-sm btn-info" onclick="showStudentBasic(\'' + sid + '\')">เธเนเธญเธกเธนเธฅเธเธทเนเธเธเธฒเธ</button></div></td>' +
      '<td><button type="button" class="btn btn-sm btn-secondary" onclick="showStudentHistory(\'' + sid + '\')">เธ”เธนเธเธฃเธฐเธงเธฑเธ•เธด</button></td>';
  }
  function refreshStudentRegistryRow(id) {
    var tbody = document.querySelector('#section-student tbody');
    if (!tbody) return;
    var tr = Array.from(tbody.rows).find(function(r) {
      return r.cells[0] && visitIdMatch(r.cells[0].textContent.trim(), id);
    });
    if (!tr) return;
    var name = tr.cells[1].textContent.trim();
    var cls = tr.cells[2].textContent.trim();
    var student = (typeof lookupStudent === 'function') ? lookupStudent(id) : null;
    var age = (student && student.age) ? student.age : (tr.cells[3] ? tr.cells[3].textContent.trim() : 'โ€”');
    var health = getStudentRegistryHealth(id);
    tr.innerHTML = buildStudentRegistryRow(id, name, cls, age, health, formatStudentGender(student && student.gender));
  }
  function initStudentRegistryTable() {
    var tbody = document.querySelector('#section-student tbody');
    if (!tbody) return;
    for (var i = 0; i < tbody.rows.length; i++) {
      var tr = tbody.rows[i];
      var id = tr.cells[0].textContent.trim();
      var name = tr.cells[1].textContent.trim();
      var cls = tr.cells[2].textContent.trim();
      var ageCell = tr.cells[3] ? tr.cells[3].textContent.trim() : '';
      var oldChronic = tr.cells[4] ? tr.cells[4].textContent.trim() : '-';
      var oldDrug = tr.cells[5] ? tr.cells[5].textContent.trim() : '-';
      var student = (typeof lookupStudent === 'function') ? lookupStudent(id) : null;
      var age = (student && student.age) ? student.age : ageCell;
      var health = getStudentRegistryHealth(id, oldChronic, oldDrug);
      tr.innerHTML = buildStudentRegistryRow(id, name, cls, age, health, formatStudentGender(student && student.gender));
    }
  }
  function saveStudentHealthFromBasicModal() {
    if (!basicInfoStudentId) return;
    setStudentHealthExtra(basicInfoStudentId, {
      drugAllergy: (document.getElementById('biEditDrug').value || '').trim(),
      foodAllergy: (document.getElementById('biEditFood').value || '').trim(),
      precautions: (document.getElementById('biEditPrecaution').value || '').trim()
    });
    refreshStudentRegistryRow(basicInfoStudentId);
    showStudentBasic(basicInfoStudentId);
    alert('โ… เธเธฑเธเธ—เธถเธเธเนเธญเธกเธนเธฅเธชเธธเธเธ เธฒเธเน€เธฃเธตเธขเธเธฃเนเธญเธข');
  }
  function biItem(label, value, full) {
    const v = (value && String(value).trim()) ? value : 'โ€”';
    return '<div class="basic-info-item' + (full ? ' full' : '') + '">' +
      '<div class="basic-info-label">' + label + '</div>' +
      '<div class="basic-info-value">' + v + '</div></div>';
  }
  function showStudentBasic(id) {
    basicInfoStudentId = String(id).trim();
    const d = (typeof lookupStudent === 'function') ? lookupStudent(id) : null;
    if (!d) { alert('เนเธกเนเธเธเธเนเธญเธกเธนเธฅเธเธทเนเธเธเธฒเธเธชเธณเธซเธฃเธฑเธเธฃเธซเธฑเธช ' + id); return; }
    const health = getStudentRegistryHealth(id);
    const extra = getStudentHealthExtra(id);
    document.getElementById('biAvatar').textContent = d.gender === 'เธ' ? '๐‘ง' : '๐‘ฆ';
    document.getElementById('biName').textContent = d.fullName || 'โ€”';
    document.getElementById('biMeta').textContent = 'เธฃเธซเธฑเธช ' + id + (d.school ? ' ยท ' + d.school : '');
    document.getElementById('biPersonal').innerHTML =
      biItem('เน€เธฅเธเธเธฃเธฐเธเธณเธ•เธฑเธงเธเธฃเธฐเธเธฒเธเธ', d.citizenId) +
      biItem('เน€เธเธจ', formatStudentGender(d.gender)) +
      biItem('เธงเธฑเธเน€เธเธดเธ”', d.dob) +
      biItem('เธญเธฒเธขเธธ', d.age ? d.age + ' เธเธต' : '') +
      biItem('เธจเธฒเธชเธเธฒ', d.religion) +
      biItem('เน€เธเธทเนเธญเธเธฒเธ•เธด / เธชเธฑเธเธเธฒเธ•เธด', (d.race || '') + (d.nationality ? ' / ' + d.nationality : ''));
    document.getElementById('biBody').innerHTML =
      biItem('เธเนเธณเธซเธเธฑเธ', d.weight ? d.weight + ' เธเธ.' : '') +
      biItem('เธชเนเธงเธเธชเธนเธ', d.height ? d.height + ' เธเธก.' : '') +
      biItem('เธเธฅเธธเนเธกเน€เธฅเธทเธญเธ”', d.bloodType) +
      biItem('เธเธงเธฒเธกเธ”เนเธญเธขเนเธญเธเธฒเธช', d.disadvantaged);
    document.getElementById('biAddress').innerHTML = biItem('เธ—เธตเนเธญเธขเธนเน', d.address, true);
    document.getElementById('biFamily').innerHTML =
      biItem('เธเธนเนเธเธเธเธฃเธญเธ', d.guardian) +
      biItem('เธเธงเธฒเธกเธชเธฑเธกเธเธฑเธเธเน', d.guardianRel) +
      biItem('เน€เธเธญเธฃเนเนเธ—เธฃเธเธนเนเธเธเธเธฃเธญเธ', (d.guardianPhone || d.guardianTel || d.phone || (extra && extra.guardianPhone) || '')) +
      biItem('เธญเธฒเธเธตเธเธเธนเนเธเธเธเธฃเธญเธ', d.guardianJob) +
      biItem('เธเธดเธ”เธฒ', d.father) +
      biItem('เธญเธฒเธเธตเธเธเธดเธ”เธฒ', d.fatherJob) +
      biItem('เธกเธฒเธฃเธ”เธฒ', d.mother) +
      biItem('เธญเธฒเธเธตเธเธกเธฒเธฃเธ”เธฒ', d.motherJob);
    document.getElementById('biHealth').innerHTML =
      biItem('เนเธฃเธเธเธฃเธฐเธเธณเธ•เธฑเธง', health.chronic) +
      biItem('เนเธเนเธขเธฒ', health.drug) +
      biItem('เนเธเนเธญเธฒเธซเธฒเธฃ', health.food) +
      biItem('เธเนเธญเธเธงเธฃเธฃเธฐเธงเธฑเธ', health.precautions, true);
    var isStaff = typeof isFullStaffRole === 'function' && isFullStaffRole();
    var editBox = document.getElementById('biHealthEdit');
    if (editBox) {
      editBox.style.display = isStaff ? '' : 'none';
      document.getElementById('biEditDrug').value = extra.drugAllergy || (health.drug !== 'โ€”' ? health.drug : '');
      document.getElementById('biEditFood').value = extra.foodAllergy || (health.food !== 'โ€”' ? health.food : '');
      document.getElementById('biEditPrecaution').value = extra.precautions || (health.precautions !== 'โ€”' ? health.precautions : '');
    }
    document.getElementById('basicInfoModal').classList.add('open');
  }
  function closeBasicInfoModal() {
    basicInfoStudentId = '';
    document.getElementById('basicInfoModal').classList.remove('open');
  }

  // ===== Session & boot =====
  function saveAppSession() {
    try {
      if (guestMode) {
        sessionStorage.setItem('sh-session', JSON.stringify({ kind: 'guest', guestMode: guestMode }));
        return;
      }
      if (!currentRole) {
        sessionStorage.removeItem('sh-session');
        return;
      }
      if (currentRole === 'student') {
        sessionStorage.setItem('sh-session', JSON.stringify({
          kind: 'student',
          role: 'student',
          studentId: loggedInStudentId || ''
        }));
        return;
      }
      sessionStorage.setItem('sh-session', JSON.stringify({ kind: 'staff', role: currentRole }));
    } catch (e) {}
  }
  function restoreStudentSessionForms() {
    fillStudentVaccineForm();
    fillStudentChronicForm();
    fillStudentDiseaseForm();
    fillStudentScreeningForms();
    fillStudentNutritionForm();
    fillStudentMentalForm();
    fillVisitMyForm();
  }
  function restoreAppSession() {
    try {
      var raw = sessionStorage.getItem('sh-session');
      if (!raw) return false;
      var s = JSON.parse(raw);
      if (s.kind === 'guest' && s.guestMode) {
        enterGuestAccess(s.guestMode);
        return true;
      }
      if (s.kind === 'staff' && s.role && ROLES[s.role]) {
        enterApp(s.role);
        return true;
      }
      if (s.kind === 'student' && s.studentId) {
        loggedInStudentId = s.studentId;
        enterApp('student');
        var student = typeof lookupStudent === 'function' ? lookupStudent(s.studentId) : null;
        var badge = document.getElementById('roleBadge');
        if (badge && student && student.fullName) badge.textContent = student.fullName;
        restoreStudentSessionForms();
        return true;
      }
    } catch (e) {}
    return false;
  }
  function showWelcomeScreen() {
    currentRole = '';
    loggedInStudentId = '';
    guestMode = '';
    document.body.classList.remove('staff-app');
    try { sessionStorage.removeItem('sh-session'); } catch (e) {}
    const screen = document.getElementById('role-screen');
    if (screen) screen.classList.remove('role-screen-hidden');
    const badge = document.getElementById('roleBadge');
    if (badge) { badge.style.display = 'none'; badge.textContent = ''; }
    applyRolePermissions('student');
  }
  function safeBootData() {
    var bootFns = [
      updateStudentCounts,
      initReferralRecords,
      renderVaccineSchedule,
      renderDashboard,
      renderEmergencyRecords,
      renderDiseaseSituation,
      renderEnvironmentResults,
      renderVisitToday,
      refreshAllLiveCharts,
      renderGradeChart
    ];
    bootFns.forEach(function(fn) {
      try {
        if (typeof fn === 'function') fn();
      } catch (e) {
        console.warn('[SH boot]', fn && fn.name ? fn.name : 'fn', e);
      }
    });
  }

  function normalizeDob(s) {
    if (!s) return '';
    const parts = String(s).trim().replace(/-/g, '/').replace(/\s/g, '').split('/');
    if (parts.length !== 3) return String(s).trim();
    const d = parseInt(parts[0], 10);
    const m = parseInt(parts[1], 10);
    const y = parseInt(parts[2], 10);
    if (isNaN(d) || isNaN(m) || isNaN(y)) return String(s).trim();
    return d + '/' + m + '/' + y;
  }
  function lookupStudent(id) {
    if (typeof STUDENT_BASIC === 'undefined' || !id) return null;
    const key = String(id).trim();
    if (STUDENT_BASIC[key]) return STUDENT_BASIC[key];
    const num = parseInt(key, 10);
    if (!isNaN(num) && STUDENT_BASIC[String(num)]) return STUDENT_BASIC[String(num)];
    return null;
  }
  function initWhenStudentDataReady() {
    if (typeof STUDENT_BASIC === 'undefined') {
      setTimeout(initWhenStudentDataReady, 80);
      return;
    }
    if (typeof initStudentRegistryTable === 'function') initStudentRegistryTable();
    updateStudentCounts();
    if (getCurrentRole() === 'admin' && typeof refreshAdminDashboard === 'function') refreshAdminDashboard();
  }
  function openStudentLogin() {
    const modal = document.getElementById('studentLoginModal');
    const errEl = document.getElementById('studentLoginError');
    const userEl = document.getElementById('studentLoginUser');
    const passEl = document.getElementById('studentLoginPass');
    if (userEl) userEl.value = '';
    if (passEl) passEl.value = '';
    if (errEl) { errEl.style.display = 'none'; errEl.textContent = ''; }
    if (modal) modal.classList.add('open');
    if (userEl) userEl.focus();
  }
  function closeStudentLogin() {
    const modal = document.getElementById('studentLoginModal');
    if (modal) modal.classList.remove('open');
  }
  function openStaffLogin(roleKey) {
    if (!ROLES[roleKey] || roleKey === 'student') return;
    pendingStaffRole = roleKey;
    const modal = document.getElementById('staffLoginModal');
    const errEl = document.getElementById('staffLoginError');
    const userEl = document.getElementById('staffLoginUser');
    const passEl = document.getElementById('staffLoginPass');
    const subEl = document.getElementById('staffLoginSub');
    if (userEl) userEl.value = '';
    if (passEl) passEl.value = '';
    if (errEl) { errEl.style.display = 'none'; errEl.textContent = ''; }
    if (subEl) subEl.textContent = ROLES[roleKey].name;
    if (modal) modal.classList.add('open');
    if (userEl) userEl.focus();
  }
  function closeStaffLogin() {
    const modal = document.getElementById('staffLoginModal');
    if (modal) modal.classList.remove('open');
    pendingStaffRole = '';
  }
  function submitStaffLogin() {
    const user = (document.getElementById('staffLoginUser').value || '').trim();
    const pass = (document.getElementById('staffLoginPass').value || '').trim();
    const errEl = document.getElementById('staffLoginError');
    if (!user || !pass) {
      errEl.style.display = '';
      errEl.textContent = 'เธเธฃเธธเธ“เธฒเธเธฃเธญเธเธเธทเนเธญเธเธนเนเนเธเนเนเธฅเธฐเธฃเธซเธฑเธชเธเนเธฒเธ';
      return;
    }
    if (user !== STAFF_LOGIN.username || pass !== STAFF_LOGIN.password) {
      errEl.style.display = '';
      errEl.textContent = 'เธเธทเนเธญเธเธนเนเนเธเนเธซเธฃเธทเธญเธฃเธซเธฑเธชเธเนเธฒเธเนเธกเนเธ–เธนเธเธ•เนเธญเธ';
      return;
    }
    const roleKey = pendingStaffRole;
    if (!roleKey || !ROLES[roleKey]) {
      errEl.style.display = '';
      errEl.textContent = 'เนเธกเนเธเธเธเธ—เธเธฒเธ—เธ—เธตเนเน€เธฅเธทเธญเธ เธเธฃเธธเธ“เธฒเธฅเธญเธเนเธซเธกเน';
      return;
    }
    closeStaffLogin();
    enterApp(roleKey);
  }
  function submitStudentLogin() {
    const user = (document.getElementById('studentLoginUser').value || '').trim();
    const pass = (document.getElementById('studentLoginPass').value || '').trim();
    const errEl = document.getElementById('studentLoginError');
    if (!user || !pass) {
      errEl.style.display = '';
      errEl.textContent = 'เธเธฃเธธเธ“เธฒเธเธฃเธญเธเน€เธฅเธเธเธฃเธฐเธเธณเธ•เธฑเธงเนเธฅเธฐเธงเธฑเธเน€เธ”เธทเธญเธเธเธตเน€เธเธดเธ”';
      return;
    }
    if (typeof STUDENT_BASIC === 'undefined') {
      errEl.style.display = '';
      errEl.textContent = 'เนเธกเนเธเธเธเนเธญเธกเธนเธฅเธเธฑเธเน€เธฃเธตเธขเธ เธเธฃเธธเธ“เธฒเธฃเธตเน€เธเธฃเธเธซเธเนเธฒเน€เธงเนเธ';
      return;
    }
    const student = lookupStudent(user);
    if (!student) {
      errEl.style.display = '';
      errEl.textContent = 'เนเธกเนเธเธเน€เธฅเธเธเธฃเธฐเธเธณเธ•เธฑเธงเธเธฑเธเน€เธฃเธตเธขเธเนเธเธฃเธฐเธเธ';
      return;
    }
    if (normalizeDob(pass) !== normalizeDob(student.dob || '')) {
      errEl.style.display = '';
      errEl.textContent = 'เธงเธฑเธเน€เธ”เธทเธญเธเธเธตเน€เธเธดเธ”เนเธกเนเธ–เธนเธเธ•เนเธญเธ';
      return;
    }
    loggedInStudentId = Object.keys(STUDENT_BASIC).find(k => STUDENT_BASIC[k] === student) ||
      String(parseInt(user, 10) || user);
    closeStudentLogin();
    enterApp('student');
    const badge = document.getElementById('roleBadge');
    if (badge && student.fullName) badge.textContent = student.fullName;
    restoreStudentSessionForms();
  }

  function getCurrentRole() {
    return currentRole;
  }
  var LIMITED_USER_HOME_SECTION = 'vaccine';
  function setLimitedUserFieldMode(readonly) {
    [['vac-stu-id', 'vac-stu-name'], ['chr-stu-id', 'chr-stu-name'], ['dis-stu-id', 'dis-stu-name'], ['vis-my-id', 'vis-my-name']].forEach(function(pair) {
      pair.forEach(function(fieldId) {
        const el = document.getElementById(fieldId);
        if (!el) return;
        el.readOnly = readonly;
        el.classList.toggle('input-readonly', readonly);
      });
    });
  }
  function fillLimitedUserFromId(idFieldId, nameFieldId, afterFill) {
    const id = (document.getElementById(idFieldId).value || '').trim();
    if (!id || typeof lookupStudent !== 'function') return;
    const student = lookupStudent(id);
    if (!student) return;
    const nameEl = document.getElementById(nameFieldId);
    if (nameEl && student.fullName) nameEl.value = student.fullName;
    if (typeof afterFill === 'function') afterFill();
  }
  function getLimitedUserScopeId() {
    if (loggedInStudentId) return loggedInStudentId;
    if (getCurrentRole() !== 'teacher') return '';
    const active = document.querySelector('.section-panel.active');
    if (!active) return '';
    const fieldMap = {
      'section-vaccine': 'vac-stu-id',
      'section-chronic': 'chr-stu-id',
      'section-disease': 'dis-stu-id',
      'section-visit': 'vis-my-id'
    };
    const fieldId = fieldMap[active.id];
    return fieldId ? (document.getElementById(fieldId).value || '').trim() : '';
  }
  function setupLimitedUserFormHandlers() {
    if (window._limitedUserHandlersSetup) return;
    window._limitedUserHandlersSetup = true;
    [
      ['vac-stu-id', 'vac-stu-name', renderStudentVaccineHistory],
      ['chr-stu-id', 'chr-stu-name', renderStudentChronicHistory],
      ['dis-stu-id', 'dis-stu-name', renderStudentDiseaseHistory],
      ['vis-my-id', 'vis-my-name', fillVisitMyFromId],
      ['vis-rec-id', 'vis-rec-name', fillVisitRecordFromId]
    ].forEach(function(bind) {
      const idEl = document.getElementById(bind[0]);
      const nameEl = document.getElementById(bind[1]);
      if (!idEl) return;
      idEl.addEventListener('blur', function() {
        if (getCurrentRole() !== 'teacher') return;
        if (bind[0] === 'vis-my-id') {
          fillVisitMyFromId();
          return;
        }
        if (bind[0] === 'vis-rec-id') {
          fillVisitRecordFromId();
          return;
        }
        fillLimitedUserFromId(bind[0], bind[1], bind[2]);
      });
      if (nameEl && bind[0] === 'vis-rec-id') {
        nameEl.addEventListener('blur', function() {
          if (getCurrentRole() !== 'teacher') return;
          fillVisitRecordFromName();
        });
      }
    });
  }
  function showLimitedUserHome() {
    if (!isLimitedUser()) return;
    closeMobileNav();
    document.querySelectorAll('.section-panel').forEach(function(p) { p.classList.remove('active'); });
    document.querySelectorAll('.nav-item').forEach(function(n) { n.classList.remove('active'); });
    const panel = document.getElementById('section-' + LIMITED_USER_HOME_SECTION);
    if (panel) panel.classList.add('active');
    document.querySelectorAll('.nav-item').forEach(function(n) {
      if (n.getAttribute('onclick') && n.getAttribute('onclick').indexOf("'" + LIMITED_USER_HOME_SECTION + "'") !== -1) {
        n.classList.add('active');
      }
    });
    fillStudentVaccineForm();
    fillStudentChronicForm();
    fillStudentDiseaseForm();
    fillVisitMyForm();
    fillVisitRecordForm();
    fillStudentScreeningForms();
    fillStudentNutritionForm();
    fillStudentMentalForm();
    renderVaccineSchedule();
  }
  function applyRolePermissions(roleKey) {
    setupLimitedUserFormHandlers();
    const role = roleKey || getCurrentRole();
    document.body.classList.toggle('staff-app', isFullStaffRole(role));
    updateLimitedUserVisitLabels(role);
    const isStaff = isFullStaffRole(role);
    const isPublic = role === 'public';
    const followupCard = document.getElementById('nut-followup-card');
    if (followupCard) followupCard.style.display = isStaff ? '' : 'none';
    const dataSection = document.getElementById('sidebar-data-section');
    if (dataSection) dataSection.style.display = isStaff ? '' : 'none';
    const infoSection = document.getElementById('sidebar-info-section');
    if (infoSection) infoSection.style.display = (isPublic && guestMode === 'info') ? '' : 'none';
    const publicSection = document.getElementById('sidebar-public-section');
    if (publicSection) publicSection.style.display = (isPublic && guestMode === 'public') ? '' : 'none';
    document.querySelectorAll('#sidebar > .sidebar-section').forEach(function(sec) {
      if (sec.id === 'sidebar-public-section' || sec.id === 'sidebar-info-section' || sec.id === 'sidebar-data-section') return;
      if (isPublic) {
        sec.style.display = 'none';
        return;
      }
      if (sec.hasAttribute('data-staff-only')) {
        sec.style.display = isStaff ? '' : 'none';
      } else {
        sec.style.display = '';
      }
    });
    document.querySelectorAll('[data-staff-only]').forEach(function(el) {
      el.style.display = isStaff ? '' : 'none';
    });
    document.querySelectorAll('.visit-col-staff').forEach(function(el) {
      el.style.display = isStaff ? '' : 'none';
    });
    const isLimited = isLimitedUserRole(role);
    const visitTwoCol = document.querySelector('#section-visit .two-col');
    if (visitTwoCol) visitTwoCol.style.gridTemplateColumns = isStaff ? '' : '1fr';
    const visitRecTwoCol = document.getElementById('visit-record-two-col');
    if (visitRecTwoCol) visitRecTwoCol.style.gridTemplateColumns = isLimited ? '' : '1fr';
    var visitRecSec = document.getElementById('section-visit-record');
    if (visitRecSec) {
      if (isLimited) {
        visitRecSec.style.display = '';
      } else {
        visitRecSec.style.display = 'none';
        visitRecSec.classList.remove('active');
      }
    }
    document.querySelectorAll('[data-student-only]').forEach(function(el) {
      el.style.display = isLimited ? '' : 'none';
    });
    const isNurse = role === 'nurse';
    document.querySelectorAll('[data-nurse-only]').forEach(function(el) {
      el.style.display = isNurse ? '' : 'none';
    });
    if (isLimited) {
      fillStudentVaccineForm();
      fillStudentChronicForm();
      fillStudentDiseaseForm();
      fillVisitMyForm();
      fillVisitRecordForm();
    }
    fillStudentScreeningForms();
    fillStudentNutritionForm();
    fillStudentMentalForm();
    renderVaccineSchedule();
    renderVaccineHpvCoverageChart();
    refreshAllLiveCharts();
    renderDashboard();
    renderEmergencyRecords();
    renderDiseaseSituation();
    renderDiseaseReports();
    renderEnvironmentResults();
    if (typeof isFullStaffRole === 'function' && isFullStaffRole(role)) {
      refreshAllVisitRecordsFromSheetForStaff();
    } else {
      renderVisitToday();
    }
    const limitedUserBlockedActive = isLimited && (
      STAFF_ONLY_SECTIONS.some(function(sid) {
        const p = document.getElementById('section-' + sid);
        return p && p.classList.contains('active');
      }) || (function() {
        const p = document.getElementById('section-environment');
        return p && p.classList.contains('active');
      })() || (function() {
        const p = document.getElementById('section-dashboard');
        return p && p.classList.contains('active');
      })()
    );
    if (limitedUserBlockedActive) {
      showLimitedUserHome();
    }
    if (role === 'admin') {
      const reportPanel = document.getElementById('section-report');
      if (reportPanel && reportPanel.classList.contains('active')) {
        showSection('dashboard');
      }
    }
  }
  function enterGuestAccess(mode) {
    guestMode = (mode === 'public') ? 'public' : 'info';
    currentRole = 'public';
    loggedInStudentId = '';
    closeMobileNav();
    const badge = document.getElementById('roleBadge');
    if (badge) {
      badge.style.display = '';
      badge.textContent = guestMode === 'info' ? 'เธชเธฒเธฃเธชเธเน€เธ—เธจ' : 'เธเธธเธเธเธฅเธ—เธฑเนเธงเนเธ';
    }
    const screen = document.getElementById('role-screen');
    if (screen) screen.classList.add('role-screen-hidden');
    const main = document.querySelector('.main');
    if (main) main.scrollTop = 0;
    applyRolePermissions('public');
    showSection(guestMode === 'info' ? 'gshps' : 'public');
    saveAppSession();
  }
  function enterApp(roleKey) {
    guestMode = '';
    const r = ROLES[roleKey];
    if (!r) return;
    currentRole = roleKey;
    closeMobileNav();
    const badge = document.getElementById('roleBadge');
    if (badge) { badge.style.display = ''; badge.textContent = r.name; }
    const screen = document.getElementById('role-screen');
    if (screen) screen.classList.add('role-screen-hidden');
    const main = document.querySelector('.main');
    if (main) main.scrollTop = 0;
    applyRolePermissions(roleKey);
    if (isLimitedUserRole(roleKey)) {
      showLimitedUserHome();
    } else {
      showSection('dashboard');
    }
    saveAppSession();
  }
  function changeRole() {
    closeMobileNav();
    closeStudentLogin();
    closeStaffLogin();
    showWelcomeScreen();
  }

  window.enterGuestAccess = enterGuestAccess;
  window.enterApp = enterApp;
  window.openStaffLogin = openStaffLogin;
  window.openStudentLogin = openStudentLogin;
  window.closeStaffLogin = closeStaffLogin;
  window.closeStudentLogin = closeStudentLogin;
  window.submitStaffLogin = submitStaffLogin;
  window.submitStudentLogin = submitStudentLogin;
  window.changeRole = changeRole;
  window.showSection = showSection;
  window.showWelcomeScreen = showWelcomeScreen;

  window._openStaffLoginImpl = openStaffLogin;
  window._openStudentLoginImpl = openStudentLogin;
  window._closeStaffLoginImpl = closeStaffLogin;
  window._closeStudentLoginImpl = closeStudentLogin;
  window._submitStaffLoginImpl = submitStaffLogin;
  window._submitStudentLoginImpl = submitStudentLogin;
  window._enterGuestAccessImpl = enterGuestAccess;
  window.__shMainReady = true;
  if (window.__pendingStaffRoleEarly) {
    pendingStaffRole = window.__pendingStaffRoleEarly;
    window.__pendingStaffRoleEarly = '';
  }

  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
    const loginModal = document.getElementById('studentLoginModal');
    if (loginModal) {
      loginModal.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
        if (e.target === this) closeStudentLogin();
      });
    }
    const staffLoginModal = document.getElementById('staffLoginModal');
    if (staffLoginModal) {
      staffLoginModal.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
        if (e.target === this) closeStaffLogin();
      });
    }
    const vacChoiceModal = document.getElementById('vaccineChoiceModal');
    if (vacChoiceModal) {
      vacChoiceModal.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
        if (e.target === this) closeStudentVaccineChoiceModal();
      });
    }
    ['studentLoginUser', 'studentLoginPass'].forEach(function(id) {
      const el = document.getElementById(id);
      if (el) el.addEventListener('keydown', function(e) {
        if (e.key === 'Enter') { e.preventDefault(); submitStudentLogin(); }
      });
    });
    ['staffLoginUser', 'staffLoginPass'].forEach(function(id) {
      const el = document.getElementById(id);
      if (el) el.addEventListener('keydown', function(e) {
        if (e.key === 'Enter') { e.preventDefault(); submitStaffLogin(); }
      });
    });
    initMentalForms();
    initWhenStudentDataReady();
    safeBootData();
    if (!restoreAppSession()) {
      showWelcomeScreen();
    }
  });

  // ===== ADDED: Light / Dark theme toggle (persisted) =====
  function applyTheme(t) {
    const root = document.documentElement;
    if (t === 'dark') root.setAttribute('data-theme', 'dark');
    else root.removeAttribute('data-theme');
    const b = document.getElementById('themeToggle');
    if (b) b.textContent = (t === 'dark') ? 'โ€๏ธ' : '๐';
  }
  function toggleTheme() {
    const next = (document.documentElement.getAttribute('data-theme') === 'dark') ? 'light' : 'dark';
    try { localStorage.setItem('sh-theme', next); } catch (e) {}
    applyTheme(next);
  }
  (function () {
    let saved = 'light';
    try { saved = localStorage.getItem('sh-theme') || 'light'; } catch (e) {}
    applyTheme(saved);
  })();

  // ===== ADDED: Student search + level filter with live counter =====
  (function () {
    const tbody = document.querySelector('#section-student tbody');
    if (!tbody) return;
    const rows = Array.from(tbody.rows).map(tr => ({
      tr,
      text: (tr.cells[0].textContent + ' ' + tr.cells[1].textContent + ' ' + tr.cells[2].textContent).toLowerCase(),
      level: tr.cells[2].textContent.trim()
    }));
    const total = rows.length;
    const input = document.getElementById('search-student');
    const sel = document.getElementById('filter-level');
    const counter = document.getElementById('student-count');

    function render() {
      const q = (input && input.value ? input.value : '').trim().toLowerCase();
      const lv = (sel && sel.value) ? sel.value : '';
      let shown = 0;
      for (const r of rows) {
        const ok = (!q || r.text.indexOf(q) !== -1) && (!lv || r.level.indexOf(lv) === 0);
        r.tr.style.display = ok ? '' : 'none';
        if (ok) shown++;
      }
      if (counter) {
        counter.innerHTML = 'เนเธชเธ”เธ <strong>' + shown.toLocaleString('th-TH') +
          '</strong> / ' + total.toLocaleString('th-TH') + ' เธเธ';
      }
    }
    let t;
    const debounced = () => { clearTimeout(t); t = setTimeout(render, 150); };
    if (input) input.addEventListener('input', debounced);
    if (sel) sel.addEventListener('change', render);
    const btn = document.querySelector('#section-student .search-bar .btn-primary');
    if (btn) btn.addEventListener('click', function (e) { e.preventDefault(); render(); });
    render();
  })();

  // ===== ADDED: Scroll-to-top button =====
  (function () {
    const main = document.querySelector('.main');
    const btn = document.createElement('button');
    btn.className = 'scroll-top';
    btn.innerHTML = 'โ‘';
    btn.title = 'เธเธฅเธฑเธเธเธถเนเธเธ”เนเธฒเธเธเธ';
    document.body.appendChild(btn);
    const target = main || window;
    function onScroll() {
      const y = main ? main.scrollTop : window.scrollY;
      btn.classList.toggle('show', y > 300);
    }
    target.addEventListener('scroll', onScroll);
    btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
      if (main) main.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: 'smooth' });
      else window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: 'smooth' });
    });
  })();
</script><button class="scroll-top" title="เธเธฅเธฑเธเธเธถเนเธเธ”เนเธฒเธเธเธ">โ‘</button>
